title: SALIENT: Frequency-Aware Paired Diffusion for Controllable Long-Tail CT Detection
summary: Detection of rare lesions in whole-body CT is fundamentally limited by extreme class imbalance and low target-to-volume ratios, producing precision collapse despite high AUROC. Synthetic augmentation with diffusion models offers promise, yet pixel-space diffusion is computationally expensive, and existing mask-conditioned approaches lack controllable attribute-level regulation and paired supervision for accountable training. We introduce SALIENT, a mask-conditioned wavelet-domain diffusion framework that synthesizes paired lesion-masking volumes for controllable CT augmentation under long-tail regimes. Instead of denoising in pixel space, SALIENT performs structured diffusion over discrete wavelet coefficients, explicitly separating low-frequency brightness from high-frequency structural detail. Learnable frequency-aware objectives disentangle target and background attributes (structure, contrast, edge fidelity), enabling interpretable and stable optimization. A 3D VAE generates diverse volumetric lesion masks, and a semi-supervised teacher produces paired slice-level pseudo-labels for downstream mask-guided detection. SALIENT improves generative realism, as reflected by higher MS-SSIM (0.63 to 0.83) and lower FID (118.4 to 46.5). In a separate downstream evaluation, SALIENT-augmented training improves long-tail detection performance, yielding disproportionate AUPRC gains across low prevalences and target-to-volume ratios. Optimal synthetic ratios shift from 2x to 4x as labeled seed size decreases, indicating a seed-dependent augmentation regime under low-label conditions. SALIENT demonstrates that frequency-aware diffusion enables controllable, computationally efficient precision rescue in long-tail CT detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SALIENT的框架，用于在CT图像中合成罕见病灶，以解决类别不平衡和目标体积比低的问题。SALIENT在小波域进行扩散，实现了可控的、计算高效的病灶合成，并提高了下游检测任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 在全身CT扫描中检测罕见病灶面临类不平衡和目标体积比低的问题，导致模型精度下降。现有的合成数据方法计算成本高，且缺乏可控属性调节和成对监督。
AI.method: SALIENT采用基于掩码的小波域扩散模型。它在离散小波系数上进行结构化扩散，将低频亮度与高频结构细节分离。通过可学习的频率感知目标来解耦目标和背景属性，并使用3D VAE生成病灶掩码，以及一个半监督教师生成成对的切片级伪标签。
AI.result: SALIENT在生成真实性方面表现出色，MS-SSIM从0.63提高到0.83，FID从118.4降低到46.5。在下游任务中，SALIENT增强的训练提高了长尾检测性能，在低患病率和低目标体积比下获得了显著的AUPRC增益。合成比例与种子标签数量相关，预示着低标签条件下的种子依赖性增强。
AI.conclusion: SALIENT证明了频率感知扩散能够实现可控、计算高效的CT长尾检测精度提升，为解决罕见病灶检测的挑战提供了一种有效方法。

title: SegReg: Latent Space Regularization for Improved Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation models are typically optimised with voxel-wise losses that constrain predictions only in the output space. This leaves latent feature representations largely unconstrained, potentially limiting generalisation. We propose {SegReg}, a latent-space regularisation framework that operates on feature maps of U-Net models to encourage structured embeddings while remaining fully compatible with standard segmentation losses. Integrated with the nnU-Net framework, we evaluate SegReg on prostate, cardiac, and hippocampus segmentation and demonstrate consistent improvements in domain generalisation. Furthermore, we show that explicit latent regularisation improves continual learning by reducing task drift and enhancing forward transfer across sequential tasks without adding memory or any extra parameters. These results highlight latent-space regularisation as a practical approach for building more generalisable and continual-learning-ready models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SegReg的无监督潜在空间正则化框架，用于U-Net模型，以提高医学图像分割的泛化能力和持续学习能力，且不增加额外参数或内存。
AI.motivation: 现有的医学图像分割模型仅在输出空间进行优化，导致潜在特征表示未受约束，可能限制模型的泛化能力。同时，模型在持续学习任务中存在任务漂移和前向迁移不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出SegReg框架，通过在U-Net模型的特征图上应用无监督的潜在空间正则化，鼓励结构化的嵌入。该方法与标准的分割损失兼容，并集成到nnU-Net框架中进行评估。
AI.result: SegReg在前列腺、心脏和海马体分割任务上显示出一致的域泛化能力的提高。此外，显式的潜在空间正则化通过减少任务漂移和增强跨序列任务的前向迁移，提高了模型的持续学习能力。
AI.conclusion: 潜在空间正则化是一种实用方法，可以构建更具泛化能力和为持续学习做好准备的模型，且不会增加额外的计算成本。

title: HumanMCP: A Human-Like Query Dataset for Evaluating MCP Tool Retrieval Performance
summary: Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers contain a collection of thousands of open-source standardized tools, linking LLMs to external systems; however, existing datasets and benchmarks lack realistic, human-like user queries, remaining a critical gap in evaluating the tool usage and ecosystems of MCP servers. Existing datasets often do contain tool descriptions but fail to represent how different users portray their requests, leading to poor generalization and inflated reliability of certain benchmarks. This paper introduces the first large-scale MCP dataset featuring diverse, high-quality diverse user queries generated specifically to match 2800 tools across 308 MCP servers, developing on the MCP Zero dataset. Each tool is paired with multiple unique user personas that we have generated, to capture varying levels of user intent ranging from precise task requests, and ambiguous, exploratory commands, reflecting the complexity of real-world interaction patterns.

AI.tldr: 该论文发布了一个大规模的模型上下文协议（MCP）数据集，其中包含针对2800个工具生成的、由不同用户角色驱动的、多样化的高质量用户查询，以解决现有MCP基准测试中用户查询不真实的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MCP数据集和基准测试缺乏真实、类人用户查询，导致对工具使用和MCP服务器生态系统的评估存在局限，并可能高估某些基准的可靠性。
AI.method: 研究人员创建了一个新的大规模MCP数据集，其中包含针对2800个工具生成的、由308个MCP服务器支持的多样化用户查询。每个工具都与生成的用户角色配对，以捕捉从精确到模糊的不同用户意图。
AI.result: 生成了一个包含大量多样化、高质量用户查询的数据集，这些查询针对2800个MCP工具，并考虑了不同的用户角色和意图。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了现有MCP评估的空白，有望提高对MCP工具使用和生态系统的评估的真实性和泛化能力。

title: Few-Shot Continual Learning for 3D Brain MRI with Frozen Foundation Models
summary: Foundation models pretrained on large-scale 3D medical imaging data face challenges when adapted to multiple downstream tasks under continual learning with limited labeled data. We address few-shot continual learning for 3D brain MRI by combining a frozen pretrained backbone with task-specific Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) modules. Tasks arrive sequentially -- tumor segmentation (BraTS) and brain age estimation (IXI) -- with no replay of previous task data. Each task receives a dedicated LoRA adapter; only the adapter and task-specific head are trained while the backbone remains frozen, thereby eliminating catastrophic forgetting by design (BWT=0). In continual learning, sequential full fine-tuning suffers severe forgetting (T1 Dice drops from 0.80 to 0.16 after T2), while sequential linear probing achieves strong T1 (Dice 0.79) but fails on T2 (MAE 1.45). Our LoRA approach achieves the best balanced performance across both tasks: T1 Dice 0.62$\pm$0.07, T2 MAE 0.16$\pm$0.05, with zero forgetting and $<$0.1\% trainable parameters per task, though with noted systematic age underestimation in T2 (Wilcoxon $p<0.001$). Frozen foundation models with task-specific LoRA adapters thus offer a practical solution when both tasks must be maintained under few-shot continual learning.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种结合冻结的预训练大模型和低秩适应（LoRA）模块的方法，用于解决3D脑部MRI在少样本持续学习场景下的多任务适应问题，在避免灾难性遗忘的同时，平衡了不同任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 在少样本持续学习的场景下，将预训练的3D医学影像基础模型应用于多个下游任务面临挑战，特别是存在灾难性遗忘的问题。
AI.method: 使用冻结的预训练基础模型作为骨干，并为每个新任务训练独立的低秩适应（LoRA）模块。仅训练LoRA适配器和任务特定头，保持骨干模型冻结。任务按顺序到来，不进行旧任务数据的回放。
AI.result: 与顺序全微调（灾难性遗忘严重）和顺序线性探测（在后续任务上表现差）相比，LoRA方法在两个任务（脑肿瘤分割和脑龄估计）上取得了更均衡的性能。具体表现为T1分割Dice为0.62±0.07，T2脑龄估计MAE为0.16±0.05，且实现了零遗忘。同时，每项任务仅需训练不到0.1%的参数。但观察到在T2任务上存在系统性的年龄低估。
AI.conclusion: 对于需要在少样本持续学习场景下同时维持多个任务性能的情况，使用冻结的基础模型配合任务特定的LoRA适配器是一种实用的解决方案，能够有效避免灾难性遗忘并显著减少可训练参数。

title: Hierarchical Multi-Scale Graph Learning with Knowledge-Guided Attention for Whole-Slide Image Survival Analysis
summary: We propose a Hierarchical Multi-scale Knowledge-aware Graph Network (HMKGN) that models multi-scale interactions and spatially hierarchical relationships within whole-slide images (WSIs) for cancer prognostication. Unlike conventional attention-based MIL, which ignores spatial organization, or graph-based MIL, which relies on static handcrafted graphs, HMKGN enforces a hierarchical structure with spatial locality constraints, wherein local cellular-level dynamic graphs aggregate spatially proximate patches within each region of interest (ROI) and a global slide-level dynamic graph integrates ROI-level features into WSI-level representations. Moreover, multi-scale integration at the ROI level combines coarse contextual features from broader views with fine-grained structural representations from local patch-graph aggregation. We evaluate HMKGN on four TCGA cohorts (KIRC, LGG, PAAD, and STAD; N=513, 487, 138, and 370) for survival prediction. It consistently outperforms existing MIL-based models, yielding improved concordance indices (10.85% better) and statistically significant stratification of patient survival risk (log-rank p < 0.05).

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为HMKGN的层次化多尺度知识感知图网络，用于全视野图像（WSIs）中的癌症预后分析，该网络能有效建模多尺度交互和空间层次关系，并在生存预测任务上超越现有MIL模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基于注意力机制的多实例学习（MIL）忽略了空间组织，而基于图的MIL则依赖于静态手工图。研究者希望开发一种能够同时考虑空间组织、层次结构和多尺度信息的MIL模型，以提高癌症预后的准确性。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为HMKGN（Hierarchical Multi-scale Knowledge-aware Graph Network）的模型。该模型通过以下方式工作：1.在区域感兴趣（ROI）内，通过局部细胞级别动态图聚合空间邻近的图块，并施加空间局部性约束。2.在WSIs级别，通过全局滑动级别动态图整合ROI级别特征，形成WSIs级别的表示。3.在ROI级别进行多尺度集成，结合来自更广阔视野的粗略上下文特征和局部图块图聚合产生的细粒度结构表示。
AI.result: HMKGN在四个TCGA队列（KIRC、LGG、PAAD和STAD）的生存预测任务上进行了评估。结果显示，HMKGN一致性地优于现有的基于MIL的模型，其一致性指数提高了10.85%，并能显著区分患者生存风险（log-rank p < 0.05）。
AI.conclusion: HMKGN是一种有效的全视野图像分析模型，通过引入层次化结构、动态图和多尺度知识感知，能够更好地捕捉WSIs中的空间和尺度信息，从而在癌症生存预测方面取得优于现有方法的性能。

title: Cybersecurity of Teleoperated Quadruped Robots: A Systematic Survey of Vulnerabilities, Threats, and Open Defense Gaps
summary:
Teleoperated quadruped robots are increasingly deployed in safety-critical missions -- industrial inspection, military reconnaissance, and emergency response -- yet the security of their communication and control infrastructure remains insufficiently characterized. Quadrupeds present distinct security challenges arising from dynamic stability constraints, gait-dependent vulnerability windows, substantial kinetic energy, and elevated operator cognitive load.
  This survey synthesizes peer-reviewed literature and vulnerability disclosures (2019--2025) to provide comprehensive analysis of cybersecurity threats, consequences, and countermeasures for teleoperated quadruped systems. We contribute: (i) a six-layer attack taxonomy spanning perception manipulation, VR/AR operator targeting, communication disruption, control signal attacks, localization spoofing, and network intrusion; (ii) systematic attack-to-consequence mapping with timing characterization; (iii) Technology Readiness Level classification exposing critical maturity gaps between field-deployed communication protections (TRL 7--9) and experimental perception/operator-layer defenses (TRL 3--5); (iv) comparative security analysis of six commercial platforms; (v) pragmatic deployment guidance stratified by implementation timeline; and (vi) eight prioritized research gaps with implementation roadmaps.
  Limitations: Platform assessments rely on publicly available information. Attack success rates derive from cited studies under controlled conditions and require domain-specific validation.

AI.tldr: 该论文对遥操作四足机器人进行了全面的网络安全威胁和对策分析，提出了攻击分类、影响映射和技术成熟度评估，并为部署和未来研究提供了指导。
AI.motivation: 随着四足机器人在关键任务中的广泛应用，对其通信和控制基础设施的安全性的深入了解不足，需要对其独特的安全挑战进行系统性研究。
AI.method: 该研究通过综合分析同行评审的文献和漏洞披露（2019-2025），构建了一个六层攻击分类体系，对攻击到后果进行了系统映射和时间特征分析，并对六个商用平台进行了比较安全分析，最后根据实施时间对部署进行了分层指导，并指出了八个优先研究方向。
AI.result: 研究识别了六类攻击，包括感知操纵、VR/AR操作员针对、通信中断、控制信号攻击、定位欺骗和网络入侵。评估显示，现场部署的通信保护技术成熟度较高（TRL 7-9），而感知/操作员层面的防御技术成熟度较低（TRL 3-5），存在关键成熟度差距。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为遥操作四足机器人的网络安全提供了全面的分析框架和实践指导，突显了感知和操作员层面的防御是未来研究和发展的重要方向，并为研究人员和部署者提供了明确的路线图。

title: DesignSense: A Human Preference Dataset and Reward Modeling Framework for Graphic Layout Generation
summary: Graphic layouts serve as an important and engaging medium for visual communication across different channels. While recent layout generation models have demonstrated impressive capabilities, they frequently fail to align with nuanced human aesthetic judgment. Existing preference datasets and reward models trained on text-to-image generation do not generalize to layout evaluation, where the spatial arrangement of identical elements determines quality. To address this critical gap, we introduce DesignSense-10k, a large-scale dataset of 10,235 human-annotated preference pairs for graphic layout evaluation. We propose a five-stage curation pipeline that generates visually coherent layout transformations across diverse aspect ratios, using semantic grouping, layout prediction, filtering, clustering, and VLM-based refinement to produce high-quality comparison pairs. Human preferences are annotated using a 4-class scheme (left, right, both good, both bad) to capture subjective ambiguity. Leveraging this dataset, we train DesignSense, a vision-language model-based classifier that substantially outperforms existing open-source and proprietary models across comprehensive evaluation metrics (54.6% improvement in Macro F1 over the strongest proprietary baseline). Our analysis shows that frontier VLMs remain unreliable overall and fail catastrophically on the full four-class task, underscoring the need for specialized, preference-aware models. Beyond the dataset, our reward model DesignSense yields tangible downstream gains in layout generation. Using our judge during RL based training improves generator win rate by about 3%, while inference-time scaling, which involves generating multiple candidates and selecting the best one, provides a 3.6% improvement. These results highlight the practical impact of specialized, layout-aware preference modeling on real-world layout generation quality.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了DesignSense-10k数据集和DesignSense模型，用于解决现有文本到图像生成模型在图形布局美学评估上的不足。DesignSense-10k包含10,235个人类偏好标注的图形布局对，并通过五阶段流水线生成。基于此数据集训练的DesignSense模型在布局评估任务上表现优于现有模型，并能提升下游布局生成模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型在图形布局评估方面存在不足，因为它们的偏好数据集和奖励模型无法泛化到仅由相同元素空间排列决定的布局质量评估。这导致模型生成的图形布局未能符合人类的细微审美判断。
AI.method: 研究者提出了DesignSense-10k数据集，包含10,235个人类标注的图形布局偏好对。他们使用了一个包含语义分组、布局预测、过滤、聚类和基于VLM（视觉语言模型）的细化在内的五阶段策展流程来生成高质量的比较对。基于此数据集，研究者训练了一个名为DesignSense的基于VLM的分类器。
AI.result: DesignSense模型在布局评估任务上取得了显著的性能提升，在宏观F1分数上比最强的专有基线提高了54.6%。研究发现，现有的前沿VLM在整体上仍不可靠，并且在包含四种类别的完整任务上表现糟糕。使用DesignSense作为奖励模型，在基于强化学习的训练中，布局生成器的胜率提高了约3%；在推理时进行扩展（生成多个候选并选择最佳）则提供了3.6%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 专门的、偏好感知的模型对于图形布局评估至关重要。DesignSense-10k数据集和DesignSense模型为解决图形布局生成中的审美挑战提供了有效手段，并能实际提升下游布局生成模型的质量。

title: Toward General Semantic Chunking: A Discriminative Framework for Ultra-Long Documents
summary: Long-document topic segmentation plays an important role in information retrieval and document understanding, yet existing methods still show clear shortcomings in ultra-long text settings. Traditional discriminative models are constrained by fixed windows and cannot model document-level semantics; generative large language models can output paragraph boundaries, but inference is expensive and long inputs are difficult to support. To address these issues, we propose a discriminative segmentation model based on Qwen3-0.6B. On top of the backbone network, we add a cross-window context fusion layer and a boundary classification head, and combine them with an overlapping sliding-window strategy. Our model supports single-pass inputs of up to 13k tokens and can be extended to ultra-long documents for paragraph boundary detection. To further enhance downstream retrieval efficiency, we derive a vector fusion method with scalar correction, which compresses the representation of ultra-long segments into a single vector without semantic loss. Experiments on the Wikipedia long-document topic segmentation dataset WIKI-727K show that, compared with three generative models based on Qwen2-0.5B released by Jina, our method achieves a better macro-averaged F1 and delivers two orders of magnitude faster inference, substantially improving the practicality and scalability of long-document processing.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Qwen3-0.6B的判别式主题分割模型，通过跨窗口上下文融合和边界分类头，并结合重叠滑动窗口策略，实现了对超长文档（13k token）的高效主题分割，并提出了一种向量融合方法以提高检索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有长文档主题分割方法在处理超长文本时存在局限性：判别式模型受固定窗口限制，无法捕捉文档级语义；生成式大模型虽然能输出段落边界，但推理成本高且输入长度受限。
AI.method: 构建了一个基于Qwen3-0.6B的判别式分割模型，增加了跨窗口上下文融合层和边界分类头，并采用重叠滑动窗口策略。此外，提出了一种带有标量校正的向量融合方法，用于压缩超长文本段落的表示。
AI.result: 在WIKI-727K数据集上，与Jina发布的基于Qwen2-0.5B的生成式模型相比，该方法取得了更高的宏平均F1分数，并且推理速度快了两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的判别式主题分割模型在超长文档处理方面具有更高的实用性和可扩展性，能够有效解决现有方法的不足，并显著提升了下游检索的效率。

title: SGDC: Structurally-Guided Dynamic Convolution for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Spatially variant dynamic convolution provides a principled approach of integrating spatial adaptivity into deep neural networks. However, mainstream designs in medical segmentation commonly generate dynamic kernels through average pooling, which implicitly collapses high-frequency spatial details into a coarse, spatially-compressed representation, leading to over-smoothed predictions that degrade the fidelity of fine-grained clinical structures. To address this limitation, we propose a novel Structure-Guided Dynamic Convolution (SGDC) mechanism, which leverages an explicitly supervised structure-extraction branch to guide the generation of dynamic kernels and gating signals for structure-aware feature modulation. Specifically, the high-fidelity boundary information from this auxiliary branch is fused with semantic features to enable spatially-precise feature modulation. By replacing context aggregation with pixel-wise structural guidance, the proposed design effectively prevents the information loss introduced by average pooling. Experimental results show that SGDC achieves state-of-the-art performance on ISIC 2016, PH2, ISIC 2018, and CoNIC datasets, delivering superior boundary fidelity by reducing the Hausdorff Distance (HD95) by 2.05, and providing consistent IoU gains of 0.99\%-1.49\% over pooling-based baselines. Moreover, the mechanism exhibits strong potential for extension to other fine-grained, structure-sensitive vision tasks, such as small-object detection, offering a principled solution for preserving structural integrity in medical image analysis. To facilitate reproducibility and encourage further research, the implementation code for both our SGE and SGDC modules has been is publicly released at https://github.com/solstice0621/SGDC.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的结构引导动态卷积（SGDC）机制，通过引入显式监督的结构提取分支来指导动态卷积核的生成，从而提高医学图像分割的精度，尤其是在边界细节的保持方面。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分割方法中，主流动态卷积通过平均池化生成动态卷积核，这会丢失高频空间细节，导致预测结果过度平滑，降低了精细临床结构的保真度。
AI.method: 提出了结构引导动态卷积（SGDC）机制，该机制包含一个显式监督的结构提取分支，用于指导动态卷积核和门控信号的生成。该分支提取的高保真边界信息与语义特征融合，实现对特征的结构感知调制。通过像素级结构引导代替上下文聚合，避免了平均池化引入的信息丢失。
AI.result: 在ISIC 2016、PH2、ISIC 2018和CoNIC数据集上取得了最先进的性能。通过降低Hausdorff距离（HD95）2.05，提高了边界保真度，并实现了0.99%-1.49%的IoU增益。
AI.conclusion: SGDC机制能够有效防止信息丢失，显著提高医学图像分割的边界保真度，并有可能扩展到其他精细、结构敏感的视觉任务，如小目标检测，为医学图像分析中保持结构完整性提供了一个原则性解决方案。

title: Training with Hard Constraints: Learning Neural Certificates and Controllers for SDEs
summary: Due to their expressive power, neural networks (NNs) are promising templates for functional optimization problems, particularly for reach-avoid certificate generation for systems governed by stochastic differential equations (SDEs). However, ensuring hard-constraint satisfaction remains a major challenge. In this work, we propose two constraint-driven training frameworks with guarantees for supermartingale-based neural certificate construction and controller synthesis for SDEs. The first approach enforces certificate inequalities via domain discretization and a bound-based loss, guaranteeing global validity once the loss reaches zero. We show that this method also enables joint NN controller-certificate synthesis with hard guarantees. For high-dimensional systems where discretization becomes prohibitive, we introduce a partition-free, scenario-based training method that provides arbitrarily tight PAC guarantees for certificate constraint satisfaction. Benchmarks demonstrate scalability of the bound-based method up to 5D, outperforming the state of the art, and scalability of the scenario-based approach to at least 10D with high-confidence guarantees.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于神经网络的约束驱动训练框架，用于生成随机微分方程（SDE）系统的安全性和可控性证书，并保证硬约束的满足，其中一种方法适用于低维系统，另一种适用于高维系统。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于神经网络的SDE系统功能优化方法（如生成可达-规避证书）在保证硬约束满足方面存在挑战。
AI.method: 提出两种约束驱动的训练框架：1. 针对低维系统，采用域离散化和基于界限的损失函数，以保证全局有效性；2. 针对高维系统，采用无划分、基于场景的训练方法，提供PAC（PAC-guarantees）保证。两种方法都支持联合神经网络控制器和证书的合成。
AI.result: 基于界限的方法在最高5维的基准测试中表现优于现有技术；基于场景的方法在高维（至少10维）系统中实现了高置信度的保证。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的两种框架能够有效地为SDE系统生成满足硬约束的神经网络证书和控制器，并解决了约束满足的挑战，在高维系统上展现出良好的可扩展性。

title: An Agentic LLM Framework for Adverse Media Screening in AML Compliance
summary: Adverse media screening is a critical component of anti-money laundering (AML) and know-your-customer (KYC) compliance processes in financial institutions. Traditional approaches rely on keyword-based searches that generate high false-positive rates or require extensive manual review. We present an agentic system that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to automate adverse media screening. Our system implements a multi-step approach where an LLM agent searches the web, retrieves and processes relevant documents, and computes an Adverse Media Index (AMI) score for each subject. We evaluate our approach using multiple LLM backends on a dataset comprising Politically Exposed Persons (PEPs), persons from regulatory watchlists, and sanctioned persons from OpenSanctions and clean names from academic sources, demonstrating the system's ability to distinguish between high-risk and low-risk individuals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用大型语言模型（LLM）和检索增强生成（RAG）技术自动进行不利媒体筛查的代理系统，以提高金融机构反洗钱（AML）和了解你的客户（KYC）合规效率。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于关键词的不利媒体筛查方法存在高误报率和耗费大量人力的问题，因此需要更高效的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 该系统采用多步骤方法：LLM代理进行网络搜索，检索并处理相关文档，然后计算每个目标的“不利媒体指数”（AMI）得分。
AI.result: 在包含政治公众人物（PEPs）、监管关注名单人员、受制裁人员和普通人员的数据集上，使用多种LLM后端进行评估，证明了该系统能够有效区分高风险和低风险个人。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM和RAG的代理系统能够有效地自动化不利媒体筛查过程，提高准确性并降低人工审查成本。

title: Demystifying Action Space Design for Robotic Manipulation Policies
summary: The specification of the action space plays a pivotal role in imitation-based robotic manipulation policy learning, fundamentally shaping the optimization landscape of policy learning. While recent advances have focused heavily on scaling training data and model capacity, the choice of action space remains guided by ad-hoc heuristics or legacy designs, leading to an ambiguous understanding of robotic policy design philosophies. To address this ambiguity, we conducted a large-scale and systematic empirical study, confirming that the action space does have significant and complex impacts on robotic policy learning. We dissect the action design space along temporal and spatial axes, facilitating a structured analysis of how these choices govern both policy learnability and control stability. Based on 13,000+ real-world rollouts on a bimanual robot and evaluation on 500+ trained models over four scenarios, we examine the trade-offs between absolute vs. delta representations, and joint-space vs. task-space parameterizations. Our large-scale results suggest that properly designing the policy to predict delta actions consistently improves performance, while joint-space and task-space representations offer complementary strengths, favoring control stability and generalization, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文对机器人模仿学习中的动作空间设计进行了大规模实证研究，发现动作空间对策略学习有显著且复杂的影响，并提出了基于时间轴和空间轴的分析框架。
AI.motivation: 当前的机器人策略学习在动作空间选择上缺乏清晰的设计哲学，多依赖于经验或遗留设计，导致对策略设计理念理解模糊。
AI.method: 通过大规模（13,000+真实世界数据，500+训练模型）的实证研究，在双臂机器人上，沿时间轴和空间轴对动作空间进行解构，分析了绝对/增量表示和关节空间/任务空间参数化之间的权衡。
AI.result: 研究表明，策略设计为预测增量动作能一致性地提高性能。关节空间和任务空间表示各有优势，前者有利于控制稳定性，后者有利于泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 动作空间的设计对机器人模仿学习策略的学习能力和控制稳定性有重要影响，增量动作表示是更优选择，而关节空间和任务空间表示需要根据具体需求进行权衡。

title: Data-Driven Linearization based Arc Fault Prediction in Medium Voltage Electrical Distribution System
summary: High-impedance arc faults (HIAFs) in medium-voltage electrical distribution systems are difficult to detect due to their low fault current levels and nonlinear transient behavior. Traditional detection algorithms generally struggle with predictions under dynamic waveform scenarios. This research provides our approach of using a unique data-driven linearization (DDL) framework for early prediction of HIAFs, giving both interpretability and scalability. The proposed method translates nonlinear current waveforms into a linearized space using coordinate embeddings and polynomial transformation, enabling precise modelling of fault precursors.The total duration of the test waveform is 0.5 seconds, within which the arc fault occurs between 0.2 seconds to 0.3 seconds. Our proposed approach using DDL, trained solely on the pre-fault healthy region (0.10 seconds to 0.18 seconds) effectively captures certain invisible fault precursors, to accurately predict the onset of fault at 0.189 seconds, which is approximately 0.011 seconds (i.e., 11 milliseconds) earlier than the actual fault occurrence. In particular, the framework predicts the start of arc faults at 0.189 seconds, significantly earlier of the actual fault incidence at 0.200 seconds, demonstrating substantial early warning capability. Performance evaluation comprises eigenvalue analysis, prediction error measures, error growth rate and waveform regeneration fidelity. Such early prediction proves that the model is capable of correctly foreseeing faults which is especially helpful in preventing real-world faults and accidents. It confirms that our proposed approach reliably predicts arc faults in medium-voltage power distribution systems

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种数据驱动的线性化（DDL）框架，用于在中压配电系统中提前预测高阻抗电弧故障（HIAFs），该框架能够将非线性电流波形转化为线性空间，从而在故障发生前约11毫秒进行准确预测。
AI.motivation: 高阻抗电弧故障（HIAFs）在识别时存在低故障电流和非线性瞬态行为的挑战，传统算法难以应对动态波形场景，因此需要一种新的方法来提前预测。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动的线性化（DDL）框架，通过坐标嵌入和多项式变换将非线性电流波形映射到线性空间，从而实现对故障前兆的精确建模。模型仅使用故障前健康区域的数据进行训练。
AI.result: 所提出的DDL方法能够识别出隐藏的故障前兆，并在实际故障发生前约11毫秒（预测时间0.189秒，实际故障时间0.200秒）准确预测HIAF的发生。评估指标包括特征值分析、预测误差、误差增长率和波形再生保真度。
AI.conclusion: DDL框架能够在中压配电系统中可靠地预测高阻抗电弧故障，具有显著的预警能力，有助于预防实际故障和事故的发生，并且该方法具有可解释性和可扩展性。

title: Printed helicoids with embedded air channels make sensorized segments for soft continuum robots
comment: Accepted for publication in the proceedings of the 2026 IEEE 9th International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft)
summary: Soft robots enable safe, adaptive interaction with complex environments but remain difficult to sense and control due to their highly deformable structures. Architected soft materials such as helicoid lattices offer tunable stiffness and strength but are challenging to instrument because of their sparse geometry. We introduce a fabrication method for embedding air channels into helicoid-based soft continuum robots. Multi-material segments fabricated via vision-controlled jetting in a single print interface with PCBs housing miniature pressure sensors and IMUs for distributed deformation sensing. We characterize the mechanical properties of four helicoid designs and validate the sensor response to fundamental deformation modes. To demonstrate the platform's scalability, we construct and mechanically evaluate a meter-scale, 14-DoF cable-driven soft arm capable of open-loop trajectory tracking and object grasping, with tactile-based stiffness detection demonstrated using the gripper sensors. This approach establishes a scalable fabrication strategy for sensorized architected materials in large-scale soft robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种将气道嵌入螺旋状软连续机器人的制造方法，通过集成传感器实现大规模可扩展的变形感知和控制。
AI.motivation: 软机器人虽能安全地与复杂环境交互，但其高度可变形的结构给传感和控制带来挑战。螺旋状结构材料虽可调刚度，但其稀疏几何结构不利于集成传感器。
AI.method: 采用视觉控制喷射技术，在同一打印接口中制造多材料嵌入气道和PCB的螺旋状软连续机器人，PCB上集成了微型压力传感器和IMU用于分布式变形感知。对四种螺旋设计进行了机械性能表征，并验证了传感器对基本变形模式的响应。
AI.result: 开发了一个可扩展的平台，能够制造出具有14自由度、米级长度的软臂。该软臂能够进行开环轨迹跟踪和物体抓取，并通过夹爪传感器实现了基于触觉的刚度检测。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模软机器人系统中传感器化架构材料提供了一种可扩展的制造策略，解决了软机器人传感和控制的难题。

title: Task-Lens: Cross-Task Utility Based Speech Dataset Profiling for Low-Resource Indian Languages
summary: The rising demand for inclusive speech technologies amplifies the need for multilingual datasets for Natural Language Processing (NLP) research. However, limited awareness of existing task-specific resources in low-resource languages hinders research. This challenge is especially acute in linguistically diverse countries, such as India. Cross-task profiling of existing Indian speech datasets can alleviate the data scarcity challenge. This involves investigating the utility of datasets across multiple downstream tasks rather than focusing on a single task. Prior surveys typically catalogue datasets for a single task, leaving comprehensive cross-task profiling as an open opportunity. Therefore, we propose Task-Lens, a cross-task survey that assesses the readiness of 50 Indian speech datasets spanning 26 languages for nine downstream speech tasks. First, we analyze which datasets contain metadata and properties suitable for specific tasks. Next, we propose task-aligned enhancements to unlock datasets to their full downstream potential. Finally, we identify tasks and Indian languages that are critically underserved by current resources. Our findings reveal that many Indian speech datasets contain untapped metadata that can support multiple downstream tasks. By uncovering cross-task linkages and gaps, Task-Lens enables researchers to explore the broader applicability of existing datasets and to prioritize dataset creation for underserved tasks and languages.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了Task-Lens，一个针对印度50个、26种语言的语音数据集进行的跨任务评估，以解决低资源语言数据稀缺问题，并识别服务不足的任务和语言。
AI.motivation: 对包容性语音技术的需求日益增长，但低资源语言的NLP研究缺乏任务特定的多语言数据集，尤其是在印度这样的多语言国家，这阻碍了研究的发展。
AI.method: 研究者对50个印度语音数据集进行了跨任务评估，涵盖26种语言和9个下游语音任务。首先，分析数据集的元数据和属性是否适合特定任务；其次，提出任务对齐的增强方法以充分发挥数据集的潜力；最后，识别当前资源严重不足的任务和印度语言。
AI.result: 研究发现，许多印度语音数据集包含未被充分利用的元数据，可支持多个下游任务。通过揭示跨任务的联系和差距，Task-Lens能够帮助研究者探索现有数据集的广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: Task-Lens通过识别现有印度语音数据集的跨任务潜力，以及当前资源不足的任务和语言，为研究者提供了宝贵的指导，有助于更有效地利用现有资源并优先创建新数据集。

title: Modelling and Simulation of Neuromorphic Datasets for Anomaly Detection in Computer Vision
summary: Limitations on the availability of Dynamic Vision Sensors (DVS) present a fundamental challenge to researchers of neuromorphic computer vision applications. In response, datasets have been created by the research community, but often contain a limited number of samples or scenarios. To address the lack of a comprehensive simulator of neuromorphic vision datasets, we introduce the Anomalous Neuromorphic Tool for Shapes (ANTShapes), a novel dataset simulation framework. Built in the Unity engine, ANTShapes simulates abstract, configurable 3D scenes populated by objects displaying randomly-generated behaviours describing attributes such as motion and rotation. The sampling of object behaviours, and the labelling of anomalously-acting objects, is a statistical process following central limit theorem principles. Datasets containing an arbitrary number of samples can be created and exported from ANTShapes, along with accompanying label and frame data, through the adjustment of a limited number of parameters within the software. ANTShapes addresses the limitations of data availability to researchers of event-based computer vision by allowing for the simulation of bespoke datasets to suit purposes including object recognition and localisation alongside anomaly detection.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为ANTShapes的Unity引擎构建的模拟框架，用于生成动态视觉传感器（DVS）数据。该框架可以创建包含具有随机行为的3D物体的抽象场景，并能自动标注异常行为的对象，从而生成可定制的DVS数据集，以克服现有DVS数据集样本量和场景有限的缺点，并支持对象识别、定位和异常检测等应用。
AI.motivation: 现有DVS数据集样本量和场景有限，阻碍了神经形态计算机视觉研究的发展。需要一个能够生成任意数量样本和场景的DVS数据集模拟器。
AI.method: 使用Unity引擎构建ANTShapes模拟框架。框架模拟抽象的3D场景，其中包含具有随机生成行为（如运动和旋转）的对象。对象行为的采样和异常行为的标注遵循中心极限定理的统计过程。用户可以通过调整有限的参数来生成和导出包含样本、标签和帧数据的数据集。
AI.result: ANTShapes能够生成任意数量的DVS数据集，并提供相应的标签和帧数据。生成的样本数据可以用于对象识别、定位和异常检测等任务。
AI.conclusion: ANTShapes是一个创新的DVS数据集模拟框架，它解决了当前DVS数据可用性不足的问题，为神经形态计算机视觉研究者提供了生成定制化数据集的强大工具，支持了多种计算机视觉应用。

title: Causal Identification from Counterfactual Data: Completeness and Bounding Results
summary: Previous work establishing completeness results for $\textit{counterfactual identification}$ has been circumscribed to the setting where the input data belongs to observational or interventional distributions (Layers 1 and 2 of Pearl's Causal Hierarchy), since it was generally presumed impossible to obtain data from counterfactual distributions, which belong to Layer 3. However, recent work (Raghavan & Bareinboim, 2025) has formally characterized a family of counterfactual distributions which can be directly estimated via experimental methods - a notion they call $\textit{counterfactual realizabilty}$. This leaves open the question of what $\textit{additional}$ counterfactual quantities now become identifiable, given this new access to (some) Layer 3 data. To answer this question, we develop the CTFIDU+ algorithm for identifying counterfactual queries from an arbitrary set of Layer 3 distributions, and prove that it is complete for this task. Building on this, we establish the theoretical limit of which counterfactuals can be identified from physically realizable distributions, thus implying the $\textit{fundamental limit to exact causal inference in the non-parametric setting}$. Finally, given the impossibility of identifying certain critical types of counterfactuals, we derive novel analytic bounds for such quantities using realizable counterfactual data, and corroborate using simulations that counterfactual data helps tighten the bounds for non-identifiable quantities in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CTFIDU+算法，用于从任意可实现的第三层（反事实）分布中识别反事实查询，并证明了其完备性。研究还确定了从物理可实现的分布中可识别反事实的理论极限，并为不可识别的反事实量推导了新的解析界限。
AI.motivation: 先前关于反事实识别的研究仅限于观察性或干预性分布（因果层级的第一、二层），因为人们普遍认为无法获得反事实分布（第三层）的数据。最近的研究表明，可以通过实验方法直接估计某些反事实分布（反事实可实现性），这引发了一个问题：在这种新的访问方式下，哪些额外的反事实量可以被识别？
AI.method: 开发了CTFIDU+算法，用于从任意一组第三层（反事实）分布中识别反事实查询，并证明了其完备性。在此基础上，建立了从物理可实现的分布中可识别反事实的理论极限。此外，对于无法识别的关键类型反事实，推导了使用可实现的反事实数据来界定这些数量的新解析界限。
AI.result: CTFIDU+算法被证明对于从任意可实现的第三层分布中识别反事实查询是完备的。研究确定了从物理可实现的分布中可识别反事实的理论极限，这代表了非参数设置下精确因果推理的根本极限。对于某些不可识别的反事实量，论文推导出了新的解析界限，并通过模拟验证了反事实数据在实践中确实能帮助收紧这些界限。
AI.conclusion: 通过CTFIDU+算法和理论分析，本文扩展了反事实识别的能力，并确定了从可实现的第三层数据中进行精确因果推理的根本限制。同时，研究提供了处理不可识别反事实量的新方法，即利用可实现的反事实数据推导解析界限。

title: Neural Luenberger state observer for nonautonomous nonlinear systems
summary: This work proposes a method for model-free synthesis of a state observer for nonlinear systems with manipulated inputs, where the observer is trained offline using a historical or simulation dataset of state measurements. We use the structure of the Kazantzis-Kravaris/Luenberger (KKL) observer, extended to nonautonomous systems by adding an additional input-affine term to the linear time-invariant (LTI) observer-state dynamics, which determines a nonlinear injective mapping of the true states. Both this input-affine term and the nonlinear mapping from the observer states to the system states are learned from data using fully connected feedforward multi-layer perceptron neural networks. Furthermore, we theoretically prove that trained neural networks, when given new input-output data, can be used to observe the states with a guaranteed error bound. To validate the proposed observer synthesis method, case studies are performed on a bioreactor and a Williams-Otto reactor.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于非线性系统（含控制输入）的模型无关状态观测器合成方法，该观测器通过历史或仿真数据集离线训练。利用扩展的Kazantzis-Kravaris/Luenberger (KKL) 观测器结构，通过增加一个输入仿射项来处理非自治系统，并使用全连接前馈多层感知器（MLP）神经网络从数据中学习输入仿射项和从观测器状态到系统状态的非线性映射。理论上证明了该方法具有误差界限保证，并在生物反应器和Williams-Otto反应器上进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 开发一种适用于非线性系统（带控制输入）的状态观测器，且无需精确的模型，能够从历史或仿真数据中学习观测器参数，并提供理论上的误差界限保证。
AI.method:
1. 采用扩展的KKL观测器结构，添加输入仿射项处理非自治系统。
2. 使用全连接前馈MLP神经网络学习输入仿射项和状态映射。
3. 理论推导了观测误差的界限。
AI.result: 成功训练出能够从数据中学习状态观测器参数的方法，并在理论上证明了观测误差的上界。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的模型无关状态观测器合成方法，基于神经网络从数据中学习，能够有效地估计非线性系统的状态，并提供理论上的误差保证，在实际反应器模型上得到了验证。

title: Truncated Step-Level Sampling with Process Rewards for Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning
summary: Training large language models to reason with search engines via reinforcement learning is hindered by a fundamental credit assignment problem: existing methods such as Search-R1 provide only a sparse outcome reward after an entire multi-step trajectory, making it infeasible to attribute success or failure to individual reasoning and retrieval decisions. Process-reward methods like StepSearch alleviate this by introducing step-level supervision, but rely on heuristic rewards such as TF-IDF overlap with gold documents, and still sample k complete trajectories per example, retaining high gradient variance. We propose SLATE, a framework built on two complementary ideas: (1) truncated step-level sampling, which generates k trajectories that share a common prefix and differ only at the next step, and (2) dense LLM-as-judge rewards, which replace heuristic scoring with a capable LLM evaluator that assesses the quality of each reasoning step, search query, and answer, providing richer and more reliable supervision. We theoretically prove that under the same dense reward structure, truncated sampling reduces the variance of advantage estimates by up to a factor of T compared to full-trajectory sampling for T-step trajectories, yielding lower-variance, better-targeted policy gradients. Experiments on seven QA benchmarks confirm that SLATE consistently outperforms both sparse-reward and process-reward baselines, with the largest gains on harder multi-hop tasks and smaller models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SLATE的框架，通过截断的步长采样和LLM作为裁判的密集奖励机制，解决了语言模型通过搜索引擎进行推理时稀疏奖励带来的信用分配问题，并在多项问答任务上取得了优于现有方法的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的通过强化学习训练语言模型利用搜索引擎进行推理的方法存在信用分配问题，即稀疏的奖励信号难以将成功或失败归因于具体的推理和检索决策。现有的过程奖励方法依赖启发式奖励，且梯度方差仍然较高。
AI.method: SLATE框架包含两个核心部分：1. 截断步长采样（truncated step-level sampling），生成共享前缀但仅在下一步不同的多个轨迹。2. LLM作为裁判的密集奖励（dense LLM-as-judge rewards），使用一个强大的LLM来评估每个推理步骤、搜索查询和答案的质量，提供比启发式奖励更丰富和可靠的监督。理论上证明了截断采样能显著降低梯度方差。
AI.result: 在七个问答基准测试中，SLATE相比稀疏奖励和过程奖励基线方法均取得了显著的性能提升，尤其是在更困难的多跳任务和较小的模型上效果更佳。
AI.conclusion: SLATE框架通过截断步长采样和LLM作为裁判的密集奖励，有效地解决了语言模型利用搜索引擎进行推理时的信用分配问题，提供了更低方差、更精准的策略梯度，并带来了性能上的显著提升。

title: Unsupervised Causal Prototypical Networks for De-biased Interpretable Dermoscopy Diagnosis
summary: Despite the success of deep learning in dermoscopy image analysis, its inherent black-box nature hinders clinical trust, motivating the use of prototypical networks for case-based visual transparency. However, inevitable selection bias in clinical data often drives these models toward shortcut learning, where environmental confounders are erroneously encoded as predictive prototypes, generating spurious visual evidence that misleads medical decision-making. To mitigate these confounding effects, we propose CausalProto, an Unsupervised Causal Prototypical Network that fundamentally purifies the visual evidence chain. Framed within a Structural Causal Model, we employ an Information Bottleneck-constrained encoder to enforce strict unsupervised orthogonal disentanglement between pathological features and environmental confounders. By mapping these decoupled representations into independent prototypical spaces, we leverage the learned spurious dictionary to perform backdoor adjustment via do-calculus, transforming complex causal interventions into efficient expectation pooling to marginalize environmental noise. Extensive experiments on multiple dermoscopy datasets demonstrate that CausalProto achieves superior diagnostic performance and consistently outperforms standard black box models, while simultaneously providing transparent and high purity visual interpretability without suffering from the traditional accuracy compromise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 CausalProto 的无监督因果原型网络，用于解决深度学习在皮肤镜图像分析中“黑箱”问题以及因数据选择偏差导致的“捷径学习”问题，通过解耦病理特征和环境混淆因素，实现更准确、更透明的诊断。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在皮肤镜图像分析中虽然成功，但其“黑箱”特性降低了临床信任度。同时，临床数据的选择偏差会导致模型学习到错误的关联（捷径学习），将环境因素误编码为预测原型，生成误导性的视觉证据。
AI.method: 提出 CausalProto，一个无监督因果原型网络。在结构因果模型框架下，利用信息瓶颈约束的编码器实现病理特征和环境混淆因素的正交解耦。将解耦后的表示映射到独立的原型空间，利用学习到的混淆字典进行反向门调整（do-calculus），将复杂的因果干预转化为期望池化，以消除环境噪声。
AI.result: CausalProto 在多个皮肤镜数据集上取得了优于标准黑箱模型的诊断性能，同时提供了透明且高纯度的视觉可解释性，且没有传统模型准确率下降的问题。
AI.conclusion: CausalProto 能够有效净化视觉证据链，解决因数据选择偏差引起的“捷径学习”问题，在提高诊断准确性的同时，实现了无损的透明度，有望增强临床对深度学习模型的信任。

authors: Udaya S. K. P. Miriya Thanthrige
title: VideoPulse: Neonatal heart rate and peripheral capillary oxygen saturation (SpO2) estimation from contact free video
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Preprint. Intended for submission to an IEEE Journal
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables contact free monitoring of vital signs and is especially valuable for neonates, since conventional methods often require sustained skin contact with adhesive probes that can irritate fragile skin and increase infection control burden. We present VideoPulse, a neonatal dataset and an end to end pipeline that estimates neonatal heart rate and peripheral capillary oxygen saturation (SpO2) from facial video. VideoPulse contains 157 recordings totaling 2.6 hours from 52 neonates with diverse face orientations. Our pipeline performs face alignment and artifact aware supervision using denoised pulse oximeter signals, then applies 3D CNN backbones for heart rate and SpO2 regression with label distribution smoothing and weighted regression for SpO2. Predictions are produced in 2 second windows. On the NBHR neonatal dataset, we obtain heart rate MAE 2.97 bpm using 2 second windows (2.80 bpm at 6 second windows) and SpO2 MAE 1.69 percent. Under cross dataset evaluation, the NBHR trained heart rate model attains 5.34 bpm MAE on VideoPulse, and fine tuning an NBHR pretrained SpO2 model on VideoPulse yields MAE 1.68 percent. These results indicate that short unaligned neonatal video segments can support accurate heart rate and SpO2 estimation, enabling low cost non invasive monitoring in neonatal intensive care.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VideoPulse的数据集和端到端流水线，用于从新生儿面部视频中无接触地估计心率和血氧饱和度(SpO2)，并在现有数据集上取得了良好效果。
AI.motivation: 传统的新生儿监测方法需要皮肤接触，可能导致皮肤刺激和感染风险。因此，研究者希望开发一种无需接触的新生儿生命体征监测技术。
AI.method: 研究者提出了VideoPulse数据集，包含157个新生儿视频。流水线包括面部对齐、基于去噪脉搏血氧信号的伪影感知监督，以及使用3D CNN进行心率和SpO2回归，并采用了标签分布平滑和加权回归等技术。预测窗口为2秒。
AI.result: 在NBHR数据集上，心率MAE为2.97 bpm（2秒窗口）/2.80 bpm（6秒窗口），SpO2 MAE为1.69%。在VideoPulse数据集上进行交叉评估时，心率MAE为5.34 bpm，SpO2 MAE为1.68%。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，即使是短时间、未对齐的新生儿视频片段，也能支持准确的心率和SpO2估计，为新生儿重症监护提供了一种低成本、无创的监测方法。

title: All in One: Unifying Deepfake Detection, Tampering Localization, and Source Tracing with a Robust Landmark-Identity Watermark
summary: With the rapid advancement of deepfake technology, malicious face manipulations pose a significant threat to personal privacy and social security. However, existing proactive forensics methods typically treat deepfake detection, tampering localization, and source tracing as independent tasks, lacking a unified framework to address them jointly. To bridge this gap, we propose a unified proactive forensics framework that jointly addresses these three core tasks. Our core framework adopts an innovative 152-dimensional landmark-identity watermark termed LIDMark, which structurally interweaves facial landmarks with a unique source identifier. To robustly extract the LIDMark, we design a novel Factorized-Head Decoder (FHD). Its architecture factorizes the shared backbone features into two specialized heads (i.e., regression and classification), robustly reconstructing the embedded landmarks and identifier, respectively, even when subjected to severe distortion or tampering. This design realizes an "all-in-one" trifunctional forensic solution: the regression head underlies an "intrinsic-extrinsic" consistency check for detection and localization, while the classification head robustly decodes the source identifier for tracing. Extensive experiments show that the proposed LIDMark framework provides a unified, robust, and imperceptible solution for the detection, localization, and tracing of deepfake content. The code is available at https://github.com/vpsg-research/LIDMark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LIDMark的统一主动取证框架，该框架通过将面部地标与源标识符相结合，实现了深度伪造内容的检测、篡改定位和来源追踪。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度伪造取证方法将检测、定位和溯源视为独立任务，缺乏一个统一的框架来协同解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为LIDMark的152维地标-身份水印，将面部地标与源标识符结构性地交织在一起。设计了一个新的Factorized-Head Decoder (FHD)来鲁棒地提取LIDMark，该解码器将共享骨干特征分解为用于地标回归和标识符分类的两个专用头。
AI.result: LIDMark框架实现了“一体化”三功能取证解决方案：回归头用于检测和定位的“内外部”一致性检查，分类头用于溯源的源标识符解码。实验表明，该框架在深度伪造内容的检测、定位和溯源方面提供了统一、鲁棒且不易察觉的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: LIDMark框架成功地填补了现有方法的空白，提供了一个能够联合解决深度伪造检测、定位和溯源问题的统一、鲁棒且不可感知的主动取证方法。

title: FaultXformer: A Transformer-Encoder Based Fault Classification and Location Identification model in PMU-Integrated Active Electrical Distribution System
summary: Accurate fault detection and localization in electrical distribution systems is crucial, especially with the increasing integration of distributed energy resources (DERs), which inject greater variability and complexity into grid operations. In this study, FaultXformer is proposed, a Transformer encoder-based architecture developed for automatic fault analysis using real-time current data obtained from phasor measurement unit (PMU). The approach utilizes time-series current data to initially extract rich temporal information in stage 1, which is crucial for identifying the fault type and precisely determining its location across multiple nodes. In Stage 2, these extracted features are processed to differentiate among distinct fault types and identify the respective fault location within the distribution system. Thus, this dual-stage transformer encoder pipeline enables high-fidelity representation learning, considerably boosting the performance of the work. The model was validated on a dataset generated from the IEEE 13-node test feeder, simulated with 20 separate fault locations and several DER integration scenarios, utilizing current measurements from four strategically located PMUs. To demonstrate robust performance evaluation, stratified 10-fold cross-validation is performed. FaultXformer achieved average accuracies of 98.76% in fault type classification and 98.92% in fault location identification across cross-validation, consistently surpassing conventional deep learning baselines convolutional neural network (CNN), recurrent neural network (RNN). long short-term memory (LSTM) by 1.70%, 34.95%, and 2.04% in classification accuracy and by 10.82%, 40.89%, and 6.27% in location accuracy, respectively. These results demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed model with significant DER penetration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FaultXformer的基于Transformer编码器的模型，利用PMU实时电流数据，通过两阶段处理，在含分布式能源的电网中实现了高精度的故障类型分类和故障定位。
AI.motivation: 随着分布式能源（DER）的增加，电网的复杂性和不确定性增加，需要更准确的故障检测和定位方法。
AI.method: 提出FaultXformer模型，该模型采用Transformer编码器架构，分为两个阶段：第一阶段提取时域信息，第二阶段利用提取的特征区分故障类型和定位故障。模型使用PMU的实时电流数据，并在IEEE 13节点测试馈线数据集上进行了验证。
AI.result: FaultXformer在故障类型分类上实现了98.76%的平均准确率，在故障定位上实现了98.92%的平均准确率，显著优于CNN、RNN和LSTM等传统深度学习模型，尤其是在DER渗透率较高的情况下。
AI.conclusion: FaultXformer模型能够有效地处理含DER的电网中的故障，其高精度的故障类型分类和定位能力证明了其在电网运行中的实用价值。

title: Planning under Distribution Shifts with Causal POMDPs
comment: To appear at the 36th International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling (ICAPS-26)
summary: In the real world, planning is often challenged by distribution shifts. As such, a model of the environment obtained under one set of conditions may no longer remain valid as the distribution of states or the environment dynamics change, which in turn causes previously learned strategies to fail. In this work, we propose a theoretical framework for planning under partial observability using Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) formulated using causal knowledge. By representing shifts in the environment as interventions on this causal POMDP, the framework enables evaluating plans under hypothesized changes and actively identifying which components of the environment have been altered. We show how to maintain and update a belief over both the latent state and the underlying domain, and we prove that the value function remains piecewise linear and convex (PWLC) in this augmented belief space. Preservation of PWLC under distribution shifts has the advantage of maintaining the tractability of planning via $α$-vector-based POMDP methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于因果知识的POMDP框架，将环境变化视为干预，从而能在分布变化下评估和识别环境改变的部分，并保持规划的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的规划常面临分布变化（环境或动力学改变）导致策略失效的问题。
AI.method: 利用因果知识构建POMDP，将环境变化建模为对因果POMDP的干预。提出维护和更新隐态和领域（domain）的联合信念的方法，并证明价值函数在增广信念空间中保持分段线性凸（PWLC）。
AI.result: 展示了如何在分布变化下评估规划，主动识别环境改变的组件，并保持价值函数的PWLC性质。
AI.conclusion: 该因果POMDP框架能够有效地处理分布变化，保持规划的可行性（通过α-vector方法），并能在变化环境下进行鲁棒规划。

title: Refining Almost-Safe Value Functions on the Fly
summary: Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) are a powerful tool for ensuring robotic safety, but designing or learning valid CBFs for complex systems is a significant challenge. While Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability provides a formal method for synthesizing safe value functions, it scales poorly and is typically performed offline, limiting its applicability in dynamic environments. This paper bridges the gap between offline synthesis and online adaptation. We introduce refineCBF for refining an approximate CBF - whether analytically derived, learned, or even unsafe - via warm-started HJ reachability. We then present its computationally efficient successor, HJ-Patch, which accelerates this process through localized updates. Both methods guarantee the recovery of a safe value function and can ensure monotonic safety improvements during adaptation. Our experiments validate our framework's primary contribution: in-the-loop, real-time adaptation, in simulation (with detailed value function analysis) and on physical hardware. Our experiments on ground vehicles and quadcopters show that our framework can successfully adapt to sudden environmental changes, such as new obstacles and unmodeled wind disturbances, providing a practical path toward deploying formally guaranteed safety in real-world settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 refineCBF 的方法，用于通过热启动的 HJ 可达性来优化近似或不安全的控制障碍函数 (CBF)。在此基础上，又提出了计算效率更高的 HJ-Patch，通过局部更新加速该过程。这两种方法都能在实时适应复杂系统和动态环境时，确保安全并实现单调的安全改进。
AI.motivation: 现有的控制障碍函数 (CBF) 在设计和学习复杂系统时面临挑战，而 Hamilton-Jacobi (HJ) 可达性虽然提供了形式化的安全合成方法，但计算成本高且通常离线进行，不适用于动态环境。因此，研究需要在离线合成和在线适应之间建立桥梁，以实现实时安全保证。
AI.method: 本文提出了 refineCBF 方法，利用热启动的 HJ 可达性来优化近似或不安全的 CBF。在此基础上，又提出了 HJ-Patch，通过局部更新来加速该过程，提高了计算效率。这两种方法都保证能够恢复一个安全的价值函数，并能在适应过程中实现安全性的单调改进。
AI.result: 通过在仿真和物理硬件上的实验验证，本文提出的框架能够实现“闭环”、“实时”的适应性。实验结果表明，该框架能够成功适应突发环境变化，例如新的障碍物和未建模的风干扰，并在地面车辆和四旋翼飞行器等任务中取得了成功。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的 refineCBF 和 HJ-Patch 方法为在动态和复杂环境中实现形式化保证的安全控制提供了一条实际可行的路径，使得在真实世界应用中部署安全控制成为可能。

title: Curriculum-Based Soft Actor-Critic for Multi-Section R2R Tension Control
summary: Precise tension control in roll-to-roll (R2R) manufacturing is difficult under varying operating conditions and process uncertainty. This paper presents a curriculum-based Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) controller for multi-section R2R tension control. The policy is trained in three phases with progressively wider reference ranges, from 27 to 33 N to the full operating envelope of 20 to 40 N, so it can generalize across nominal and disturbed conditions. On a three-section R2R benchmark, the learned controller achieves accurate tracking in nominal operation and handles large disturbances, including 20 N to 40 N step changes, with a single policy and no scenario-specific retuning. These results indicate that curriculum-trained SAC is a practical alternative to model-based control when system parameters vary and process uncertainty is significant.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于课程学习的软Actor-Critic (SAC) 控制器，用于解决卷对卷（R2R）制造中多段张力控制的难题，该控制器能够应对变化的工况和过程不确定性，并在模拟实验中表现出优异的跟踪精度和抗干扰能力。
AI.motivation: 卷对卷（R2R）制造过程中，在变化的工况和过程不确定性下实现精确的张力控制是一个挑战。
AI.method: 采用基于课程学习的Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) 算法，通过三个阶段（参考范围逐渐扩大）对控制器进行训练，以提高其泛化能力，并将其应用于一个三段R2R基准测试。
AI.result: 所学习的控制器在标称运行下实现了精确跟踪，并能有效处理20 N至40 N的大幅度阶跃扰动，且无需针对特定场景进行重新调优。
AI.conclusion: 基于课程学习的SAC控制器是参数变化和过程不确定性显著的R2R制造中，一种可行的替代模型预测控制的方案。

title: CiteAudit: You Cited It, But Did You Read It? A Benchmark for Verifying Scientific References in the LLM Era
summary: Scientific research relies on accurate citation for attribution and integrity, yet large language models (LLMs) introduce a new risk: fabricated references that appear plausible but correspond to no real publications. Such hallucinated citations have already been observed in submissions and accepted papers at major machine learning venues, exposing vulnerabilities in peer review. Meanwhile, rapidly growing reference lists make manual verification impractical, and existing automated tools remain fragile to noisy and heterogeneous citation formats and lack standardized evaluation. We present the first comprehensive benchmark and detection framework for hallucinated citations in scientific writing. Our multi-agent verification pipeline decomposes citation checking into claim extraction, evidence retrieval, passage matching, reasoning, and calibrated judgment to assess whether a cited source truly supports its claim. We construct a large-scale human-validated dataset across domains and define unified metrics for citation faithfulness and evidence alignment. Experiments with state-of-the-art LLMs reveal substantial citation errors and show that our framework significantly outperforms prior methods in both accuracy and interpretability. This work provides the first scalable infrastructure for auditing citations in the LLM era and practical tools to improve the trustworthiness of scientific references.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个用于检测学术论文中由大型语言模型（LLMs）产生的虚假引文的基准和检测框架。该框架通过多代理验证流程，将引文检查分解为多个步骤，并构建了一个大规模的人工验证数据集，显著提高了检测准确性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）可能产生看似真实但实际不存在的虚假引文，这威胁到学术研究的准确性和完整性，并暴露了同行评审的漏洞。由于引用列表的快速增长，手动验证变得不切实际，现有自动化工具也存在局限性。
AI.method: 研究人员提出了一个多代理验证流程，将引文检查分解为：1. 声明提取，2. 证据检索，3. 文章匹配，4. 推理，5. 校准判断。他们还构建了一个跨领域的大规模人工验证数据集，并定义了统一的指标来评估引文的忠实度和证据的对齐性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，当前最先进的LLMs存在大量的引文错误。研究提出的框架在准确性和可解释性方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了第一个用于审计LLM时代学术引文的可扩展基础设施，并提供了提高科学引文可信度的实用工具。

title: TaCarla: A comprehensive benchmarking dataset for end-to-end autonomous driving
summary: Collecting a high-quality dataset is a critical task that demands meticulous attention to detail, as overlooking certain aspects can render the entire dataset unusable. Autonomous driving challenges remain a prominent area of research, requiring further exploration to enhance the perception and planning performance of vehicles. However, existing datasets are often incomplete. For instance, datasets that include perception information generally lack planning data, while planning datasets typically consist of extensive driving sequences where the ego vehicle predominantly drives forward, offering limited behavioral diversity. In addition, many real datasets struggle to evaluate their models, especially for planning tasks, since they lack a proper closed-loop evaluation setup. The CARLA Leaderboard 2.0 challenge, which provides a diverse set of scenarios to address the long-tail problem in autonomous driving, has emerged as a valuable alternative platform for developing perception and planning models in both open-loop and closed-loop evaluation setups. Nevertheless, existing datasets collected on this platform present certain limitations. Some datasets appear to be tailored primarily for limited sensor configuration, with particular sensor configurations. To support end-to-end autonomous driving research, we have collected a new dataset comprising over 2.85 million frames using the CARLA simulation environment for the diverse Leaderboard 2.0 challenge scenarios. Our dataset is designed not only for planning tasks but also supports dynamic object detection, lane divider detection, centerline detection, traffic light recognition, prediction tasks and visual language action models . Furthermore, we demonstrate its versatility by training various models using our dataset. Moreover, we also provide numerical rarity scores to understand how rarely the current state occurs in the dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为 CARLA Leaderboard 2.0 的新数据集，包含超过 285 万帧图像，旨在解决现有自动驾驶数据集在感知和规划数据不完整、行为多样性不足以及缺乏闭环评估等方面的局限性。该数据集支持多种任务，并提供了稀有度评分以帮助研究。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集在感知和规划数据方面不完整，缺乏行为多样性，且难以进行闭环评估，阻碍了端到端自动驾驶研究的进展。
AI.method: 使用 CARLA 模拟环境，针对 CARLA Leaderboard 2.0 的多样化场景，收集了包含超过 285 万帧图像的新数据集。该数据集支持多种感知和规划任务，并提供了数值稀有度评分。
AI.result: 成功收集了一个大规模、多样化的自动驾驶数据集，能够支持多种任务（包括感知、规划、预测和视觉语言模型）。通过使用该数据集训练模型，证明了其有效性。提供了稀有度评分，有助于理解数据集的分布。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集为端到端自动驾驶研究提供了一个全面的解决方案，弥补了现有数据集的不足，并为评估和发展更鲁棒的自动驾驶系统提供了支持。

title: Breaking the Data Barrier: Robust Few-Shot 3D Vessel Segmentation using Foundation Models
summary: State-of-the-art vessel segmentation methods typically require large-scale annotated datasets and suffer from severe performance degradation under domain shifts. In clinical practice, however, acquiring extensive annotations for every new scanner or protocol is unfeasible. To address this, we propose a novel framework leveraging a pre-trained Vision Foundation Model (DINOv3) adapted for volumetric vessel segmentation. We introduce a lightweight 3D Adapter for volumetric consistency, a multi-scale 3D Aggregator for hierarchical feature fusion, and Z-channel embedding to effectively bridge the gap between 2D pre-training and 3D medical modalities, enabling the model to capture continuous vascular structures from limited data. We validated our method on the TopCoW (in-domain) and Lausanne (out-of-distribution) datasets. In the extreme few-shot regime with 5 training samples, our method achieved a Dice score of 43.42%, marking a 30% relative improvement over the state-of-the-art nnU-Net (33.41%) and outperforming other Transformer-based baselines, such as SwinUNETR and UNETR, by up to 45%. Furthermore, in the out-of-distribution setting, our model demonstrated superior robustness, achieving a 50% relative improvement over nnU-Net (21.37% vs. 14.22%), which suffered from severe domain overfitting. Ablation studies confirmed that our 3D adaptation mechanism and multi-scale aggregation strategy are critical for vascular continuity and robustness. Our results suggest foundation models offer a viable cold-start solution, improving clinical reliability under data scarcity or domain shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用预训练的DINOv3 Vision Foundation Model进行三维血管分割的新框架，通过轻量级3D Adapter、多尺度3D Aggregator和Z-channel embedding，在数据量极少（5个样本）和跨领域（out-of-distribution）的设置下，显著优于现有最先进方法，证明了Foundation Model在数据稀缺或领域漂移下的临床可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有的血管分割方法需要大量标注数据，且在面对不同扫描仪或协议时性能下降严重，而临床实践中难以在每个新场景下都获得大量标注数据。
AI.method: 提出一个新框架，利用预训练的DINOv3 Vision Foundation Model，并引入了轻量级3D Adapter（保证体积一致性）、多尺度3D Aggregator（实现层次化特征融合）以及Z-channel embedding（连接2D预训练与3D医学影像），以利用有限数据捕捉连续血管结构。
AI.result: 在TopCoW（in-domain）和Lausanne（out-of-distribution）数据集上进行了验证。在极端少样本（5个训练样本）设置下，Dice得分达到43.42%，比最先进的nnU-Net（33.41%）提高了30%，并优于SwinUNETR和UNETR等Transformer模型。在跨领域设置下，模型也表现出更强的鲁棒性，相对nnU-Net（14.22%）提高了50%。消融实验证明了3D适应机制和多尺度聚合策略对于血管连续性和鲁棒性至关重要。
AI.conclusion: Foundation Model可以作为一种有效的冷启动解决方案，在数据稀缺或领域漂移的情况下提高临床诊断的可靠性。

title: Construct, Merge, Solve & Adapt with Reinforcement Learning for the min-max Multiple Traveling Salesman Problem
summary: The Multiple Traveling Salesman Problem (mTSP) extends the Traveling Salesman Problem to m tours that start and end at a common depot and jointly visit all customers exactly once. In the min-max variant, the objective is to minimize the longest tour, reflecting workload balance. We propose a hybrid approach, Construct, Merge, Solve & Adapt with Reinforcement Learning (RL-CMSA), for the symmetric single-depot min-max mTSP. The method iteratively constructs diverse solutions using probabilistic clustering guided by learned pairwise q-values, merges routes into a compact pool, solves a restricted set-covering MILP, and refines solutions via inter-route remove, shift, and swap moves. The q-values are updated by reinforcing city-pair co-occurrences in high-quality solutions, while the pool is adapted through ageing and pruning. This combination of exact optimization and reinforcement-guided construction balances exploration and exploitation. Computational results on random and TSPLIB instances show that RL-CMSA consistently finds (near-)best solutions and outperforms a state-of-the-art hybrid genetic algorithm under comparable time limits, especially as instance size and the number of salesmen increase.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为RL-CMSA的混合方法，用于解决对称单仓库最小化最长路径的多旅行商问题 (min-max mTSP)，该方法结合了基于强化学习的构建、合并、求解和适应策略，在随机和TSPLIB实例上表现优于先进的混合遗传算法。
AI.motivation: 为了解决多旅行商问题 (mTSP) 中的最小化最长路径变体 (min-max mTSP)，以实现工作负载均衡。
AI.method: 提出RL-CMSA混合方法，该方法包含：1. 使用基于学习到的成对q值的概率聚类来构建多样化解；2. 将路径合并到集合中；3. 求解受限的集合覆盖MILP问题；4. 通过路线间的移除、移动和交换操作进行优化；5. 通过强化高品质解中的城市对共现来更新q值；6. 通过老化和剪枝来适应路径集合。
AI.result: 在随机和TSPLIB实例上，RL-CMSA能够持续找到（接近）最优解，并且在可比的时间限制下，优于最先进的混合遗传算法，尤其是在实例规模和销售商数量增加的情况下。
AI.conclusion: RL-CMSA通过结合精确优化和强化学习指导的构建，有效平衡了探索和利用，为求解对称单仓库min-max mTSP提供了一种高性能的混合方法。

title: Synthetic Visual Genome 2: Extracting Large-scale Spatio-Temporal Scene Graphs from Videos
summary: We introduce Synthetic Visual Genome 2 (SVG2), a large-scale panoptic video scene graph dataset. SVG2 contains over 636K videos with 6.6M objects, 52.0M attributes, and 6.7M relations, providing an order-of-magnitude increase in scale and diversity over prior spatio-temporal scene graph datasets. To create SVG2, we design a fully automated pipeline that combines multi-scale panoptic segmentation, online-offline trajectory tracking with automatic new-object discovery, per-trajectory semantic parsing, and GPT-5-based spatio-temporal relation inference. Building on this resource, we train TRaSER, a video scene graph generation model. TRaSER augments VLMs with a trajectory-aligned token arrangement mechanism and new modules: an object-trajectory resampler and a temporal-window resampler to convert raw videos and panoptic trajectories into compact spatio-temporal scene graphs in a single forward pass. The temporal-window resampler binds visual tokens to short trajectory segments to preserve local motion and temporal semantics, while the object-trajectory resampler aggregates entire trajectories to maintain global context for objects. On the PVSG, VIPSeg, VidOR and SVG2 test datasets, TRaSER improves relation detection by +15 to 20%, object prediction by +30 to 40% over the strongest open-source baselines and by +13% over GPT-5, and attribute prediction by +15%. When TRaSER's generated scene graphs are sent to a VLM for video question answering, it delivers a +1.5 to 4.6% absolute accuracy gain over using video only or video augmented with Qwen2.5-VL's generated scene graphs, demonstrating the utility of explicit spatio-temporal scene graphs as an intermediate representation.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SVG2，一个大规模全景视频场景图数据集，规模比以往同类数据集大一个数量级，并训练了一个名为TRaSER的模型，用于生成紧凑的时空场景图，该模型在多个基准测试中显著提高了关系、物体和属性的预测准确性，并最终通过作为中间表示提升了视频问答的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的时空场景图数据集规模和多样性不足，无法满足模型训练需求，同时现有模型在生成场景图方面存在性能瓶颈。研究者希望构建一个更大规模的数据集并提出一个更有效的模型来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 研究者构建了Synthetic Visual Genome 2 (SVG2) 数据集，其中结合了多尺度全景分割、自动轨迹跟踪、语义解析和基于GPT-5的时空关系推理。在此基础上，他们训练了一个名为TRaSER的模型，该模型通过轨迹对齐的token排列机制、对象-轨迹重采样器和时间窗口重采样器，将原始视频和全景轨迹转换为紧凑的时空场景图。
AI.result: TRaSER在关系检测方面提高了15%到20%，物体预测提高了30%到40%，属性预测提高了15%。当TRaSER生成的场景图用于视频问答时，相比仅使用视频或使用Qwen2.5-VL生成的场景图，准确率提升了1.5%到4.6%。
AI.conclusion: SVG2数据集为时空场景图研究提供了大规模资源。TRaSER模型能够有效地从视频中生成高质量的时空场景图，并且显式的时空场景图作为中间表示，能够显著提升视频问答的性能。

title: FHIRPath-QA: Executable Question Answering over FHIR Electronic Health Records
summary: Though patients are increasingly granted digital access to their electronic health records (EHRs), existing interfaces may not support precise, trustworthy answers to patient-specific questions. Large language models (LLM) show promise in clinical question answering (QA), but retrieval-based approaches are computationally inefficient, prone to hallucination, and difficult to deploy over real-life EHRs. In this work, we introduce FHIRPath-QA, the first open dataset and benchmark for patient-specific QA that includes open-standard FHIRPath queries over real-world clinical data. We propose a text-to-FHIRPath QA paradigm that shifts reasoning from free-text generation to FHIRPath query synthesis, significantly reducing LLM usage. Built on MIMIC-IV on FHIR Demo, the dataset pairs over 14k natural language questions in patient and clinician phrasing with validated FHIRPath queries and answers. Further, we demonstrate that state-of-the-art LLMs struggle to deal with ambiguity in patient language and perform poorly in FHIRPath query synthesis. However, they benefit strongly from supervised fine-tuning. Our results highlight that text-to-FHIRPath synthesis has the potential to serve as a practical foundation for safe, efficient, and interoperable consumer health applications, and our dataset and benchmark serve as a starting point for future research on the topic. The full dataset and generation code is available at: https://github.com/mooshifrew/fhirpath-qa.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了FHIRPath-QA，一个用于患者特定医疗问答的开放数据集和基准，使用FHIRPath查询而非自由文本生成，以提高效率和可信度，并发现现有LLM在直接合成FHIRPath查询方面存在困难，但可以通过微调得到显著改善。
AI.motivation: 现有的电子健康记录（EHR）接口难以提供患者特定问题的精确、可信赖的答案。大型语言模型（LLM）在临床问答方面有潜力，但基于检索的方法效率低下、容易产生幻觉且难以在真实EHR上部署。
AI.method: 提出了一种文本到FHIRPath的问答范式，将推理从自由文本生成转移到FHIRPath查询合成。构建了一个包含超过14000个自然语言问题及其对应的FHIRPath查询和答案的数据集，该数据集基于MIMIC-IV on FHIR Demo。
AI.result: 研究表明，最先进的LLM在处理患者语言中的歧义和合成FHIRPath查询方面表现不佳，但通过监督微调可以获得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 文本到FHIRPath的合成有可能成为安全、高效、可互操作的消费者健康应用的基础，而所提出的数据集和基准为该领域的未来研究奠定了基础。

title: V-MORALS: Visual Morse Graph-Aided Estimation of Regions of Attraction in a Learned Latent Space
summary: Reachability analysis has become increasingly important in robotics to distinguish safe from unsafe states. Unfortunately, existing reachability and safety analysis methods often fall short, as they typically require known system dynamics or large datasets to estimate accurate system models, are computationally expensive, and assume full state information. A recent method, called MORALS, aims to address these shortcomings by using topological tools to estimate3DR-eEgnciodnesr of Attraction (ROA) in a low-dimensional latent space. However, MORALS still relies on full state knowledge and has not been studied when only sensor measurements are available. This paper presents Visual Morse Graph-Aided Estimation of Regions of Attraction in a Learned Latent Space (V- MORALS). V-MORALS takes in a dataset of image-based trajectories of a system under a given controller, and learns a latent space for reachability analysis. Using this learned latent space, our method is able to generate well-defined Morse Graphs, from which we can compute ROAs for various systems and controllers. V-MORALS provides capabilities similar to the original MORALS architecture without relying on state knowledge, and using only high-level sensor data. Our project website is at: https://v-morals.onrender.com.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为V-MORALS的新方法，该方法利用图像轨迹数据在学习到的低维潜在空间中估计系统的吸引区域（ROA），无需模型或状态信息，克服了现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有的可达性分析方法在机器人领域至关重要，但存在依赖已知系统动力学或大量数据、计算成本高昂以及需要完整状态信息等不足。MORALS方法试图通过拓扑工具解决这些问题，但仍需要完整状态知识，且在仅有传感器测量的情况下未被研究。
AI.method: V-MORALS接收基于图像的系统轨迹数据集，学习一个用于可达性分析的潜在空间。然后，在该潜在空间中生成Morse图，并从中计算ROA。该方法不依赖于状态知识，仅使用高层传感器数据。
AI.result: V-MORALS能够在不依赖状态知识且仅使用传感器数据的情况下，实现与MORALS类似的能力，生成Morse图并计算ROA。
AI.conclusion: V-MORALS是一种新颖的方法，通过在学习到的潜在空间中使用图像数据来估计ROA，为机器人安全分析提供了一种更实用、更通用的解决方案，特别是在难以获得完整状态信息的情况下。

title: LE-NeuS: Latency-Efficient Neuro-Symbolic Video Understanding via Adaptive Temporal Verification
summary: Neuro-symbolic approaches to long-form video question answering (LVQA) have demonstrated significant accuracy improvements by grounding temporal reasoning in formal verification. However, existing methods incur prohibitive latency overheads, up to 90x slower than base VLM prompting, rendering them impractical for latency-sensitive edge deployments. We present LE-NeuS, a latency-efficient neuro-symbolic framework that preserves the accuracy benefits of temporal logic-guided video understanding while drastically reducing inference latency. Our key insight is that the dominant computational bottleneck arises from sequential and dense proposition detection across video frames during automaton construction. We address this through two principled optimizations: (1) CLIP guided two-stage adaptive sampling that exploits visual redundancy to skip semantically similar frames while preserving temporal boundaries, and (2) batched proposition detection that parallelizes VLM inference across temporal windows. Theoretically, we derive latency bounds as a function of video length, proposition complexity, and sampling density, establishing conditions under which latency efficiency is achievable. Empirically, on LongVideoBench and Video-MME benchmarks deployed on NVIDIA H100 GPUs, LE-NeuS reduces the latency gap from 90x to approximately 10x while maintaining >10% accuracy gains on temporally complex queries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 LE-NeuS 的低延迟神经符号框架，用于长视频问答（LVQA），通过自适应采样和批处理推理来大幅降低延迟，同时保持准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经符号方法在 LVQA 方面虽有准确性优势，但推理延迟过高（比基础 VLM 慢 90 倍），不适用于延迟敏感的边缘部署。
AI.method: LE-NeuS 包含两个主要优化：1. CLIP 引导的两阶段自适应采样，通过跳过语义相似的帧来减少冗余计算；2. 批处理命题检测，并行化 VLM 推理。论文还推导了延迟界限。
AI.result: 与现有方法相比，LE-NeuS 将延迟差距从 90 倍降低到约 10 倍，同时在具有时间复杂性的查询上保持了超过 10% 的准确率提升。该方法在 LongVideoBench 和 Video-MME 基准测试上进行了验证。
AI.conclusion: LE-NeuS 是一种高效的神经符号框架，能够显著降低 LVQA 的推理延迟，同时保留其在时间推理方面的准确性优势，使其在实际应用中更具可行性。

title: FluoCLIP: Stain-Aware Focus Quality Assessment in Fluorescence Microscopy
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2026 (preview), Project Page: https://fluoclip.github.io
summary: Accurate focus quality assessment (FQA) in fluorescence microscopy remains challenging, as the stain-dependent optical properties of fluorescent dyes cause abrupt and heterogeneous focus shifts. However, existing datasets and models overlook this variability, treating focus quality as a stain-agnostic problem. In this work, we formulate the task of stain-aware FQA, emphasizing that focus behavior in fluorescence microscopy must be modeled as a function of staining characteristics. Through quantitative analysis of existing datasets (FocusPath, BBBC006) and our newly curated FluoMix, we demonstrate that focus-rank relationships vary substantially across stains, underscoring the need for stain-aware modeling in fluorescence microscopy. To support this new formulation, we propose FluoMix, the first dataset for stain-aware FQA that encompasses multiple tissues, fluorescent stains, and focus variations. Building on this dataset, we propose FluoCLIP, a two-stage vision-language framework that leverages CLIP's alignment capability to interpret focus quality in the context of biological staining. In the stain-grounding phase, FluoCLIP learns general stain representations by aligning textual stain tokens with visual features, while in the stain-guided ranking phase, it optimizes stain-specific rank prompts for ordinal focus prediction. Together, our formulation, dataset, and framework establish the first foundation for stain-aware FQA, and FluoCLIP achieves strong generalization across diverse fluorescence microscopy conditions.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了“染料感知焦距质量评估”（stain-aware FQA），强调焦距质量与荧光染料特性相关，并发布了首个支持该任务的数据集 FluoMix 和一个名为 FluoCLIP 的新型框架，以解决荧光显微镜图像的焦距质量评估问题。
AI.motivation: 现有焦距质量评估（FQA）方法忽略了荧光显微镜中染料依赖的光学特性导致的焦距变化不均一性，将FQA视为与染料无关的问题。然而，研究发现不同染料的焦距变化关系差异很大，因此需要一种能够感知染料的FQA方法。
AI.method: 1. 提出“染料感知FQA”的理论框架，认为焦距质量是染料特性的函数。 2. 创建了一个名为 FluoMix 的新数据集，包含多种组织、染料和焦距变化。 3. 提出了 FluoCLIP，一个两阶段的视觉-语言框架，利用CLIP的对齐能力来理解染料背景下的焦距质量。第一阶段（染料打底）学习通用的染料表征，第二阶段（染料引导排序）优化特定染料的排序提示以进行序数焦距预测。
AI.result: 通过对现有数据集（FocusPath, BBBC006）和新数据集 FluoMix 的量化分析，证明了不同染料的焦距-排序关系存在显著差异，证实了染料感知建模的必要性。FluoCLIP 在多种荧光显微镜条件下实现了良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过提出染料感知FQA的理论、数据集FluoMix和框架FluoCLIP，为荧光显微镜的焦距质量评估奠定了基础，并证明了考虑染料特性的方法在提高评估准确性和泛化性方面的重要性。

title: SleepLM: Natural-Language Intelligence for Human Sleep
summary: We present SleepLM, a family of sleep-language foundation models that enable human sleep alignment, interpretation, and interaction with natural language. Despite the critical role of sleep, learning-based sleep analysis systems operate in closed label spaces (e.g., predefined stages or events) and fail to describe, query, or generalize to novel sleep phenomena. SleepLM bridges natural language and multimodal polysomnography, enabling language-grounded representations of sleep physiology. To support this alignment, we introduce a multilevel sleep caption generation pipeline that enables the curation of the first large-scale sleep-text dataset, comprising over 100K hours of data from more than 10,000 individuals. Furthermore, we present a unified pretraining objective that combines contrastive alignment, caption generation, and signal reconstruction to better capture physiological fidelity and cross-modal interactions. Extensive experiments on real-world sleep understanding tasks verify that SleepLM outperforms state-of-the-art in zero-shot and few-shot learning, cross-modal retrieval, and sleep captioning. Importantly, SleepLM also exhibits intriguing capabilities including language-guided event localization, targeted insight generation, and zero-shot generalization to unseen tasks. All code and data will be open-sourced.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SleepLM，一个能够理解和生成关于睡眠文本的语言模型，它通过将自然语言与多导睡眠图（PSG）数据相结合，实现了对睡眠的描述、查询和新睡眠现象的泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于学习的睡眠分析系统受限于预定义的标签空间（如睡眠分期），无法描述、查询或泛化到新的睡眠现象，而睡眠在人体健康中起着至关重要的作用。
AI.method: 开发了一个多层次的睡眠文本生成流程，构建了一个大规模（100K+小时，10K+个体）的睡眠-文本数据集。提出了一个统一的预训练目标，结合了对比学习、文本生成和信号重构，以提高生理保真度和跨模态交互能力。
AI.result: 在真实的睡眠理解任务上，SleepLM在零样本/少样本学习、跨模态检索和睡眠文本生成方面均优于现有技术。该模型还展现出语言引导事件定位、定向洞察生成和对未见过任务的零样本泛化等新能力。
AI.conclusion: SleepLM成功地将自然语言与多导睡眠图数据对齐，为睡眠生理学提供了语言基础的表示，并显著提升了睡眠分析的灵活性和智能化水平，有望在睡眠研究和临床应用中发挥重要作用。

title: No Calibration, No Depth, No Problem: Cross-Sensor View Synthesis with 3D Consistency
summary: We present the first study of cross-sensor view synthesis across different modalities. We examine a practical, fundamental, yet widely overlooked problem: getting aligned RGB-X data, where most RGB-X prior work assumes such pairs exist and focuses on modality fusion, but it empirically requires huge engineering effort in calibration. We propose a match-densify-consolidate method. First, we perform RGB-X image matching followed by guided point densification. Using the proposed confidence-aware densification and self-matching filtering, we attain better view synthesis and later consolidate them in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Our method uses no 3D priors for X-sensor and only assumes nearly no-cost COLMAP for RGB. We aim to remove the cumbersome calibration for various RGB-X sensors and advance the popularity of cross-sensor learning by a scalable solution that breaks through the bottleneck in large-scale real-world RGB-X data collection.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种新颖的跨传感器视图合成方法，能够处理不同模态（如 RGB 和深度 X）的数据，无需繁琐的传感器校准。
AI.motivation: 现有的 RGB-X 数据集和研究通常假设数据已对齐，但实际操作中，跨传感器数据的校准需要巨大的工程投入，这是一个被忽视但重要的问题。本研究旨在解决这一痛点，降低跨传感器学习的门槛。
AI.method: 提出了一种“匹配-稠密化-整合”（match-densify-consolidate）的方法。首先，通过 RGB-X 图像匹配进行初步对齐，然后进行引导式点云稠密化，并利用置信度感知稠密化和自匹配过滤来提高视图合成效果。最后，将合成的视图整合到 3D 高斯溅射（3DGS）模型中。该方法不依赖 3D 先验知识，只利用 RGB 相机的 COLMAP 重建。
AI.result: 提出的方法能够实现更好的视图合成效果，并且能够整合到 3DGS 中。通过无需繁琐校准，有望促进大规模真实世界 RGB-X 数据集的收集。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功地开发了一种无需传感器校准的跨传感器视图合成方法，解决了实际应用中的一大障碍，并为跨传感器学习的普及提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: IDP Accelerator: Agentic Document Intelligence from Extraction to Compliance Validation
summary: Understanding and extracting structured insights from unstructured documents remains a foundational challenge in industrial NLP. While Large Language Models (LLMs) enable zero-shot extraction, traditional pipelines often fail to handle multi-document packets, complex reasoning, and strict compliance requirements. We present IDP (Intelligent Document Processing) Accelerator, a framework enabling agentic AI for end-to-end document intelligence with four key components: (1) DocSplit, a novel benchmark dataset and multimodal classifier using BIO tagging to segment complex document packets; (2) configurable Extraction Module leveraging multimodal LLMs to transform unstructured content into structured data; (3) Agentic Analytics Module, compliant with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) providing data access through secure, sandboxed code execution; and (4) Rule Validation Module replacing deterministic engines with LLM-driven logic for complex compliance checks. The interactive demonstration enables users to upload document packets, visualize classification results, and explore extracted data through an intuitive web interface. We demonstrate effectiveness across industries, highlighting a production deployment at a leading healthcare provider achieving 98% classification accuracy, 80% reduced processing latency, and 77% lower operational costs over legacy baselines. IDP Accelerator is open-sourced with a live demonstration available to the community.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 IDP Accelerator 的智能文档处理框架，利用多模态大语言模型和代理式 AI 技术，实现了端到端的文档理解和结构化信息提取，并能在实际生产环境中显著提高效率、降低成本。
AI.motivation: 传统的工业 NLP 管道在处理多文档、复杂推理和合规性要求方面存在不足，而 LLMs 的零样本提取能力有限，因此需要一个更强大的框架来解决这些挑战。
AI.method: IDP Accelerator 包含四个关键组件：(1) DocSplit，用于分割复杂文档包的多模态分类器和数据集；(2) 可配置的提取模块，利用多模态 LLMs 将非结构化内容转换为结构化数据；(3) 符合 MCP 协议的代理式分析模块，通过安全的沙箱代码执行提供数据访问；(4) 规则验证模块，用 LLM 驱动的逻辑替代确定性引擎进行合规性检查。
AI.result: 在一家领先的医疗保健提供商的生产部署中，IDP Accelerator 实现了 98% 的分类准确率，处理延迟降低了 80%，运营成本降低了 77%。
AI.conclusion: IDP Accelerator 是一个强大的端到端文档智能框架，通过代理式 AI 和多模态 LLMs 解决了传统文档处理的痛点，并在实际应用中展现了显著的性能提升和成本效益。

title: Observer-Based Estimation and Hydrostatic Inertia Modeling for Cooperative Transport of Variable-Inertia Loads with Quadrotors
summary:
We address load-parameter estimation in cooperative aerial transport with time-varying mass and inertia, as in fluid-carrying payloads. Using an intrinsic manifold model of the multi-quadrotor-load dynamics, we combine a geometric tracking controller with an observer for parameter identification. We estimate mass from measurable kinematics and commanded forces, and handle variable inertia via an inertia surrogate that reproduces the load's rotational dynamics for control and state propagation.
  Instead of real-time identification of the true inertia tensor, driven by high-dimensional internal fluid motion, we leverage known tank geometry and fluid-mechanical structure to pre-compute inertia tensors and update them through a lookup table indexed by fill level and attitude. The surrogate is justified via the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations in the translating/rotating load frame: when effective forcing is gravity-dominated (i.e., translational/rotational accelerations and especially jerk are limited), the fluid approaches hydrostatic equilibrium and the free surface is well approximated by a plane orthogonal to the body-frame gravity direction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在多旋翼协同空中运输中估计随时间变化的载荷质量和惯性的方法，适用于液体载荷。通过结合几何跟踪控制器和参数辨识观测器，实现了质量和惯性的估计。惯性辨识采用了一种惯性代理模型，该模型通过查找表根据填充水平和姿态更新，并基于不可压缩纳维-斯托克斯方程进行理论推导。
AI.motivation: 解决在空中协同运输过程中，由于载荷（如液体）质量和惯性随时间变化的挑战，尤其是在液体流动时，惯性张量实时辨识困难。
AI.method: 使用多旋翼-载荷动力学的内在流形模型，结合几何跟踪控制器和参数辨识观测器。通过可测量的运动学和指令力来估计质量。通过一个惯性代理模型来处理变化的惯性，该模型通过查找表根据填充水平和姿态更新，以再现载荷的旋转动力学，用于控制和状态传播。理论基础是不可压缩纳维-斯托克斯方程。
AI.result: 能够估计随时间变化的载荷质量。通过惯性代理模型，在重力主导的受力情况下（即加速度和急动度受限时），可以有效地逼近载荷的旋转动力学，并通过查找表根据填充水平和姿态更新惯性张量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效地估计空中运输系统中随时间变化的载荷质量和惯性，特别是在液体载荷的情况下。通过惯性代理模型和查找表的结合，克服了实时辨识高维内部流体运动引起的惯性张量的困难，为精确控制提供了基础。

title: MMKG-RDS: Reasoning Data Synthesis via Deep Mining of Multimodal Knowledge Graphs
summary: Synthesizing high-quality training data is crucial for enhancing domain models' reasoning abilities. Existing methods face limitations in long-tail knowledge coverage, effectiveness verification, and interpretability. Knowledge-graph-based approaches still fall short in functionality, granularity, customizability, and evaluation. To address these issues, we propose MMKG-RDS, a flexible framework for reasoning data synthesis that leverages multimodal knowledge graphs. It supports fine-grained knowledge extraction, customizable path sampling, and multidimensional data quality scoring. We validate MMKG-RDS with the MMKG-RDS-Bench dataset, covering five domains, 17 task types, and 14,950 samples. Experimental results show fine-tuning Qwen3 models (0.6B/8B/32B) on a small number of synthesized samples improves reasoning accuracy by 9.2%.
