The framework also generates distinct data, challenging existing models on tasks involving tables and formulas, useful for complex benchmark construction. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/360AILAB-NLP/MMKG-RDS

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MMKG-RDS的框架，利用多模态知识图谱来合成用于提高领域模型推理能力的训练数据。该框架在数据生成、定制化和质量评估方面有所改进，并通过MMKG-RDS-Bench数据集验证了其有效性，能够显著提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的合成高质量训练数据的方法在长尾知识覆盖、有效性验证和可解释性方面存在局限性。基于知识图谱的方法在功能性、粒度、可定制性和评估方面也有不足。因此，需要一种更灵活、更强大的数据合成框架。
AI.method: 提出MMKG-RDS框架，利用多模态知识图谱，支持细粒度知识提取、可定制化的路径采样和多维度的质量评分。使用MMKG-RDS-Bench数据集进行验证，该数据集涵盖五个领域、17种任务类型和14,950个样本。
AI.result: 在MMKG-RDS-Bench数据集上，使用少量合成样本对Qwen3模型（0.6B/8B/32B）进行微调，推理准确率提升了9.2%。该框架还能生成针对表格和公式等复杂任务的独特数据。
AI.conclusion: MMKG-RDS框架能够有效地合成高质量的训练数据，显著提升领域模型的推理能力，尤其在处理长尾知识和复杂任务方面表现出色。该框架为构建更具挑战性的基准测试提供了有力支持。

title: Virtual Constraint for a Quadrotor UAV Enforcing a Body-Axis Pointing Direction
summary: We propose a geometric control framework on $SE(3)$ for quadrotors that enforces pointing-driven missions without completing a full attitude reference. The mission is encoded through virtual constraints defining a task manifold and an associated set of admissible velocities, and invariance is achieved by a feedback law obtained from a linear system in selected inputs. Under a transversality condition with the effective actuation distribution, the invariance-enforcing input is uniquely defined, yielding a constructive control law and, for relevant tasks, closed-form expressions. We further derive a local off-manifold stabilization extension. As a case study, we lock a body axis to a prescribed line-of-sight direction while maintaining fixed altitude.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于 SE(3) 的几何控制框架，用于四旋翼无人机在不完成完整姿态参考的情况下执行指向任务。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是为了开发一种能够处理指向驱动任务的控制方法，而无需精确跟踪完整的姿态参考，这在实际应用中可能难以实现或不必要。
AI.method: 该框架利用 SE(3) 上的几何控制，通过定义一个任务流形和相关的可允许速度的虚拟约束来编码任务。通过一个在选定输入上的线性系统获得的反馈律来实现不变性。在满足特定横截性条件的情况下，可以唯一地确定实现不变性的输入，从而得到一个构造性的控制律，并且对于相关任务可以推导出闭式解。此外，还推导了一个局部的非流形稳定化扩展。
AI.result: 该框架能够成功地实现指向驱动任务，而无需完整的姿态参考。通过一个案例研究，展示了如何将无人机的某个轴锁定在预定的视线方向，同时保持固定高度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的 SE(3) 几何控制框架为四旋翼无人机执行指向驱动任务提供了一种有效的方法，通过虚拟约束和反馈律实现鲁棒控制，并能在特定情况下推导出闭式控制律。

title: Tilt-X: Enabling Compliant Aerial Manipulation through a Tiltable-Extensible Continuum Manipulator
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026
summary: Aerial manipulators extend the reach and manipulation capabilities of uncrewed multirotor aerial vehicles for inspection, agriculture, sampling, and delivery. Continuum arm aerial manipulation systems offer lightweight, dexterous, and compliant interaction opportunities. Existing designs allow manipulation only below the UAV which restricts their deployability in multiple directions and through clutter. They are also sensitive to propeller downwash. Addressing these limitations, we present Tilt-X, a continuum arm aerial manipulator that integrates a tilting mechanism, a telescopic stage, and a cable-driven continuum section. We present its design and kinematic model and validate it through flight demonstrations. Tilt-X enables a volumetric workspace with up to 75 mm extension and planar orientations between 0$^\circ$ to 90$^\circ$. Experiments comparing end effector pose with and without downwash quantitatively measure its accuracy, providing critical evidence to guide the design and control of reliable aerial manipulators. Results show stabilisation of end effector pose as the manipulator extends out of the propeller influence zone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Tilt-X 的倾斜式连续体机械臂空中操纵器，它集成了倾斜、伸缩和线驱动连续体，克服了现有设计的局限性，可在更广泛的方向和更复杂的环境中进行操作，并能有效减轻螺旋桨下洗的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有连续体机械臂空中操纵器只能在无人机下方进行操作，限制了其部署方向和在复杂环境中的应用，并且容易受到螺旋桨下洗的影响。研究旨在解决这些局限性。
AI.method: 设计并构建了 Tilt-X 机械臂，该机械臂包含倾斜机构、伸缩阶段和线驱动连续体部分。建立了其运动学模型，并通过飞行演示进行了验证。通过实验量化比较了在有无螺旋桨下洗影响下末端执行器的姿态精度。
AI.result: Tilt-X 提供了高达 75 毫米的伸展量和 0° 至 90° 的平面内定向能力。实验结果表明，当机械臂伸出螺旋桨影响区域时，末端执行器的姿态得到了稳定。
AI.conclusion: Tilt-X 是一种多功能空中操纵器，能够实现大范围的操纵，并且能够有效应对螺旋桨下洗的挑战，为可靠空中机械臂的设计和控制提供了关键指导。

title: BiM-GeoAttn-Net: Linear-Time Depth Modeling with Geometry-Aware Attention for 3D Aortic Dissection CTA Segmentation
summary: Accurate segmentation of aortic dissection (AD) lumens in CT angiography (CTA) is essential for quantitative morphological assessment and clinical decision-making. However, reliable 3D delineation remains challenging due to limited long-range context modeling, which compromises inter-slice coherence, and insufficient structural discrimination under low-contrast conditions. To address these limitations, we propose BiM-GeoAttn-Net, a lightweight framework that integrates linear-time depth-wise state-space modeling with geometry-aware vessel refinement. Our approach is featured by Bidirectional Depth Mamba (BiM) to efficiently capture cross-slice dependencies and Geometry-Aware Vessel Attention (GeoAttn) module that employs orientation-sensitive anisotropic filtering to refine tubular structures and sharpen ambiguous boundaries. Extensive experiments on a multi-source AD CTA dataset demonstrate that BiM-GeoAttn-Net achieves a Dice score of 93.35% and an HD95 of 12.36 mm, outperforming representative CNN-, Transformer-, and SSM-based baselines in overlap metrics while maintaining competitive boundary accuracy. These results suggest that coupling linear-time depth modeling with geometry-aware refinement provides an effective, computationally efficient solution for robust 3D AD segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为BiM-GeoAttn-Net的轻量级框架，通过结合线性时间深度状态空间模型和几何感知血管细化，提高了CT血管造影中主动脉夹层（AD）病变的3D分割精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有3D分割方法在捕捉长距离上下文信息和区分低对比度结构方面存在不足，导致分割结果在层间一致性差且边界模糊，影响了AD病变的量化评估和临床决策。
AI.method: 该方法采用双向深度Mamba（BiM）来高效捕获跨切片依赖关系，并引入几何感知血管注意力（GeoAttn）模块，利用方向敏感的各向异性滤波来细化管状结构并锐化模糊边界。
AI.result: 在多源AD CTA数据集上的实验表明，BiM-GeoAttn-Net实现了93.35%的Dice分数和12.36 mm的HD95，在重叠度指标上优于基线方法，同时保持了具有竞争力的边界精度。
AI.conclusion: 将线性时间深度建模与几何感知细化相结合，为鲁棒的3D AD分割提供了一种有效且计算效率高的解决方案。

title: Humans and LLMs Diverge on Probabilistic Inferences
summary: Human reasoning often involves working over limited information to arrive at probabilistic conclusions. In its simplest form, this involves making an inference that is not strictly entailed by a premise, but rather only likely given the premise. While reasoning LLMs have demonstrated strong performance on logical and mathematical tasks, their behavior on such open-ended, non-deterministic inferences remains largely unexplored. We introduce ProbCOPA, a dataset of 210 handcrafted probabilistic inferences in English, each annotated for inference likelihood by 25--30 human participants. We find that human responses are graded and varied, revealing probabilistic judgments of the inferences in our dataset. Comparing these judgments with responses from eight state-of-the-art reasoning LLMs, we show that models consistently fail to produce human-like distributions. Finally, analyzing LLM reasoning chains, we find evidence of a common reasoning pattern used to evaluate such inferences. Our findings reveal persistent differences between humans and LLMs, and underscore the need to evaluate reasoning beyond deterministic settings.

AI.tldr: 本研究引入了ProbCOPA数据集，用于评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在不确定推理任务上的表现。研究发现，LLMs在生成人类感知的概率性判断方面存在困难，并且其推理模式与人类不同。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型在逻辑和数学推理方面表现出色，但它们在开放式、非确定性推理方面的能力仍未得到充分探索。研究者希望填补这一空白，评估LLMs在信息有限情况下的概率性推理能力。
AI.method: 研究者构建了一个名为ProbCOPA的数据集，包含210个手工设计的概率推理任务，并邀请了25-30名人类参与者对每个推理的似然度进行评分。随后，将八个最先进的LLMs的推理结果与人类的判断进行比较，并分析了LLMs的推理过程。
AI.result: 人类的反应显示出概率性判断的分级和多样性。与人类的判断相比，LLMs在生成类似人类的概率分布方面存在系统性不足。此外，研究发现了LLMs在评估此类推理时存在一种常见的模式。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，人类和LLMs在概率性推理方面存在持续的差异，强调了在非确定性场景下评估模型推理能力的重要性。LLMs在处理信息有限、需要做出概率性判断的任务时，仍需进一步改进。

title: Evidential Neural Radiance Fields
summary: Understanding sources of uncertainty is fundamental to trustworthy three-dimensional scene modeling. While recent advances in neural radiance fields (NeRFs) achieve impressive accuracy in scene reconstruction and novel view synthesis, the lack of uncertainty estimation significantly limits their deployment in safety-critical settings. Existing uncertainty quantification methods for NeRFs fail to capture both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty. Among those that do quantify one or the other, many of them either compromise rendering quality or incur significant computational overhead to obtain uncertainty estimates. To address these issues, we introduce Evidential Neural Radiance Fields, a probabilistic approach that seamlessly integrates with the NeRF rendering process and enables direct quantification of both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty from a single forward pass. We compare multiple uncertainty quantification methods on three standardized benchmarks, where our approach demonstrates state-of-the-art scene reconstruction fidelity and uncertainty estimation quality.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为Evidential Neural Radiance Fields (EvRF) 的方法，用于在 NeRF 场景建模中量化不确定性，能够同时捕获偶然不确定性和认知不确定性，且渲染质量和计算开销方面均表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有的 NeRF 方法在场景重建和新视角合成方面取得了显著进展，但缺乏不确定性估计，这限制了其在安全关键领域的应用。现有的不确定性量化方法要么无法同时捕获偶然不确定性和认知不确定性，要么会损害渲染质量或带来高昂的计算开销。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为 Evidential Neural Radiance Fields (EvRF) 的方法，这是一种概率方法，可以无缝集成到 NeRF 的渲染过程中，并允许通过单次前向传播直接量化偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。
AI.result: 在三个标准化基准测试中，EvRF 方法在场景重建保真度和不确定性估计质量方面均达到了最先进的水平。
AI.conclusion: EvRF 是一种有效的 NeRF 不确定性量化方法，能够同时捕获偶然和认知不确定性，并且在不影响渲染质量和计算效率的情况下实现了最先进的性能。

title: Revisiting Integration of Image and Metadata for DICOM Series Classification: Cross-Attention and Dictionary Learning
summary: Automated identification of DICOM image series is essential for large-scale medical image analysis, quality control, protocol harmonization, and reliable downstream processing. However, DICOM series classification remains challenging due to heterogeneous slice content, variable series length, and entirely missing, incomplete or inconsistent DICOM metadata. We propose an end-to-end multimodal framework for DICOM series classification that jointly models image content and acquisition metadata while explicitly accounting for all these challenges. (i) Images and metadata are encoded with modality-aware modules and fused using a bi-directional cross-modal attention mechanism. (ii) Metadata is processed by a sparse, missingness-aware encoder based on learnable feature dictionaries and value-conditioned modulation. By design, the approach does not require any form of imputation. (iii) Variability in series length and image data dimensions is handled via a 2.5D visual encoder and attention operating on equidistantly sampled slices. We evaluate the proposed approach on the publicly available Duke Liver MRI dataset and a large multi-institutional in-house cohort, assessing both in-domain performance and out-of-domain generalization. Across all evaluation settings, the proposed method consistently outperforms relevant image only, metadata-only and multimodal 2D/3D baselines. The results demonstrate that explicitly modeling metadata sparsity and cross-modal interactions improves robustness for DICOM series classification.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种端到端的、多模态的框架，用于DICOM序列分类，该框架能够联合建模图像内容和采集元数据，并能应对元数据缺失、不完整或不一致的挑战。
AI.motivation: 自动识别DICOM图像序列对于大规模医学图像分析、质量控制、协议统一和可靠的下游处理至关重要，但由于图像内容异质、序列长度可变以及元数据缺失、不完整或不一致等问题，DICOM序列分类仍然充满挑战。
AI.method: 提出了一种多模态框架，其中图像和元数据分别通过感知模块进行编码，并使用双向跨模态注意力机制进行融合。元数据使用基于可学习特征字典和值条件调制（value-conditioned modulation）的稀疏、缺失感知编码器进行处理，无需插值。序列长度和图像数据维度上的差异通过2.5D视觉编码器和对等距采样切片的操作来实现。
AI.result: 在Duke肝脏MRI数据集和一项大型机构内部队列上进行的评估显示，该方法在所有评估设置下均一致优于仅使用图像、仅使用元数据以及2D/3D多模态的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 明确建模元数据稀疏性和跨模态交互能够提高DICOM序列分类的鲁棒性。

title: VCA: Vision-Click-Action Framework for Precise Manipulation of Segmented Objects in Target Ambiguous Environments
summary: The reliance on language in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models introduces ambiguity, cognitive overhead, and difficulties in precise object identification and sequential task execution, particularly in environments with multiple visually similar objects. To address these limitations, we propose Vision-Click-Action (VCA), a framework that replaces verbose textual commands with direct, click-based visual interaction using pretrained segmentation models. By allowing operators to specify target objects clearly through visual selection in the robot's 2D camera view, VCA reduces interpretation errors, lowers cognitive load, and provides a practical and scalable alternative to language-driven interfaces for real-world robotic manipulation. Experimental results validate that the proposed VCA framework achieves effective instance-level manipulation of specified target objects. Experiment videos are available at https://robrosinc.github.io/vca/.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为Vision-Click-Action (VCA) 的框架，用于机器人操作，通过点击视觉界面而非语言指令来指定目标对象，以解决语言指令在机器人操作中的歧义和复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 当前的Vision-Language-Action (VLA) 模型依赖语言指令，容易产生歧义，增加认知负担，并且在识别相似物体和执行顺序任务时存在困难。尤其是在存在多个视觉相似物体的情况下，这种限制尤为明显。
AI.method: VCA框架使用预训练的分割模型，将冗长的文本指令替换为直接的、基于点击的视觉交互。操作员可以直接在机器人2D摄像头视图中通过视觉选择来明确指定目标对象。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，VCA框架能够有效地实现对指定目标对象的实例级操作。通过视觉选择，减少了对目标对象的解释错误，降低了认知负荷。
AI.conclusion: VCA框架为机器人操作提供了一种实用且可扩展的替代方案，有效解决了语言驱动接口的局限性，提高了机器人操作的精确性和效率。

title: AI Must Embrace Specialization via Superhuman Adaptable Intelligence
summary: Everyone from AI executives and researchers to doomsayers, politicians, and activists is talking about Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). Yet, they often don't seem to agree on its exact definition. One common definition of AGI is an AI that can do everything a human can do, but are humans truly general? In this paper, we address what's wrong with our conception of AGI, and why, even in its most coherent formulation, it is a flawed concept to describe the future of AI. We explore whether the most widely accepted definitions are plausible, useful, and truly general. We argue that AI must embrace specialization, rather than strive for generality, and in its specialization strive for superhuman performance, and introduce Superhuman Adaptable Intelligence (SAI). SAI is defined as intelligence that can learn to exceed humans at anything important that we can do, and that can fill in the skill gaps where humans are incapable. We then lay out how SAI can help hone a discussion around AI that was blurred by an overloaded definition of AGI, and extrapolate the implications of using it as a guide for the future.

AI.tldr: 文章认为通用人工智能（AGI）的概念存在缺陷，并提出“超人类适应性智能”（SAI）作为更合适的未来AI发展方向，强调专业化和超越人类能力。
AI.motivation: 现有通用人工智能（AGI）的定义模糊不清且存在争议，导致对未来AI发展的讨论被稀释。作者希望提出一个更清晰、更有用的概念来指导AI研究。
AI.method: 文章首先批判了当前AGI的定义，分析其合理性、有用性和普适性。随后，作者提出了“超人类适应性智能”（SAI）的概念，并阐述了SAI应如何超越人类在特定领域的表现，以及填补人类能力的不足。
AI.result: 文章论证了AGI概念的局限性，并引入了SAI作为替代概念。SAI被定义为能够学习并在重要人类能力上超越人类，并能弥补人类不足的智能。
AI.conclusion: 作者认为AI的发展不应盲目追求通用性，而应拥抱专业化，并努力达到超人类水平。SAI的概念比AGI更能清晰地指导AI的未来发展方向，并为相关的讨论和研究提供了新的视角。

title: MicroPush: A Simulator and Benchmark for Contact-Rich Cell Pushing and Assembly with a Magnetic Rolling Microrobot
summary: Magnetic rolling microrobots enable gentle manipulation in confined microfluidic environments, yet autonomy for contact-rich behaviors such as cell pushing and multi-target assembly remains difficult to develop and evaluate reproducibly. We present MicroPush, an open-source simulator and benchmark suite for magnetic rolling microrobots in cluttered 2D scenes. MicroPush combines an overdamped interaction model with contact-aware stick--slip effects, lightweight near-field damping, optional Poiseuille background flow, and a calibrated mapping from actuation frequency to free-space rolling speed. On top of the simulator core, we provide a modular planning--control stack with a two-phase strategy for contact establishment and goal-directed pushing, together with a deterministic benchmark protocol with fixed tasks, staged execution, and unified CSV logging for single-object transport and hexagonal assembly. We report success, time, and tracking metrics, and an actuation-variation measure $E_{Δω}$. Results show that controller stability dominates performance under flow disturbances, while planner choice can influence command smoothness over long-horizon sequences via waypoint progression. MicroPush enables reproducible comparison and ablation of planning, control, and learning methods for microscale contact-rich micromanipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MicroPush的开源模拟器和基准套件，用于解决磁性滚动微型机器人在拥挤的微流控环境中进行接触式操作（如细胞推动和多目标组装）的自主性难题。MicroPush通过精确的物理模型和模块化控制栈，实现了可复现的评估和比较。
AI.motivation: 现有磁性滚动微型机器人难以实现自主的接触式操作，且缺乏可重复评估的方法，尤其是在细胞推动和多目标组装等任务中。
AI.method: 开发了一个名为MicroPush的2D模拟器，包含过阻尼相互作用模型、考虑接触的粘滑效应、近场阻尼、可选的Poiseuille背景流，以及驱动频率到滚动速度的映射。模拟器之上提供了一个模块化的规划-控制栈，采用两阶段策略（接触建立和目标导向推动），并设计了一个确定的基准协议（固定任务、分阶段执行、统一CSV日志）来评估单物运输和六边形组装。
AI.result: 评估指标包括成功率、时间消耗和跟踪精度，以及一种驱动频率变化度量 $E_{Δω}$。结果表明，在流体干扰下，控制器稳定性是影响性能的关键；而规划器的选择会通过航点进展影响长时序指令的平滑度。
AI.conclusion: MicroPush为微尺度接触式微操纵的规划、控制和学习方法提供了可复现的比较和消融研究平台。

title: France or Spain or Germany or France: A Neural Account of Non-Redundant Redundant Disjunctions
summary: Sentences like "She will go to France or Spain, or perhaps to Germany or France." appear formally redundant, yet become acceptable in contexts such as "Mary will go to a philosophy program in France or Spain, or a mathematics program in Germany or France." While this phenomenon has typically been analyzed using symbolic formal representations, we aim to provide a complementary account grounded in artificial neural mechanisms. We first present new behavioral evidence from humans and large language models demonstrating the robustness of this apparent non-redundancy across contexts. We then show that, in language models, redundancy avoidance arises from two interacting mechanisms: models learn to bind contextually relevant information to repeated lexical items, and Transformer induction heads selectively attend to these context-licensed representations. We argue that this neural explanation sheds light on the mechanisms underlying context-sensitive semantic interpretation, and that it complements existing symbolic analyses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人工神经网络的机制来解释自然语言中看似冗余但实际上有意义的表达，并提供了人类和大型语言模型的行为证据。研究发现，在语言模型中，冗余的避免源于上下文相关信息与重复词汇的绑定以及Transformer归纳头对上下文许可表示的注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 解释在特定上下文中，看似冗余的句子（如“她要去法国或西班牙，或者德国或法国。”）为何仍然是可接受的，并提供一种与传统符号分析互补的、基于人工神经网络的解释。
AI.method: 1. 收集人类和大型语言模型的行为证据，证明在不同上下文中这种表观上的非冗余性。 2. 分析语言模型中的冗余避免机制，包括上下文相关信息与重复词汇的绑定，以及Transformer归纳头对这些表示的选择性注意力。
AI.result: 1. 行为证据表明，人类和大型语言模型都能容忍并理解这些表观冗余的表达。 2. 语言模型中的冗余避免机制涉及将上下文信息绑定到重复词汇，以及Transformer的注意力机制。
AI.conclusion: 基于神经网络的机制可以解释上下文敏感的语义解释，并为理解语言中看似冗余但有意义的表达提供了新的视角，是对现有符号分析的有效补充。

title: KEEP: A KV-Cache-Centric Memory Management System for Efficient Embodied Planning
summary: Memory-augmented Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capability for complex and long-horizon embodied planning. By keeping track of past experiences and environmental states, memory enables LLMs to maintain a global view, thereby avoiding repetitive exploration. However, existing approaches often store the memory as raw text, leading to excessively long prompts and high prefill latency. While it is possible to store and reuse the KV caches, the efficiency benefits are greatly undermined due to frequent KV cache updates. In this paper, we propose KEEP, a KV-cache-centric memory management system for efficient embodied planning. KEEP features 3 key innovations: (1) a Static-Dynamic Memory Construction algorithm that reduces KV cache recomputation by mixed-granularity memory group; (2) a Multi-hop Memory Re-computation algorithm that dynamically identifies important cross-attention among different memory groups and reconstructs memory interactions iteratively; (3) a Layer-balanced Memory Loading that eliminates unbalanced KV cache loading and cross-attention computation across different layers. Extensive experimental results have demonstrated that KEEP achieves 2.68x speedup with negligible accuracy loss compared with text-based memory methods on ALFRED dataset. Compared with the KV re-computation method CacheBlend (EuroSys'25), KEEP shows 4.13% success rate improvement and 1.90x time-to-first-token (TTFT) reduction. Our code is available on https://github.com/PKU-SEC-Lab/KEEP_Embodied_Memory.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了KEEP，一个以KV缓存为中心的记忆管理系统，用于提升LLM在具身规划中的效率，通过混合粒度记忆分组、多跳记忆重计算和层平衡记忆加载等创新方法，实现了显著的速度提升和可忽略的精度损失。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于记忆的LLM在处理长时序具身规划时，将记忆存储为纯文本会导致过长的Prompt和高延迟。尽管可以复用KV缓存，但频繁的更新大大削弱了效率。
AI.method: KEEP系统包含三个核心创新：1. 静态-动态记忆构建算法（通过混合粒度的记忆分组减少KV缓存的重新计算）；2. 多跳记忆重计算算法（动态识别不同记忆组间的关键交叉注意力，并迭代重构记忆交互）；3. 层平衡记忆加载（消除不同层之间不平衡的KV缓存加载和交叉注意力计算）。
AI.result: KEEP在ALFRED数据集上的实验结果表明，与基于文本的记忆方法相比，它实现了2.68倍的速度提升，且精度损失可以忽略。与CacheBlend（一种KV重计算方法）相比，KEEP的成功率提高了4.13%，首个Token的生成时间（TTFT）减少了1.90倍。
AI.conclusion: KEEP是一个高效的KV缓存中心化记忆管理系统，能够有效解决现有方法在具身规划中面临的Prompt过长和高延迟问题，显著提升了LLM的规划效率，并在准确性上保持了竞争力。

title: CycleBEV: Regularizing View Transformation Networks via View Cycle Consistency for Bird's-Eye-View Semantic Segmentation
summary: Transforming image features from perspective view (PV) space to bird's-eye-view (BEV) space remains challenging in autonomous driving due to depth ambiguity and occlusion. Although several view transformation (VT) paradigms have been proposed, the challenge still remains. In this paper, we propose a new regularization framework, dubbed CycleBEV, that enhances existing VT models for BEV semantic segmentation. Inspired by cycle consistency, widely used in image distribution modeling, we devise an inverse view transformation (IVT) network that maps BEV segmentation maps back to PV segmentation maps and use it to regularize VT networks during training through cycle consistency losses, enabling them to capture richer semantic and geometric information from input PV images. To further exploit the capacity of the IVT network, we introduce two novel ideas that extend cycle consistency into geometric and representation spaces. We evaluate CycleBEV on four representative VT models covering three major paradigms using the large-scale nuScenes dataset. Experimental results show consistent improvements -- with gains of up to 0.74, 4.86, and 3.74 mIoU for drivable area, vehicle, and pedestrian classes, respectively -- without increasing inference complexity, since the IVT network is used only during training. The implementation code is available at https://github.com/JeongbinHong/CycleBEV.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CycleBEV的正则化框架，通过引入逆视角转换（IVT）网络并利用循环一致性损失来增强现有的视角转换（VT）模型，以提高BEV语义分割的性能，尤其是在自动驾驶领域。该方法在不增加推理复杂度的情况下，有效提升了分割精度。
AI.motivation: 在自动驾驶中，将透视视图（PV）的图像特征转换为鸟瞰图（BEV）视图时，由于深度模糊和遮挡问题，转换过程仍然具有挑战性。现有方法尚未完全解决此问题。
AI.method: 提出CycleBEV正则化框架，核心是设计一个逆视角转换（IVT）网络，将BEV分割图映射回PV分割图。通过在训练过程中利用循环一致性损失来正则化VT网络，使其能捕捉更丰富的语义和几何信息。此外，还引入了将循环一致性扩展到几何和表示空间的两个新方法。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，CycleBEV框架在四种代表性VT模型上进行了评估。结果显示，与基线模型相比，CycleBEV在可行驶区域、车辆和行人等类别上的mIoU分别提高了0.74、4.86和3.74，展示了一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: CycleBEV是一种有效的正则化框架，通过引入IVT网络和循环一致性损失，能够增强VT模型捕捉语义和几何信息的能力，从而显著提升BEV语义分割的精度，且不增加推理时的计算复杂度。

title: PseudoAct: Leveraging Pseudocode Synthesis for Flexible Planning and Action Control in Large Language Model Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents typically rely on reactive decision-making paradigms such as ReAct, selecting actions conditioned on growing execution histories. While effective for short tasks, these approaches often lead to redundant tool usage, unstable reasoning, and high token consumption in complex long-horizon tasks involving branching, iteration, or multi-tool coordination. To address these limitations, this paper introduces PseudoAct, a novel framework for flexible planning and action control in LLM agents through pseudocode synthesis. Leveraging the ability of LLMs to express task-solving strategies as code, PseudoAct synthesizes a structured pseudocode plan that decomposes a task into subtasks and explicitly encodes control flow, including sequencing, conditionals, loops, parallel composition, and combinations of these logic primitives. Actions are then executed by following this global plan, making the decision logic explicit and temporally coherent. This design reduces redundant actions, prevents infinite loops, and avoids uninformative alternative exploration, enabling consistent and efficient long-horizon decision-making. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that our method significantly outperforms existing reactive agent approaches, achieving a 20.93% absolute gain in success rate on FEVER and setting a new state-of-the-art on HotpotQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PseudoAct的新框架，通过合成伪代码来改善大型语言模型（LLM）代理在复杂长时任务中的决策能力，提高了效率和成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM代理（如ReAct）在处理复杂长时任务时存在冗余工具使用、推理不稳定和高令牌消耗等问题，因为它们依赖于反应式决策。本文旨在解决这些局限性。
AI.method: PseudoAct框架通过LLM合成结构化的伪代码计划。该伪代码将任务分解为子任务，并明确编码了包括顺序、条件、循环、并行组合等控制流。代理遵循该全局计划执行动作。
AI.result: 在FEVER数据集上，PseudoAct取得了20.93%的成功率提升。在HotpotQA数据集上，PseudoAct也达到了新的最先进水平。实验表明，PseudoAct减少了冗余动作，防止了无限循环，避免了无效探索。
AI.conclusion: PseudoAct通过显式地编码控制流，实现了更灵活和高效的长时决策，显著优于现有的反应式代理方法。

title: Polarization Uncertainty-Guided Diffusion Model for Color Polarization Image Demosaicking
summary: Color polarization demosaicking (CPDM) aims to reconstruct full-resolution polarization images of four directions from the color-polarization filter array (CPFA) raw image. Due to the challenge of predicting numerous missing pixels and the scarcity of high-quality training data, existing network-based methods, despite effectively recovering scene intensity information, still exhibit significant errors in reconstructing polarization characteristics (degree of polarization, DOP, and angle of polarization, AOP). To address this problem, we introduce the image diffusion prior from text-to-image (T2I) models to overcome the performance bottleneck of network-based methods, with the additional diffusion prior compensating for limited representational capacity caused by restricted data distribution. To effectively leverage the diffusion prior, we explicitly model the polarization uncertainty during reconstruction and use uncertainty to guide the diffusion model in recovering high error regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method accurately recovers scene polarization characteristics with both high fidelity and strong visual perception.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用文本到图像扩散模型先验知识来解决颜色偏振去马赛克问题的方***，***定偏振不确定性并用于指导扩散模型修复高***区域，实验***显示该方法能***恢复场景偏振***征。
AI.motivation: 现有基于网络的颜色偏振去马赛克方法在恢复偏振***征（偏振度DOP和偏振角AOP）时仍存在******，原因在于需要预测***多***失像素以及高质量***据***缺，限制了网络的表示***力。
AI.method: 引入文本到图像（T2I）扩散模型的***像扩散先验，***去网络表示***力***限的问题。***一步，***建偏振不确定***，并利用不确定***导扩散模型***理高***区域。
AI.result: 提出的方法******准确地恢复了场景偏振***征，同时***有高保真度和***的视觉感知***。
AI.conclusion: 利用T2I扩散模型的先验知识和偏振不确定***导，***效解决了颜色偏振去马赛克中偏振***征恢复***的***，***显******了现有方法的性能。

title: Multi-Agent Causal Reasoning for Suicide Ideation Detection Through Online Conversations
summary: Suicide remains a pressing global public health concern. While social media platforms offer opportunities for early risk detection through online conversation trees, existing approaches face two major limitations: (1) They rely on predefined rules (e.g., quotes or relies) to log conversations that capture only a narrow spectrum of user interactions, and (2) They overlook hidden influences such as user conformity and suicide copycat behavior, which can significantly affect suicidal expression and propagation in online communities. To address these limitations, we propose a Multi-Agent Causal Reasoning (MACR) framework that collaboratively employs a Reasoning Agent to scale user interactions and a Bias-aware Decision-Making Agent to mitigate harmful biases arising from hidden influences. The Reasoning Agent integrates cognitive appraisal theory to generate counterfactual user reactions to posts, thereby scaling user interactions. It analyses these reactions through structured dimensions, i.e., cognitive, emotional, and behavioral patterns, with a dedicated sub-agent responsible for each dimension. The Bias-aware Decision-Making Agent mitigates hidden biases through a front-door adjustment strategy, leveraging the counterfactual user reactions produced by the Reasoning Agent. Through the collaboration of reasoning and bias-aware decision making, the proposed MACR framework not only alleviates hidden biases, but also enriches contextual information of user interactions with counterfactual knowledge. Extensive experiments on real-world conversational datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of MACR in identifying suicide risk.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个多主体因果推理（MACR）框架，通过生成反事实用户反应来扩展用户互动，并利用因果推理来减轻隐藏的偏见，从而更有效地识别社交媒体上的自杀风险。
AI.motivation: 现有社交媒体上的自杀风险检测方法依赖于预定义的规则，无法捕捉用户互动的全部范围，并且忽略了群体认同和模仿行为等隐藏因素的影响。
AI.method: 提出了一种多主体因果推理（MACR）框架，其中包含一个推理代理（Reasoning Agent）和一个偏见感知决策代理（Bias-aware Decision-Making Agent）。推理代理利用认知评估理论生成反事实用户反应，并从认知、情感和行为三个维度分析这些反应。偏见感知决策代理利用推理代理生成的反事实反应，通过前门调整策略来缓解隐藏的偏见。
AI.result: MACR框架通过整合反事实知识丰富了用户互动的上下文信息，并有效减轻了隐藏偏见，在真实世界数据集的实验中证明了其在识别自杀风险方面的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MACR框架通过结合因果推理和偏见缓解，能够更全面、更准确地识别社交媒体上的自杀风险，克服了现有方法的局限性。

title: Hyperdimensional Cross-Modal Alignment of Frozen Language and Image Models for Efficient Image Captioning
summary: Large unimodal foundation models for vision and language encode rich semantic structures, yet aligning them typically requires computationally intensive multimodal fine-tuning. Such approaches depend on large-scale parameter updates, are resource intensive, and can perturb pretrained representations. Emerging evidence suggests, however, that independently trained foundation models may already exhibit latent semantic compatibility, reflecting shared structures in the data they model. This raises a fundamental question: can cross-modal alignment be achieved without modifying the models themselves? Here we introduce HDFLIM (HyperDimensional computing with Frozen Language and Image Models), a framework that establishes cross-modal mappings while keeping pretrained vision and language models fully frozen. HDFLIM projects unimodal embeddings into a shared hyperdimensional space and leverages lightweight symbolic operations -- binding, bundling, and similarity-based retrieval to construct associative cross-modal representations in a single pass over the data. Caption generation emerges from high-dimensional memory retrieval rather than iterative gradient-based optimization. We show that HDFLIM achieves performance comparable to end-to-end vision-language training methods and produces captions that are more semantically grounded than zero-shot baselines. By decoupling alignment from parameter tuning, our results suggest that semantic mapping across foundation models can be realized through symbolic operations on hyperdimensional encodings of the respective embeddings. More broadly, this work points toward an alternative paradigm for foundation model alignment in which frozen models are integrated through structured representational mappings rather than through large-scale retraining. The codebase for our implementation can be found at https://github.com/Abhishek-Dalvi410/HDFLIM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HDFLIM的框架，可以在不修改预训练模型的情况下，通过将单模态嵌入投影到共享的超维空间，并利用符号操作（绑定、捆绑和基于相似度的检索）来实现跨模态对齐，从而生成图像描述。
AI.motivation: 传统的跨模态对齐方法需要计算量大的多模态微调，这会消耗大量资源并可能扰乱预训练表示。研究人员希望找到一种不需要修改模型本身就能实现跨模态对齐的方法。
AI.method: HDFLIM框架将预训练的视觉和语言模型保持冻结状态，将单模态嵌入投影到一个共享的超维空间，并使用符号操作（绑定、捆绑和基于相似度的检索）来构建跨模态的联想表示。图像描述生成是通过高维记忆检索实现的，而非基于梯度的优化。
AI.result: HDFLIM在性能上可与端到端视觉-语言训练方法相媲美，生成的图像描述比零样本基线更具语义接地性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，通过对超维编码的嵌入进行符号操作，可以在不进行参数调整的情况下实现跨模态的语义映射。这提供了一种新的基础模型对齐范式，即通过结构化的表示映射来集成冻结的模型，而不是进行大规模的重新训练。

title: FAVLA: A Force-Adaptive Fast-Slow VLA model for Contact-Rich Robotic Manipulation
summary: Force/torque feedback can substantially improve Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models on contact-rich manipulation, but most existing approaches fuse all modalities at a single operating frequency. This design ignores the mismatched sampling rates of real robot sensors, forcing downsampling of the high-frequency contact cues needed for reactive correction. Combined with common VLM-action-expert (AE) pipelines that execute action chunks largely open loop between expensive VLM updates, unified-frequency fusion often yields delayed responses to impacts, stick-slip, and force spikes. We propose FAVLA, a force-adaptive fast-slow VLA that decouples slow perception planning from fast contact-aware control. FAVLA runs a slow VLM at a fixed low frequency to encode modalities to produce latent representations and to predict near-future force variation. A fast AE then executes at a variable high frequency, conditioning on the latest force sequence data to generate reactive actions. We further introduce a force adapter that injects high-frequency force features into multiple AE layers, and adaptively schedules the AE's execution frequency based on the VLM's predicted force variation. Extensive experiments on contact-rich tasks demonstrate that FAVLA significantly outperforms baselines, achieving superior reactivity and success rates, especially with a smaller contact force during manipulation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为FAVLA的新型VLA模型，通过解耦慢速感知规划和快速接触感知控制，并引入力适配器，提高了模型在接触丰富操作任务中的响应速度和成功率，特别是在接触力较小时。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLA模型在融合多模态信息时常采用单一固定频率，忽略了机器人传感器采样率的差异，导致高频接触信息被降采样，影响了模型的实时响应能力，尤其是在应对接触冲击、粘滑和力尖峰时。
AI.method: FAVLA模型将慢速VLM（用于模态编码、预测近未来力变化）和快速AE（基于最新力序列生成反应性动作）解耦。引入力适配器将高频力特征注入AE的多层，并根据VLM预测的力变化自适应调整AE的执行频率。
AI.result: FAVLA在接触丰富的任务上进行了广泛实验，结果显示其性能显著优于基线模型，展现出更强的响应能力和更高的成功率，尤其是在操作过程中接触力较小时。
AI.conclusion: FAVLA通过多频率融合和力适配器，有效地解决了现有VLA模型在处理高频接触信息时的局限性，提高了机器人操作的实时性和鲁棒性。

title: Clinically-aligned ischemic stroke segmentation and ASPECTS scoring on NCCT imaging using a slice-gated loss on foundation representations
summary: Rapid infarct assessment on non-contrast CT (NCCT) is essential for acute ischemic stroke management. Most deep learning methods perform pixel-wise segmentation without modeling the structured anatomical reasoning underlying ASPECTS scoring, where basal ganglia (BG) and supraganglionic (SG) levels are clinically interpreted in a coupled manner. We propose a clinically aligned framework that combines a frozen DINOv3 backbone with a lightweight decoder and introduce a Territory-Aware Gated Loss (TAGL) to enforce BG-SG consistency during training. This anatomically informed supervision adds no inference-time complexity. Our method achieves a Dice score of 0.6385 on AISD, outperforming prior CNN and foundation-model baselines. On a proprietary ASPECTS dataset, TAGL improves mean Dice from 0.698 to 0.767. These results demonstrate that integrating foundation representations with structured clinical priors improves NCCT stroke segmentation and ASPECTS delineation.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种结合DINOv3和区域感知门控损失（TAGL）的框架，用于改进无对比度CT（NCCT）上的急性缺血性卒中（AIS）的影像评估，尤其关注ASPECTS评分中的基底节（BG）和超纹状体（SG）区域的联合解释，在AISD数据集上实现了0.6385的Dice分数，并显著提高了专有ASPECTS数据集上的Dice分数。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法通常进行像素级分割，未能捕捉ASPECTS评分背后的结构化解剖学推理，特别是BG和SG区域的临床联合解释。因此，研究旨在开发一种更符合临床实践的方法来提高NCCT卒中分割和ASPECTS勾画的准确性。
AI.method: 研究提出了一种结合冻结的DINOv3骨干网络和轻量级解码器的框架，并引入了区域感知门控损失（TAGL）。TAGL在训练过程中强制执行BG-SG的一致性，这种解剖学信息监督不会增加推理时间的复杂性。
AI.result: 该方法在AISD数据集上取得了0.6385的Dice分数，优于之前的CNN和基础模型基线。在专有的ASPECTS数据集上，TAGL将平均Dice分数从0.698提高到0.767。
AI.conclusion: 将基础模型表示与结构化临床先验相结合，可以改善NCCT卒中分割和ASPECTS勾画。TAGL是一种有效的策略，可以无需增加推理成本即可整合解剖学知识。

title: Extending 2D foundational DINOv3 representations to 3D segmentation of neonatal brain MR images
summary: Precise volumetric delineation of hippocampal structures is essential for quantifying neurodevelopmental trajectories in pre-term and term infants, where subtle morphological variations may carry prognostic significance. While foundation encoders trained on large-scale visual data offer discriminative representations, their 2D formulation is a limitation with respect to the $3$D organization of brain anatomy. We propose a volumetric segmentation strategy that reconciles this tension through a structured window-based disassembly-reassembly mechanism: the global MRI volume is decomposed into non-overlapping 3D windows or sub-cubes, each processed via a separate decoding arm built upon frozen high-fidelity features, and subsequently reassembled prior to a ground-truth correspendence using a dense-prediction head. This architecture preserves constant a decoder memory footprint while forcing predictions to lie within an anatomically consistent geometry. Evaluated on the ALBERT dataset for hippocampal segmentation, the proposed approach achieves a Dice score of 0.65 for a single 3D window. The method demonstrates that volumetric anatomical structure could be recovered from frozen 2D foundation representations through structured compositional decoding, and offers a principled and generalizable extension for foundation models for 3D medical applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于结构化窗口的3D医学影像分割方法，通过分解、处理和重组3D MRI体积，利用2D基础模型的冻结特征来分割海马结构，并在ALBERT数据集上取得了0.65的Dice分数。
AI.motivation: 现有基于2D基础模型的方法在处理3D大脑解剖结构时存在局限性，需要一种能够有效处理3D信息并保持解剖一致性的分割策略，特别是在量化早产儿和足月婴儿海马结构形态变化方面。
AI.method: 将全局MRI体积分解为非重叠的3D窗口（子立方体），每个窗口由一个基于冻结的高保真特征的解码器单独处理，然后重新组合，最后通过一个密集预测头与真实标签进行比对。该方法保持了固定的解码器内存占用，并强制预测结果符合解剖学上的几何一致性。
AI.result: 在ALBERT数据集的海马分割任务中，该方法在单个3D窗口上实现了0.65的Dice分数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了可以通过结构化组合式解码，从冻结的2D基础表示中恢复出体积解剖结构，为基础模型在3D医学应用中提供了一种有原则且可泛化的扩展。

title: Pseudo Contrastive Learning for Diagram Comprehension in Multimodal Models
summary:
Recent multimodal models such as Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) have shown remarkable ability to align visual and linguistic representations. However, domains where small visual differences carry large semantic significance, such as diagram understanding, remain challenging due to the models' limited sensitivity to fine-grained structural variations.
  We propose a new training paradigm designed to enhance diagram comprehension in vision-language models. Our approach introduces pseudo contrastive samples generated by a diagram renderer that creates synthetic diagrams using randomly picked text elements. These samples highlight structural differences in diagrammatic imagery without requiring any modification or editing of the original data. By incorporating these pseudo contrastive samples into the training objective, the model learns to capture more precise and semantically consistent diagram structures.
  Empirical evaluations on a benchmark dataset of flowcharts demonstrate substantial improvements over standard CLIP and hard-negative CLIP training in both image-text matching and visual question answering tasks. The results underscore the value of domain-specific training strategies and contribute to advancing diagrammatic understanding within the broader context of vision-language learning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的训练范式，通过生成伪对比样本来提高视觉语言模型对图表的理解能力，尤其是在细微的结构变化具有重要语义意义的领域。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态模型（如CLIP）在处理图表等领域时，对于细微视觉差异导致的大语义意义变化敏感度不足，难以有效理解图表结构。
AI.method: 引入一种新的训练范式，利用图表渲染器生成包含随机文本元素的合成图表作为伪对比样本，以突出结构差异。将这些样本纳入训练目标，以提升模型对图表结构的精确捕捉能力。
AI.result: 在流程图基准数据集上，与标准CLIP和hard-negative CLIP训练相比，该方法在图像-文本匹配和视觉问答任务上均取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 基于伪对比样本的领域特定训练策略对于提升视觉语言模型在图表理解方面的能力至关重要，能够帮助模型学习更精确、语义一致的图表结构。

title: Physics-Embedded Neural ODEs for Learning Antagonistic Pneumatic Artificial Muscle Dynamics
summary: Pneumatic artificial muscles (PAMs) enable compliant actuation for soft wearable, assistive, and interactive robots. When arranged antagonistically, PAMs can provide variable impedance through co-contraction but exhibit coupled, nonlinear, and hysteretic dynamics that challenge modeling and control. This paper presents a hybrid neural ordinary differential equation (Neural ODE) framework that embeds physical structure into a learned model of antagonistic PAM dynamics. The formulation combines parametric joint mechanics and pneumatic state dynamics with a neural network force component that captures antagonistic coupling and rate-dependent hysteresis. The forward model predicts joint motion and chamber pressures with a mean R$^2$ of 0.88 across 225 co-contraction conditions. An inverse formulation, derived from the learned dynamics, computes pressure commands offline for desired motion and stiffness profiles, tracked in closed loop during execution. Experimental validation demonstrates reliable stiffness control across 126-176 N/mm and consistent impedance behavior across operating velocities, in contrast to a static model, which shows degraded stiffness consistency at higher velocities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合神经常微分方程（Neural ODE）框架，用于建模和控制气动人工肌肉（PAMs）的非线性、滞后动力学，并成功实现了可变阻抗控制。
AI.motivation: 气动人工肌肉（PAMs）在软体机器人、可穿戴设备和辅助机器人中具有潜力，但其耦合、非线性和迟滞动力学给建模和控制带来了挑战，尤其是在需要实现可变阻抗时。
AI.method: 该研究提出了一种混合 Neural ODE 框架，该框架结合了参数化的关节力学、气动状态动力学以及一个能够捕获反作用耦合和速率依赖滞后的神经网络力学组件。基于学习到的动力学推导出了逆模型，用于计算实现目标运动和刚度曲线所需的压力指令。
AI.result: 所提出的正向模型在 225 种协同收缩条件下，对关节运动和腔体压力的预测平均 R$^2$ 达到 0.88。逆模型能够通过闭环控制实现可调的刚度（126-176 N/mm）和一致的阻抗行为，即使在高操作速度下也能保持，这优于仅使用静态模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 混合 Neural ODE 框架能够有效捕捉反作用 PAM 系统的复杂动力学，并实现了可靠的、与速度无关的阻抗控制，为 PAMs 的高级应用提供了新的建模和控制方法。

title: BRIDGE the Gap: Mitigating Bias Amplification in Automated Scoring of English Language Learners via Inter-group Data Augmentation
summary: In the field of educational assessment, automated scoring systems increasingly rely on deep learning and large language models (LLMs). However, these systems face significant risks of bias amplification, where model prediction gaps between student groups become larger than those observed in training data. This issue is especially severe for underrepresented groups such as English Language Learners (ELLs), as models may inherit and further magnify existing disparities in the data. We identify that this issue is closely tied to representation bias: the scarcity of minority (high-scoring ELL) samples makes models trained with empirical risk minimization favor majority (non-ELL) linguistic patterns. Consequently, models tend to under-predict ELL students who even demonstrate comparable domain knowledge but use different linguistic patterns, thereby undermining the fairness of automated scoring outcomes. To mitigate this, we propose BRIDGE, a Bias-Reducing Inter-group Data GEneration framework designed for low-resource assessment settings. Instead of relying on the limited minority samples, BRIDGE synthesizes high-scoring ELL samples by "pasting" construct-relevant (i.e., rubric-aligned knowledge and evidence) content from abundant high-scoring non-ELL samples into authentic ELL linguistic patterns. We further introduce a discriminator model to ensure the quality of synthetic samples. Experiments on California Science Test (CAST) datasets demonstrate that BRIDGE effectively reduces prediction bias for high-scoring ELL students while maintaining overall scoring performance. Notably, our method achieves fairness gains comparable to using additional real human data, offering a cost-effective solution for ensuring equitable scoring in large-scale assessments.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为BRIDGE 的框架，通过生成合成数据来解决自动化评分系统中的偏见放大问题，特别是针对英语学习者（ELLs），在不牺牲整体性能的情况下提高了公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化评分系统（尤其是基于深度学习和 LLM 的系统）存在偏见放大的风险，尤其对像英语学习者（ELLs）这样的弱势群体。模型在训练数据中存在的量化差距，在预测中可能被进一步放大，导致对拥有同等知识但语言模式不同的 ELLs 的评分偏低。
AI.method: 研究提出 BRIDGE 框架，一个用于低资源评估环境的偏见减少型跨组数据生成框架。其核心思想是通过“粘贴”技术，将大量非 ELLs 高分样本中的结构相关内容（知识和证据）与真实的 ELLs 语言模式相结合，来合成新的高分 ELLs 样本。此外，还引入了一个判别器模型来确保合成样本的质量。
AI.result: 在加州科学测试（CAST）数据集上的实验表明，BRIDGE 有效地减少了高分 ELLs 的预测偏见，同时保持了整体评分性能。其公平性提升效果与使用额外真实人类数据相当，是一种经济高效的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: BRIDGE 框架能够有效地生成合成数据，缓解自动化评分系统对 ELLs 的偏见放大问题，为大规模评估提供了一种具有成本效益的公平性保障方法。

title: From Flat Logs to Causal Graphs: Hierarchical Failure Attribution for LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
summary: LLM-powered Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in complex domains but suffer from inherent fragility and opaque failure mechanisms. Existing failure attribution methods, whether relying on direct prompting, costly replays, or supervised fine-tuning, typically treat execution logs as flat sequences. This linear perspective fails to disentangle the intricate causal links inherent to MAS, leading to weak observability and ambiguous responsibility boundaries. To address these challenges, we propose CHIEF, a novel framework that transforms chaotic trajectories into a structured hierarchical causal graph. It then employs hierarchical oracle-guided backtracking to efficiently prune the search space via sybthesized virtual oracles. Finally, it implements counterfactual attribution via a progressive causal screening strategy to rigorously distinguish true root causes from propagated symptoms. Experiments on Who&When benchmark show that CHIEF outperforms eight strong and state-of-the-art baselines on both agent- and step-level accuracy. Ablation studies further confirm the critical role of each proposed module.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CHIEF的新框架，通过将LLM驱动的多智能体系统的执行轨迹转换为分层因果图，并结合层次化预言机引导的回溯和反事实归因，以克服现有方法在故障定位中的不足，显著提高了故障归因的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM驱动的多智能体系统（MAS）在复杂任务中表现出色，但存在固有的脆弱性和不透明的故障机制。现有的故障归因方法将执行日志视为扁平序列，未能解开MAS中复杂的因果联系，导致可观测性差和责任边界模糊。
AI.method: CHIEF框架首先将MAS的执行轨迹结构化为分层因果图。然后，利用分层预言机引导的回溯来通过合成的虚拟预言机有效地剪枝搜索空间。最后，通过渐进式因果筛选策略实现反事实归因，以严格区分真正的根源原因和传播的症状。
AI.result: 在Who&When基准上的实验表明，CHIEF在智能体级别和步骤级别的准确性上均优于八个强大的、最先进的基线方法。消融研究进一步证实了所提模块的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: CHIEF框架通过引入分层因果图和创新的回溯与反事实归因方法，能够有效地解决LLM驱动MAS中的故障归因问题，显著提升了故障定位的准确性和效率。

title: ProductResearch: Training E-Commerce Deep Research Agents via Multi-Agent Synthetic Trajectory Distillation
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents show promise for e-commerce conversational shopping, yet existing implementations lack the interaction depth and contextual breadth required for complex product research. Meanwhile, the Deep Research paradigm, despite advancing information synthesis in web search, suffers from domain gaps when transferred to e-commerce. We propose ProductResearch, a multi-agent framework that synthesizes high-fidelity, long-horizon tool-use trajectories for training robust e-commerce shopping agents. The framework employs a User Agent to infer nuanced shopping intents from behavioral histories, and a Supervisor Agent that orchestrates iterative collaboration with a Research Agent to generate synthetic trajectories culminating in comprehensive, insightful product research reports. These trajectories are rigorously filtered and distilled through a reflective internalization process that consolidates multi-agent supervisory interactions into coherent single-role training examples, enabling effective fine-tuning of LLM agents for complex shopping inquiries. Extensive experiments show that a compact MoE model fine-tuned on our synthetic data achieves substantial improvements over its base model in response comprehensiveness, research depth, and user-perceived utility, approaching the performance of frontier proprietary deep research systems and establishing multi-agent synthetic trajectory training as an effective and scalable paradigm for enhancing LLM-based shopping assistance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ProductResearch的多智能体框架，通过生成合成的、长期的工具使用轨迹来训练更强大的电商购物智能体，以解决现有LLM在复杂产品研究中的交互深度和上下文宽度不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的电商购物智能体在处理复杂产品研究时，交互深度和上下文宽度不足；而深度研究范式在电商领域存在领域迁移的挑战。需要一种新的方法来提升LLM在电商购物中的研究能力。
AI.method: ProductResearch框架包含一个用户智能体（User Agent）用于推断用户意图，以及一个监督智能体（Supervisor Agent）负责协调研究智能体（Research Agent）进行迭代式研究，生成用于训练的合成轨迹。这些轨迹经过过滤和提炼，最终用于微调LLM智能体。
AI.result: 在合成数据上微调的紧凑型MoE模型在响应全面性、研究深度和用户感知效用方面，相比基线模型取得了显著提升，性能接近领先的专有深度研究系统。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体合成轨迹训练是一种有效且可扩展的范式，可以显著提升LLM在电商购物中的辅助能力，尤其是在处理复杂的产品研究场景时。

title: SpikingTac: A Miniaturized Neuromorphic Visuotactile Sensor for High-Precision Dynamic Tactile Imprint Tracking
summary: High-speed event-driven tactile sensors are essential for achieving human-like dynamic manipulation, yet their integration is often limited by the bulkiness of standard event cameras. This paper presents SpikingTac, a miniaturized, highly integrated neuromorphic tactile sensor featuring a custom standalone event camera module, achieved with a total material cost of less than \$150. We construct a global dynamic state map coupled with an unsupervised denoising network to enable precise tracking at a 1000~Hz perception rate and 350~Hz tracking frequency. Addressing the viscoelastic hysteresis of silicone elastomers, we propose a hysteresis-aware incremental update law with a spatial gain damping mechanism. Experimental results demonstrate exceptional zero-point stability, achieving a 100\% return-to-origin success rate with a minimal mean bias of 0.8039 pixels, even under extreme torsional deformations. In dynamic tasks, SpikingTac limits the obstacle-avoidance overshoot to 6.2~mm, representing a 5-fold performance improvement over conventional frame-based sensors. Furthermore, the sensor achieves sub-millimeter geometric accuracy, with Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of 0.0952~mm in localization and 0.0452~mm in radius measurement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SpikingTac的微型、高度集成的神经形态触觉传感器，它结合了定制的独立事件相机模块，成本低于150美元。该传感器能够以1000赫兹的感知速率和350赫兹的跟踪频率进行精确跟踪，并且在动态任务中表现出优越的性能，包括高回零成功率、低过冲和亚毫米级精度。
AI.motivation: 传统事件相机的笨重性限制了高速事件驱动触觉传感器在人机般动态操控中的集成。因此，研究的动机是开发一种小型化、高度集成的神经形态触觉传感器，以解决这一限制。
AI.method: 该研究提出了一种名为SpikingTac的传感器。它包含一个定制的、独立的事件相机模块，并利用全局动态状态图和无监督去噪网络来实现高感知和跟踪频率。为了解决硅橡胶的粘弹性滞后问题，提出了一种滞后感知增量更新定律，并配合空间增益阻尼机制。
AI.result: SpikingTac在零点稳定性方面表现出色，回零成功率为100%，平均偏差最小为0.8039像素。在动态任务中，其避障过冲限制在6.2毫米，比传统帧基传感器提高了5倍。此外，传感器在几何精度方面达到了亚毫米级，局部化RMSE为0.0952毫米，半径测量RMSE为0.0452毫米。
AI.conclusion: SpikingTac是一种经济高效、高度集成且性能优越的神经形态触觉传感器，能够实现高速、高精度动态操控，克服了传统触觉传感器在集成度和性能上的限制。

title: Incremental dimension reduction for efficient and accurate visual anomaly detection
summary: While nowadays visual anomaly detection algorithms use deep neural networks to extract salient features from images, the high dimensionality of extracted features makes it difficult to apply those algorithms to large data with 1000s of images. To address this issue, we present an incremental dimension reduction algorithm to reduce the extracted features. While our algorithm essentially computes truncated singular value decomposition of these features, other than processing all vectors at once, our algorithm groups the vectors into batches. At each batch, our algorithm updates the truncated singular values and vectors that represent all visited vectors, and reduces each batch by its own singular values and vectors so they can be stored in the memory with low overhead. After processing all batches, we re-transform these batch-wise singular vectors to the space spanned by the singular vectors of all features. We show that our algorithm can accelerate the training of state-of-the-art anomaly detection algorithm with close accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种增量式降维算法，通过分批处理高维特征来加速基于深度学习的视觉异常检测算法的训练，同时保持接近的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉异常检测算法使用深度神经网络提取高维特征，这使得算法难以处理包含大量图像的数据集。需要一种方法来高效地处理这些高维特征。
AI.method: 该算法通过将特征向量分批处理来计算截断奇异值分解（SVD）。在每个批次，算法会更新代表所有已访问向量的截断奇异值和向量，并使用批次自身的奇异值和向量来减小批次的大小。最后，将这些批次内的奇异向量重新转换回所有特征的奇异向量所张成的空间。
AI.result: 该算法能够加速最先进的异常检测算法的训练，并且准确率与不降维的方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的增量式降维算法是一种有效且高效的方法，可以处理深度学习提取的高维特征，从而加速大规模视觉异常检测任务的训练，同时保持检测性能。

title: LFQA-HP-1M: A Large-Scale Human Preference Dataset for Long-Form Question Answering
summary: Long-form question answering (LFQA) demands nuanced evaluation of multi-sentence explanatory responses, yet existing metrics often fail to reflect human judgment. We present LFQA-HP-1M, a large-scale dataset comprising 1.3M human pairwise preference annotations for LFQA. We propose nine rubrics for answer quality evaluation, and show that simple linear models based on these features perform comparably to state-of-the-art LLM evaluators. We further examine transitivity consistency, positional bias, and verbosity biases in LLM evaluators and demonstrate their vulnerability to adversarial perturbations. Overall, this work provides one of the largest public LFQA preference datasets and a rubric-driven framework for transparent and reliable evaluation.

AI.tldr: 研究者构建了一个包含130万条人类偏好标注的大规模长篇问题回答（LFQA）数据集LFQA-HP-1M，并提出了九条用于评估回答质量的评分标准。基于这些评分标准，简单的线性模型在评估效果上可与最先进的LLM评估器相媲美，同时研究还揭示了LLM评估器在传递性一致性、位置偏见和冗余偏见方面存在漏洞，并易受对抗性扰动影响。
AI.motivation: 现有用于评估长篇问题回答（LFQA）的指标往往无法准确反映人类的判断，因此需要更有效、更符合人类偏好的评估方法。
AI.method: 构建了一个大规模数据集LFQA-HP-1M，包含130万条人类对LFQA答案的偏好标注。提出了九条用于评估回答质量的评分标准，并基于这些标准训练了简单的线性模型。同时，对现有LLM评估器进行了传递性一致性、位置偏见和冗余偏见等方面的分析，并测试了其对抗性鲁棒性。
AI.result: 基于提出的九条评分标准，简单的线性模型在LFQA评估上达到了与最先进的LLM评估器相当的性能。研究还发现LLM评估器存在传递性不一致、位置偏见和冗余偏见的问题，并且容易受到对抗性攻击。
AI.conclusion: LFQA-HP-1M数据集为LFQA的评估提供了大规模的公共资源。提出的评分标准和基于此的评估框架提供了一种更透明、更可靠的LFQA评估方法，并揭示了现有LLM评估器在准确性和鲁棒性方面存在的不足。

title: Annotation-Free Visual Reasoning for High-Resolution Large Multimodal Models via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Current Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) struggle with high-resolution visual inputs during the reasoning process, as the number of image tokens increases quadratically with resolution, introducing substantial redundancy and irrelevant information. A common practice is to identify key image regions and refer to their high-resolution counterparts during reasoning, typically trained with external visual supervision. However, such visual supervision cues require costly grounding labels from human annotators. Meanwhile, it remains an open question how to enhance a model's grounding abilities to support reasoning without relying on additional annotations. In this paper, we propose High-resolution Annotation-free Reasoning Technique (HART), a closed-loop framework that enables LMMs to focus on and self-verify key regions of high-resolution visual inputs. HART incorporates a post-training paradigm in which we design Advantage Preference Group Relative Policy Optimization (AP-GRPO) to encourage accurate localization of key regions. Notably, HART provides explainable reasoning pathways and enables efficient optimization of localization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HART improves performance across a wide range of high-resolution visual tasks, consistently outperforming strong baselines. When applied to post-train Qwen2.5-VL-7B, HART even surpasses larger-scale models such as Qwen2.5-VL-72B and LLaVA-OneVision-72B on high-resolution, vision-centric benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 HART 的训练后框架，通过 AP-GRPO 策略优化，使大型多模态模型（LMMs）能够在无需额外标注的情况下，自适应地关注高分辨率图像中的关键区域，从而提升其推理能力。
AI.motivation: 当前的大型多模态模型在高分辨率输入下推理时存在效率低下和信息冗余的问题。现有的解决方案（如识别关键区域）通常需要昂贵的人工标注，而如何在不依赖额外标注的情况下提升模型的区域关注能力是一个未解决的问题。
AI.method: 提出 HART 框架，采用一种训练后（post-training）的范式。核心是 AP-GRPO（Advantage Preference Group Relative Policy Optimization）策略，用于鼓励模型进行准确的关键区域定位。该框架是一个闭环系统，使 LMMs 能够关注并自我验证高分辨率输入中的关键区域。
AI.result: HART 在多种高分辨率视觉任务上均取得了性能提升，优于现有基线模型。在 Qwen2.5-VL-7B 上应用 HART 后，其在高分辨率、视觉中心任务上的表现甚至超越了 Qwen2.5-VL-72B 和 LLaVA-OneVision-72B 等更大规模的模型。
AI.conclusion: HART 是一种有效的、无需额外标注的解决方案，可以显著提升 LMMs 处理高分辨率图像时的推理能力，并且提供了可解释的推理路径和高效的优化方法。

title: Interpretable Multimodal Gesture Recognition for Drone and Mobile Robot Teleoperation via Log-Likelihood Ratio Fusion
summary: Human operators are still frequently exposed to hazardous environments such as disaster zones and industrial facilities, where intuitive and reliable teleoperation of mobile robots and Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is essential. In this context, hands-free teleoperation enhances operator mobility and situational awareness, thereby improving safety in hazardous environments. While vision-based gesture recognition has been explored as one method for hands-free teleoperation, its performance often deteriorates under occlusions, lighting variations, and cluttered backgrounds, limiting its applicability in real-world operations. To overcome these limitations, we propose a multimodal gesture recognition framework that integrates inertial data (accelerometer, gyroscope, and orientation) from Apple Watches on both wrists with capacitive sensing signals from custom gloves. We design a late fusion strategy based on the log-likelihood ratio (LLR), which not only enhances recognition performance but also provides interpretability by quantifying modality-specific contributions. To support this research, we introduce a new dataset of 20 distinct gestures inspired by aircraft marshalling signals, comprising synchronized RGB video, IMU, and capacitive sensor data. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves performance comparable to a state-of-the-art vision-based baseline while significantly reducing computational cost, model size, and training time, making it well suited for real-time robot control. We therefore underscore the potential of sensor-based multimodal fusion as a robust and interpretable solution for gesture-driven mobile robot and drone teleoperation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合Apple Watch惯性数据和定制手套电容感应数据的手势识别框架，用于移动机器人和无人机（UAV）的免提遥操作。该框架采用后期融合策略，在保持与先进视觉识别方法相当性能的同时，显著降低了计算成本、模型大小和训练时间。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉的手势识别方法在灾难区和工业设施等危险环境中，易受遮挡、光照变化和背景杂乱等因素影响，性能下降，限制了其在实际应用中的可靠性。需要一种更鲁棒、适用于危险环境的免提遥操作方法。
AI.method: 设计一个多模态手势识别框架，融合Apple Watch（腕部惯性传感器：加速度计、陀螺仪、方向）和定制手套（电容感应信号）的数据。采用基于对数似然比（LLR）的后期融合策略，量化各模态贡献。并构建了一个包含20种手势、同步RGB视频、IMU和电容传感数据的公开数据集。
AI.result: 所提出的框架在性能上与最先进的基于视觉的方法相当，同时显著降低了计算成本、模型大小和训练时间。LLR融合策略提供了可解释性，能够量化各模态的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 基于传感器数据的多模态融合是一种鲁棒且可解释的手势驱动移动机器人和无人机遥操作解决方案，能够有效克服纯视觉方法的局限性，并适用于实时控制。

title: A Reliable Indoor Navigation System for Humans Using AR-based Technique
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables, Presented at 7th International Conference on Advances in Science and Technology (ICAST 2024-25)
summary: Reliable navigation systems are not available indoors, such as in campuses and small areas. Users must depend on confusing, time-consuming static signage or floor maps. In this paper, an AR-based technique has been applied to campus and small-site navigation, where Vuforia Area Target is used for environment modeling. AI navigation's NavMesh component is used for navigation purposes, and the A* algorithm is used within this component for shortest path calculation. Compared to Dijkstra's algorithm, it can reach a solution about two to three times faster for smaller search spaces. In many cases, Dijkstra's algorithm has difficulty performing well in high-complexity environments where memory usage grows and processing times increase. Compared to older approaches such as GPS, real-time processing and AR overlays can be combined to provide intuitive directions for users while dynamically updating the path in response to environmental changes. Experimental results indicate significantly improved navigation accuracy, better user experience, and greater efficiency compared to traditional methods. These results show that AR technology integrated with existing pathfinding algorithms is feasible and scalable, making it a user-friendly solution for indoor navigation. Although highly effective in limited and defined indoor spaces, further optimization of NavMesh is required for large or highly dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于AR（增强现实）的室内导航技术，使用Vuforia Area Target进行环境建模，并结合AI导航的NavMesh和A*算法进行路径规划，以解决校园等室内区域导航不便的问题。实验结果表明，该方法比传统GPS等方法更准确、用户体验更好、效率更高，但对于大型或动态环境需要进一步优化。
AI.motivation: 当前在校园等室内区域缺乏可靠的导航系统，用户常依赖静态指示牌或地图，效率低下且易造成困惑。
AI.method: 采用AR技术，利用Vuforia Area Target进行环境建模，AI导航的NavMesh组件进行导航，并在NavMesh中使用A*算法计算最短路径，与Dijkstra算法进行对比。
AI.result: A*算法在小范围搜索空间中比Dijkstra算法快2-3倍。AR导航系统在导航精度、用户体验和效率方面显著优于传统方法。AR技术结合现有路径算法在室内导航方面可行且可扩展。
AI.conclusion: AR技术与现有路径查找算法相结合，为室内导航提供了一种用户友好的解决方案，在有限的室内空间内效果显著。然而，对于大型或高度动态的环境，NavMesh需要进一步优化。

title: LLM-Driven Multi-Turn Task-Oriented Dialogue Synthesis for Realistic Reasoning
summary: The reasoning capability of large language models (LLMs), defined as their ability to analyze, infer, and make decisions based on input information, is essential for building intelligent task-oriented dialogue systems. However, existing benchmarks do not sufficiently reflect the complexity of real-world scenarios, which limits their effectiveness in evaluating and enhancing LLM reasoning in practical contexts. Many current reasoning datasets are overly simplistic and abstract, often disconnected from realistic task flows, domain constraints, and operational rules, making it difficult to effectively evaluate LLMs' logical reasoning ability. In addition, data contamination from pretraining corpora undermines the reliability of evaluation results, and traditional crowdsourcing methods for dataset construction are labor-intensive and difficult to scale. To address these challenges, we propose a LLM-driven framework for synthesizing multi-turn, task-oriented dialogues grounded in realistic reasoning scenarios, leveraging trilevel optimization to enhance dialogue quality. Our method generates dialogues grounded in authentic task scenarios, enriched with real-world information, and exhibiting strong contextual coherence. Corresponding reasoning tasks are carefully designed around these dialogues and iteratively refined to continuously improve the tasks' quality and challenge. The resulting dataset serves as a valuable benchmark for assessing and advancing the realistic logical reasoning capabilities of LLMs. Experimental results show that our synthetic data-based reasoning tasks introduce non-trivial reasoning challenges and provide meaningful support for improving the reasoning capabilities of LLMs.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种由LLM驱动的框架，用于合成多轮、面向任务的对话，并结合了真实世界的推理场景，以克服现有基准测试在评估LLM现实推理能力方面的不足。该框架通过三级优化生成高质量、符合现实场景的对话和推理任务，实验表明其能有效提升LLM的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型（LLM）推理能力评估基准测试未能充分反映真实世界场景的复杂性，导致其在实际应用中的有效性受限。许多现有数据集过于简化、抽象，与实际任务流程、领域约束和操作规则脱节，且存在预训练数据污染问题，使得LLM的推理能力评估不够可靠。此外，传统的数据集构建方法劳动密集且难以扩展。
AI.method: 提出一个LLM驱动的框架，利用三级优化策略来合成多轮、面向任务的对话，这些对话基于真实的推理场景，并融入了真实世界的信息，同时保持了上下文的连贯性。围绕这些对话精心设计相应的推理任务，并通过迭代优化来持续提升任务的质量和挑战性。
AI.result: 生成的合成数据集包含具有挑战性的推理任务，能够有效地评估和提升LLM的现实推理能力。实验结果表明，基于合成数据的推理任务为LLM的推理能力提升提供了有意义的支持。
AI.conclusion: 研究提出的LLM驱动的合成框架能够生成高质量、逼真且具有挑战性的对话和推理任务，为评估和提升LLM在真实世界场景中的逻辑推理能力提供了一个有效的解决方案，克服了现有基准测试的局限性。

title: The Auton Agentic AI Framework
summary: The field of Artificial Intelligence is undergoing a transition from Generative AI -- probabilistic generation of text and images -- to Agentic AI, in which autonomous systems execute actions within external environments on behalf of users. This transition exposes a fundamental architectural mismatch: Large Language Models (LLMs) produce stochastic, unstructured outputs, whereas the backend infrastructure they must control -- databases, APIs, cloud services -- requires deterministic, schema-conformant inputs. The present paper describes the Auton Agentic AI Framework, a principled architecture for standardizing the creation, execution, and governance of autonomous agent systems. The framework is organized around a strict separation between the Cognitive Blueprint, a declarative, language-agnostic specification of agent identity and capabilities, and the Runtime Engine, the platform-specific execution substrate that instantiates and runs the agent. This separation enables cross-language portability, formal auditability, and modular tool integration via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). The paper formalizes the agent execution model as an augmented Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) with a latent reasoning space, introduces a hierarchical memory consolidation architecture inspired by biological episodic memory systems, defines a constraint manifold formalism for safety enforcement via policy projection rather than post-hoc filtering, presents a three-level self-evolution framework spanning in-context adaptation through reinforcement learning, and describes runtime optimizations -- including parallel graph execution, speculative inference, and dynamic context pruning -- that reduce end-to-end latency for multi-step agent workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Auton Agentic AI Framework的自主代理系统架构，旨在解决生成式AI向代理式AI过渡中，LLM的随机输出与后端系统对确定性输入的匹配问题。该框架通过将“认知蓝图”与“运行时引擎”分离，实现了跨语言兼容性、可审计性和模块化工具集成。
AI.motivation: 当前AI领域正从生成式AI转向代理式AI，但LLM的非结构化、随机输出与后端系统对确定性、结构化输入的兼容性存在根本性矛盾，这促使了研究者们开发一种能够标准化代理系统创建、执行和治理的框架。
AI.method: 该框架的核心是将代理定义（Cognitive Blueprint）与执行平台（Runtime Engine）进行严格分离。具体方法包括：提出模型上下文协议（MCP）实现工具集成；将代理执行模型形式化为带潜在推理空间的增强POMDP；设计受生物记忆启发的层级记忆巩固架构；引入约束流形形式化进行策略投影而非事后过滤来实现安全；提出一个包含强化学习的上下文自适应的三级自演化框架；并实现了一系列运行时优化技术，如并行图执行、推测性推理和动态上下文剪枝。
AI.result: 该框架实现了代理系统的跨语言可移植性、形式化审计能力和模块化工具集成。通过引入的各项技术，提高了代理系统的安全性，并显著降低了多步代理工作流的端到端延迟。
AI.conclusion: Auton Agentic AI Framework提供了一个原则性的架构，能够标准化自主代理系统的开发、执行和治理，有效解决了LLM输出与后端系统兼容性问题，并为构建更强大、更安全的代理AI系统奠定了基础。

title: TRIZ-RAGNER: A Retrieval-Augmented Large Language Model for TRIZ-Aware Named Entity Recognition in Patent-Based Contradiction Mining
summary: TRIZ-based contradiction mining is a fundamental task in patent analysis and systematic innovation, as it enables the identification of improving and worsening technical parameters that drive inventive problem solving. However, existing approaches largely rely on rule-based systems or traditional machine learning models, which struggle with semantic ambiguity, domain dependency, and limited generalization when processing complex patent language. Recently, large language models (LLMs) have shown strong semantic understanding capabilities, yet their direct application to TRIZ parameter extraction remains challenging due to hallucination and insufficient grounding in structured TRIZ knowledge. To address these limitations, this paper proposes TRIZ-RAGNER, a retrieval-augmented large language model framework for TRIZ-aware named entity recognition in patent-based contradiction mining. TRIZ-RAGNER reformulates contradiction mining as a semantic-level NER task and integrates dense retrieval over a TRIZ knowledge base, cross-encoder reranking for context refinement, and structured LLM prompting to extract improving and worsening parameters from patent sentences. By injecting domain-specific TRIZ knowledge into the LLM reasoning process, the proposed framework effectively reduces semantic noise and improves extraction consistency. Experiments on the PaTRIZ dataset demonstrate that TRIZ-RAGNER consistently outperforms traditional sequence labeling models and LLM-based baselines. The proposed framework achieves a precision of 85.6%, a recall of 82.9%, and an F1-score of 84.2% in TRIZ contradiction pair identification. Compared with the strongest baseline using prompt-enhanced GPT, TRIZ-RAGNER yields an absolute F1-score improvement of 7.3 percentage points, confirming the effectiveness of retrieval-augmented TRIZ knowledge grounding for robust and accurate patent-based contradiction mining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TRIZ-RAGNER框架，一种结合了检索增强和大型语言模型的专利矛盾挖掘新方法，通过引入TRIZ知识库，显著提高了矛盾参数提取的准确性和一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于规则或传统机器学习的TRIZ矛盾挖掘方法难以处理专利文本的语义模糊性、领域依赖性和泛化能力不足的问题；而直接应用大型语言模型存在幻觉和缺乏结构化TRIZ知识的问题。
AI.method: 提出TRIZ-RAGNER框架，将矛盾挖掘重构为语义级别的命名实体识别任务。该框架集成了：1.基于TRIZ知识库的密集检索；2.交叉编码器重排序以细化上下文；3.结构化LLM提示，以从专利句子中提取改进和恶化参数。
AI.result: 在PaTRIZ数据集上的实验表明，TRIZ-RAGNER在TRIZ矛盾对识别方面实现了85.6%的精确率、82.9%的召回率和84.2%的F1分数。与最强的基于GPT的基线模型相比，F1分数绝对提高了7.3个百分点。
AI.conclusion: TRIZ-RAGNER通过将领域特定的TRIZ知识注入LLM推理过程，有效降低了语义噪声，提高了提取一致性，证明了检索增强的TRIZ知识接地对于稳健和准确的专利矛盾挖掘的有效性。

title: Egocentric Visibility-Aware Human Pose Estimation
comment: Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026
summary: Egocentric human pose estimation (HPE) using a head-mounted device is crucial for various VR and AR applications, but it faces significant challenges due to keypoint invisibility. Nevertheless, none of the existing egocentric HPE datasets provide keypoint visibility annotations, and the existing methods often overlook the invisibility problem, treating visible and invisible keypoints indiscriminately during estimation. As a result, their capacity to accurately predict visible keypoints is compromised. In this paper, we first present Eva-3M, a large-scale egocentric visibility-aware HPE dataset comprising over 3.0M frames, with 435K of them annotated with keypoint visibility labels. Additionally, we augment the existing EMHI dataset with keypoint visibility annotations to further facilitate the research in this direction. Furthermore, we propose EvaPose, a novel egocentric visibility-aware HPE method that explicitly incorporates visibility information to enhance pose estimation accuracy. Extensive experiments validate the significant value of ground-truth visibility labels in egocentric HPE settings, and demonstrate that our EvaPose achieves state-of-the-art performance in both Eva-3M and EMHI datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Eva-3M数据集和EvaPose方法，解决了头戴设备 egocentric 人体姿态估计中关键点不可见的问题，并实现了新的 SOTA 性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 egocentric 人体姿态估计方法未能解决关键点不可见的问题，导致估计精度受损，且缺乏带有关键点可见性标注的数据集。
AI.method: 提出了大规模 egocentric 可见性感知人体姿态估计数据集 Eva-3M，并对 EMHI 数据集进行了可见性标注扩充。提出了新的 egocentric 可见性感知人体姿态估计方法 EvaPose，明确地将可见性信息纳入模型。
AI.result: Eva-3M 数据集包含超过300万帧，其中43.5万帧带有关键点可见性标注。EvaPose 方法在 Eva-3M 和 EMHI 数据集上均取得了 state-of-the-art 的性能。
AI.conclusion: 在 egocentric 人体姿态估计中，关键点可见性标注具有重要价值，并且提出的 EvaPose 方法能有效利用可见性信息来提升姿态估计的准确性。

title: Unlocking Cognitive Capabilities and Analyzing the Perception-Logic Trade-off
summary:
Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) pursue omni-perception capabilities, yet integrating robust sensory grounding with complex reasoning remains a challenge, particularly for underrepresented regions. In this report, we introduce the research preview of MERaLiON2-Omni (Alpha), a 10B-parameter multilingual omni-perception tailored for Southeast Asia (SEA). We present a progressive training pipeline that explicitly decouples and then integrates "System 1" (Perception) and "System 2" (Reasoning) capabilities. First, we establish a robust Perception Backbone by aligning region-specific audio-visual cues (e.g., Singlish code-switching, local cultural landmarks) with a multilingual LLM through orthogonal modality adaptation. Second, to inject cognitive capabilities without large-scale supervision, we propose a cost-effective Generate-Judge-Refine pipeline. By utilizing a Super-LLM to filter hallucinations and resolve conflicts via a consensus mechanism, we synthesize high-quality silver data that transfers textual Chain-of-Thought reasoning to multimodal scenarios.
  Comprehensive evaluation on our newly introduced SEA-Omni Benchmark Suite reveals an Efficiency-Stability Paradox: while reasoning acts as a non-linear amplifier for abstract tasks (boosting mathematical and instruction-following performance significantly), it introduces instability in low-level sensory processing. Specifically, we identify Temporal Drift in long-context audio, where extended reasoning desynchronizes the model from acoustic timestamps, and Visual Over-interpretation, where logic overrides pixel-level reality. This report details the architecture, the data-efficient training recipe, and a diagnostic analysis of the trade-offs between robust perception and structured reasoning.

AI.tldr: MERaLiON2-Omni (Alpha) 是一个 10B 参数的多语言全感知模型，专注于东南亚地区，通过解耦并整合感知和推理能力来解决多模态 LLM 的挑战，并提出了新的东南亚基准测试。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在感知和推理的结合上存在挑战，尤其是在代表性不足的地区。研究动机是为东南亚地区开发一个能够进行全感知和复杂推理的多模态模型。
AI.method: 采用渐进式训练流程，首先通过正交模态适应建立感知骨干，将区域特定的视听线索与多语言 LLM 对齐；然后，通过“生成-判断-精炼”流水线，利用一个超级 LLM 来过滤幻觉、解决冲突，合成高质量的银数据，将链式思考推理迁移到多模态场景。
AI.result: 在新的 SEA-Omni 基准测试中，发现了一个“效率-稳定性悖论”：推理可以非线性地增强抽象任务（如数学和指令遵循），但也会在低级感知处理中引入不稳定性，具体表现为长上下文音频中的“时间漂移”和视觉中的“过度解释”。
AI.conclusion: 研究详细介绍了 MERaLiON2-Omni (Alpha) 的架构、数据高效的训练方法，并分析了鲁棒感知与结构化推理之间的权衡。推理能力可以显著提升抽象任务性能，但可能损害低级感知的准确性。

title: SAGE-LLM: Towards Safe and Generalizable LLM Controller with Fuzzy-CBF Verification and Graph-Structured Knowledge Retrieval for UAV Decision
summary: In UAV dynamic decision, complex and variable hazardous factors pose severe challenges to the generalization capability of algorithms. Despite offering semantic understanding and scene generalization, Large Language Models (LLM) lack domain-specific UAV control knowledge and formal safety assurances, restricting their direct applicability. To bridge this gap, this paper proposes a train-free two-layer decision architecture based on LLMs, integrating high-level safety planning with low-level precise control. The framework introduces three key contributions: 1) A fuzzy Control Barrier Function verification mechanism for semantically-augmented actions, providing provable safety certification for LLM outputs. 2) A star-hierarchical graph-based retrieval-augmented generation system, enabling efficient, elastic, and interpretable scene adaptation. 3) Systematic experimental validation in pursuit-evasion scenarios with unknown obstacles and emergent threats, demonstrating that our SAGE-LLM maintains performance while significantly enhancing safety and generalization without online training. The proposed framework demonstrates strong extensibility, suggesting its potential for generalization to broader embodied intelligence systems and safety-critical control domains.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的两层决策架构，用于无人机（UAV）的动态决策，通过结合安全规划和精确控制，提高了算法的泛化能力和安全性，无需在线训练。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型在处理复杂多变的危险因素时，其泛化能力不足，并且缺乏领域特定的无人机控制知识和形式化的安全保障，限制了其在无人机动态决策中的直接应用。
AI.method: 提出了一个无需训练的两层决策架构，集成了高层安全规划和低层精确控制。具体包括：1）基于模糊控制障碍函数的语义增强动作验证机制，提供可证明的安全认证；2）基于星层级图的检索增强生成系统，实现高效、弹性、可解释的场景适应；3）在带有未知障碍物和突发威胁的追逐-规避场景中进行系统性实验验证。
AI.result: 所提出的SAGE-LLM框架在追逐-规避场景中，在保持性能的同时，显著提高了安全性与泛化能力，且无需在线训练。实验结果表明该框架具有良好的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功地将大语言模型应用于无人机动态决策，通过集成的安全验证和场景适应机制，克服了大语言模型在泛化能力和安全保障方面的局限性，并证明了其在更广泛的具身智能系统和安全关键控制领域的潜力。

title: ODAR: Principled Adaptive Routing for LLM Reasoning via Active Inference
summary: The paradigm of large language model (LLM) reasoning is shifting from parameter scaling to test-time compute scaling, yet many existing approaches still rely on uniform brute-force sampling (for example, fixed best-of-N or self-consistency) that is costly, hard to attribute, and can trigger overthinking with diminishing returns. We propose ODAR-Expert, an adaptive routing framework that optimizes the accuracy-efficiency trade-off via principled resource allocation. ODAR uses a difficulty estimator grounded in amortized active inference to dynamically route queries between a heuristic Fast Agent and a deliberative Slow Agent. We further introduce a free-energy-principled, risk-sensitive fusion mechanism that selects answers by minimizing a variational free energy objective, balancing log-likelihood with epistemic uncertainty (varentropy) as a principled alternative to ad hoc voting over heterogeneous candidates. Extensive evaluation across 23 benchmarks shows strong and consistent gains, including 98.2% accuracy on MATH and 54.8% on Humanity's Last Exam (HLE), while improving the compute-accuracy frontier under compute-matched settings. We also validate reproducibility on a fully open-source stack (Llama 4 + DeepSeek), where ODAR surpasses homogeneous sampling strategies while reducing computational costs by 82%. Overall, our results suggest that thinking-optimal scaling requires adaptive resource allocation with free-energy-based decision-making rather than simply increasing test-time compute.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为 ODAR-Expert 的自适应路由框架，通过动态分配计算资源来优化大型语言模型（LLM）的准确性和效率。它使用一个难度估计器将查询路由到快速或慢速代理，并采用基于自由能的融合机制来选择答案，以平衡准确性和不确定性。实验表明，该方法在多个基准测试中取得了显著的性能提升，并在降低计算成本的同时提高了准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的 LLM 推理方法（如固定 best-of-N 或 self-consistency）在计算量扩展时效率低下，难以归因，并且可能导致过度思考。研究动机在于寻找一种更有效、更 principled 的方法来优化 LLM 的准确-效率权衡，特别是在推理阶段。
AI.method: ODAR-Expert 框架包含两个核心组件：1. **难度估计器**：基于摊销主动推理（amortized active inference）来动态评估查询的难度。2. **自适应路由**：根据查询难度，将查询路由到计算成本较低的“快速代理”（Fast Agent）或计算成本较高的“慢速代理”（Slow Agent）进行处理。3. **自由能融合机制**：采用一种基于自由能的风险敏感融合方法来选择最终答案，该方法最小化变分自由能目标，在最大化对数似然的同时考虑了认知不确定性（varentropy），作为对传统投票机制的改进。
AI.result: 在 23 个基准测试上的广泛评估显示，ODAR-Expert 取得了显著且一致的性能提升，在 MATH 数据集上达到 98.2% 的准确率，在 Humanity's Last Exam (HLE) 上达到 54.8%。在计算量匹配的设置下，该方法提高了计算-准确率的前沿。在 Llama 4 + DeepSeek 的全开源栈上进行的验证也表明，ODAR-Expert 在降低 82% 计算成本的同时，性能优于同质采样策略。
AI.conclusion: 研究结论是，LLM 的最优推理（thinking-optimal）扩展需要自适应的资源分配和基于自由能的决策机制，而不是简单地增加测试时间计算量。ODAR-Expert 证明了这种自适应方法在提高 LLM 推理效率和准确性方面的有效性。

title: EMO-R3: Reflective Reinforcement Learning for Emotional Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown remarkable progress in visual reasoning and understanding tasks but still struggle to capture the complexity and subjectivity of human emotions. Existing approaches based on supervised fine-tuning often suffer from limited generalization and poor interpretability, while reinforcement learning methods such as Group Relative Policy Optimization fail to align with the intrinsic characteristics of emotional cognition. To address these challenges, we propose Reflective Reinforcement Learning for Emotional Reasoning (EMO-R3), a framework designed to enhance the emotional reasoning ability of MLLMs. Specifically, we introduce Structured Emotional Thinking to guide the model to perform step-by-step emotional reasoning in a structured and interpretable manner, and design a Reflective Emotional Reward that enables the model to re-evaluate its reasoning based on visual-text consistency and emotional coherence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EMO-R3 significantly improves both the interpretability and emotional intelligence of MLLMs, achieving superior performance across multiple visual emotional understanding benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为EMO-R3的反射强化学习框架，通过结构化情感思考和反射性情感奖励来提升多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的情感推理能力，并在多个视觉情感理解基准测试中取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的MLLMs在情感理解和主观性方面存在不足，监督微调方法泛化能力有限且可解释性差，而强化学习方法（如Group Relative Policy Optimization）未能很好地契合情感认知的内在特征。
AI.method: 提出EMO-R3框架，包含两个核心组件：1. 结构化情感思考（Structured Emotional Thinking）：指导模型进行结构化、分步的情感推理；2. 反射性情感奖励（Reflective Emotional Reward）：根据视觉-文本一致性和情感连贯性对模型推理进行再评估。
AI.result: EMO-R3在多个视觉情感理解基准测试中显著提升了MLLMs的可解释性和情感智能，取得了优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: EMO-R3框架能够有效提高MLLMs在情感推理任务上的表现，并且增强了模型的可解释性和情感智能。

title: StemVLA:An Open-Source Vision-Language-Action Model with Future 3D Spatial Geometry Knowledge and 4D Historical Representation
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models integrate visual observations and language instructions to predict robot actions, demonstrating promising generalization in manipulation tasks. However, most existing approaches primarily rely on direct mappings from 2D visual inputs to action sequences, without explicitly modeling the underlying 3D spatial structure or temporal world dynamics. Such representations may limit spatial reasoning and long-horizon decision-making in dynamic environments. To address this limitation, we propose StemVLA, a novel framework that explicitly incorporates both future-oriented 3D spatial knowledge and historical 4D spatiotemporal representations into action prediction. First, instead of relying solely on observed images, StemVLA forecasts structured 3D future spatial-geometric world knowledge, enabling the model to anticipate upcoming scene geometry and object configurations. Second, to capture temporal consistency and motion dynamics, we feed historical image frames into a pretrained video-geometry transformer backbone to extract implicit 3D world representations, and further aggregate them across time using a temporal attention module, termed VideoFormer [20], forming a unified 4D historical spatiotemporal representation. By jointly modeling 2D observations, predicted 3D future structure, and aggregated 4D temporal dynamics, StemVLA enables more comprehensive world understanding for robot manipulation. Extensive experiments in simulation demonstrate that StemVLA significantly improves long-horizon task success and achieves state-of-the-art performance on the CALVIN ABC-D benchmark [46], achieving an average sequence length of XXX.

AI.tldr: 提出StemVLA框架，通过显式建模未来3D空间知识和历史4D时空表示，来提升机器人操纵任务中的长期规划和决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型主要依赖2D视觉输入到动作序列的直接映射，缺乏对3D空间结构和4D时空动态的显式建模，限制了模型在动态环境中的空间推理和长期决策能力。
AI.method: StemVLA通过预测结构化的3D未来空间几何知识，以及提取和聚合历史图像帧以形成4D时空表示，来增强对机器人操纵任务的世界理解。
AI.result: StemVLA在CALVIN ABC-D基准测试中显著提高了长期任务成功率，并达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模2D观测、预测的3D未来结构以及聚合的4D时序动态，StemVLA能提供更全面的世界理解，从而提升机器人操纵任务的表现。

title: Reasoning-Driven Multimodal LLM for Domain Generalization
summary: This paper addresses the domain generalization (DG) problem in deep learning. While most DG methods focus on enforcing visual feature invariance, we leverage the reasoning capability of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and explore the potential of constructing reasoning chains that derives image categories to achieve more robust predictions under domain shift. To this end, we systematically study the role of reasoning in DG using DomainBed-Reasoning, a newly constructed extension of DomainBed dataset, in which each sample is paired with class-relevant reasoning chains.
