AI.result: 在对当前最先进的 LLM 进行基准测试后，发现在定理证明任务上的准确率（pass@1）在 10-15% 之间，具体数值因模型而异。这表明 LLM 在达到研究级数学证明能力方面仍有巨大的提升空间。
AI.conclusion: 当前最先进的 LLM 在处理研究级数学问题，尤其是在定理证明方面，能力尚显不足。该研究提出的可更新基准测试方法为未来 LLM 在该领域的发展提供了新的评估方向和机会。

title: A Difference-in-Difference Approach to Detecting AI-Generated Images
summary: Diffusion models are able to produce AI-generated images that are almost indistinguishable from real ones. This raises concerns about their potential misuse and poses substantial challenges for detecting them. Many existing detectors rely on reconstruction error -- the difference between the input image and its reconstructed version -- as the basis for distinguishing real from fake images. However, these detectors become less effective as modern AI-generated images become increasingly similar to real ones. To address this challenge, we propose a novel difference-in-difference method. Instead of directly using the reconstruction error (a first-order difference), we compute the difference in reconstruction error -- a second-order difference -- for variance reduction and improving detection accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves strong generalization performance, enabling reliable detection of AI-generated images in the era of generative AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的二阶差分方法来检测AI生成的图像，以克服现有基于重构误差的检测器在检测高质量AI图像时的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有的AI图像检测器（通常基于重构误差）在检测日益逼真的AI生成图像方面效果不佳，这引发了对其潜在滥用的担忧。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的二阶差分方法，通过计算重构误差的差值（二阶差分）来替代直接使用重构误差（一阶差分），以实现方差降低和提高检测准确性。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法在AI生成图像检测方面表现出强大的泛化能力，能够可靠地检测出当今AI时代生成的图像。
AI.conclusion: 二阶差分方法比传统的一阶差分方法（重构误差）在检测AI生成图像方面更有效，尤其是在面对高质量、难以区分的AI生成图像时。

title: Recycling Failures: Salvaging Exploration in RLVR via Fine-Grained Off-Policy Guidance
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for enhancing the complex reasoning capabilities of Large Reasoning Models. However, standard outcome-based supervision suffers from a critical limitation that penalizes trajectories that are largely correct but fail due to several missteps as heavily as completely erroneous ones. This coarse feedback signal causes the model to discard valuable largely correct rollouts, leading to a degradation in rollout diversity that prematurely narrows the exploration space. Process Reward Models have demonstrated efficacy in providing reliable step-wise verification for test-time scaling, naively integrating these signals into RLVR as dense rewards proves ineffective.Prior methods attempt to introduce off-policy guided whole-trajectory replacement that often outside the policy model's distribution, but still fail to utilize the largely correct rollouts generated by the model itself and thus do not effectively mitigate the narrowing of the exploration space. To address these issues, we propose SCOPE (Step-wise Correction for On-Policy Exploration), a novel framework that utilizes Process Reward Models to pinpoint the first erroneous step in suboptimal rollouts and applies fine-grained, step-wise off-policy rectification. By applying precise refinement on partially correct rollout, our method effectively salvages partially correct trajectories and increases diversity score by 13.5%, thereby sustaining a broad exploration space. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach establishes new state-of-the-art results, achieving an average accuracy of 46.6% on math reasoning and exhibiting robust generalization with 53.4% accuracy on out-of-distribution reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SCOPE的新框架，利用过程奖励模型对强化学习中的次优轨迹进行逐步纠错，从而提高探索多样性并改善大型推理模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于结果的监督方法对大部分正确但有少量错误的轨迹惩罚过重，导致模型丢弃有价值的轨迹，缩小探索空间。虽然过程奖励模型可以提供逐步验证，但将其直接作为密集奖励效果不佳。先前的尝试未能有效利用模型自身生成的、大部分正确的轨迹。
AI.method: SCOPE框架利用过程奖励模型识别次优轨迹中的第一个错误步骤，并进行精细的、逐步的策略外纠正。通过对部分正确的轨迹进行精确修正，来挽救这些轨迹。
AI.result: SCOPE框架将多样性分数提高了13.5%，有效维持了广泛的探索空间。在数学推理任务上达到了46.6%的平均准确率，在分布外推理任务上表现出强大的泛化能力，准确率为53.4%。
AI.conclusion: SCOPE框架通过逐步纠正次优轨迹，能够有效利用大部分正确的轨迹，增加探索多样性，从而在大型推理模型的训练中取得SOTA性能，并展现出良好的泛化能力。

title: Task Complexity Matters: An Empirical Study of Reasoning in LLMs for Sentiment Analysis
comment: 12 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables. Accepted at PAKDD 2026
summary: Large language models (LLMs) with reasoning capabilities have fueled a compelling narrative that reasoning universally improves performance across language tasks. We test this claim through a comprehensive evaluation of 504 configurations across seven model families--including adaptive, conditional, and reinforcement learning-based reasoning architectures--on sentiment analysis datasets of varying granularity (binary, five-class, and 27-class emotion). Our findings reveal that reasoning effectiveness is strongly task-dependent, challenging prevailing assumptions: (1) Reasoning shows task-complexity dependence--binary classification degrades up to -19.9 F1 percentage points (pp), while 27-class emotion recognition gains up to +16.0pp; (2) Distilled reasoning variants underperform base models by 3-18 pp on simpler tasks, though few-shot prompting enables partial recovery; (3) Few-shot learning improves over zero-shot in most cases regardless of model type, with gains varying by architecture and task complexity; (4) Pareto frontier analysis shows base models dominate efficiency-performance trade-offs, with reasoning justified only for complex emotion recognition despite 2.1x-54x computational overhead. We complement these quantitative findings with qualitative error analysis revealing that reasoning degrades simpler tasks through systematic over-deliberation, offering mechanistic insight beyond the high-level overthinking hypothesis.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，大型语言模型（LLMs）的推理能力并非普遍提升性能，而是高度依赖于任务的复杂性。在简单任务（如二分类情感分析）上，推理甚至会降低性能，而在复杂任务（如27类情感识别）上则能带来显著提升。此外，蒸馏的推理模型在简单任务上表现不佳，而少样本学习通常能带来改进。在效率-性能权衡方面，基础模型通常更优，只有在复杂情感识别任务上，推理的性能提升才值得其高昂的计算开销。
AI.motivation: 挑战“推理能力普遍提升语言任务性能”的论调，通过实证研究探究推理在不同任务复杂度和模型架构下的实际效果。
AI.method: 对7个模型家族（包括自适应、条件和强化学习等推理架构）的504种配置，在不同粒度的情感分析数据集（二分类、五分类、27类情感）上进行了全面评估。采用了定量评估（F1分数）、帕累托前沿分析（效率-性能权衡）和定性误差分析（机制洞察）。
AI.result: 1. 推理对任务复杂度高度敏感：二分类任务性能下降高达-19.9 F1点，27类情感识别任务性能提升高达+16.0 F1点。 2. 蒸馏的推理模型在简单任务上比基础模型差3-18 F1点，少样本学习能部分恢复性能。 3. 少样本学习普遍优于零样本学习，但提升幅度因模型和任务复杂度而异。 4. 帕累托前沿分析显示，基础模型在效率-性能权衡上更优，推理仅在复杂情感识别任务上表现出优势，但计算开销高2.1x-54x。 5. 定性分析表明，推理在简单任务上会因“过度深思”而导致性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型的推理能力并非万能良药，其有效性严重依赖于任务的复杂性。在简单任务上，推理可能适得其反；而在复杂任务上，则能带来显著的性能提升。模型设计者和使用者应根据具体任务需求谨慎选择是否引入推理机制，并权衡其带来的计算开销。

title: Autonomous Inspection of Power Line Insulators with UAV on an Unmapped Transmission Tower
summary: This paper introduces an online inspection algorithm that enables an autonomous UAV to fly around a transmission tower and obtain detailed inspection images without a prior map of the tower. Our algorithm relies on camera-LiDAR sensor fusion for online detection and localization of insulators. In particular, the algorithm is based on insulator detection using a convolutional neural network, projection of LiDAR points onto the image, and filtering them using the bounding boxes. The detection pipeline is coupled with several proposed insulator localization methods based on DBSCAN, RANSAC, and PCA algorithms. The performance of the proposed online inspection algorithm and camera-LiDAR sensor fusion pipeline is demonstrated through simulation and real-world flights. In simulation, we showed that our single-flight inspection strategy can save up to 24 % of total inspection time, compared to the two-flight strategy of scanning the tower and afterwards visiting the inspection waypoints in the optimal way. In a real-world experiment, the best performing proposed method achieves a mean horizontal and vertical localization error for the insulator of 0.16 +- 0.08 m and 0.16 +- 0.11 m, respectively. Compared to the most relevant approach, the proposed method achieves more than an order of magnitude lower variance in horizontal insulator localization error.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需先验地图即可在输电塔周围自主飞行的在线检测算法，通过结合卷积神经网络、激光雷达点云投影和聚类算法等进行绝缘子检测与定位。
AI.motivation: 为了实现无需预先绘制输电塔地图即可进行自主飞行的在线检测，提高了检查效率。
AI.method: 该算法结合了相机-激光雷达传感器融合，利用卷积神经网络检测绝缘子，并将激光雷达点云投影到图像上进行过滤，结合DBSCAN、RANSAC和PCA算法进行绝缘子定位。
AI.result: 在模拟飞行中，单次飞行检查策略可节省高达24%的总检查时间。在真实世界实验中，最佳方法实现了0.16 ± 0.08 m（水平）和0.16 ± 0.11 m（垂直）的平均绝缘子定位误差，并且水平定位误差的方差比最相关方法低一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的在线检测算法和相机-激光雷达传感器融合管道能够高效、精确地在输电塔周围进行自主飞行检查，显著提高了定位精度和效率。

title: Learning Flexible Job Shop Scheduling under Limited Buffers and Material Kitting Constraints
summary: The Flexible Job Shop Scheduling Problem (FJSP) originates from real production lines, while some practical constraints are often ignored or idealized in current FJSP studies, among which the limited buffer problem has a particular impact on production efficiency. To this end, we study an extended problem that is closer to practical scenarios--the Flexible Job Shop Scheduling Problem with Limited Buffers and Material Kitting. In recent years, deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has demonstrated considerable potential in scheduling tasks. However, its capacity for state modeling remains limited when handling complex dependencies and long-term constraints. To address this, we leverage a heterogeneous graph network within the DRL framework to model the global state. By constructing efficient message passing among machines, operations, and buffers, the network focuses on avoiding decisions that may cause frequent pallet changes during long-sequence scheduling, thereby helping improve buffer utilization and overall decision quality. Experimental results on both synthetic and real production line datasets show that the proposed method outperforms traditional heuristics and advanced DRL methods in terms of makespan and pallet changes, and also achieves a good balance between solution quality and computational cost. Furthermore, a supplementary video is provided to showcase a simulation system that effectively visualizes the progression of the production line.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合异构图网络（HGN）的深度强化学习（DRL）方法，用于解决具有有限缓冲区和物料套件的柔性作业车间调度问题（FJSP）。该方法通过改进状态建模来提高调度效率，减少换板次数，并在合成和实际数据集上表现优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的FJSP研究常常忽略或简化实际生产中的约束，特别是有限缓冲区问题，这严重影响了生产效率。同时，现有的DRL方法在处理复杂依赖和长期约束时，其状态建模能力有限。
AI.method: 提出了一种结合异构图网络（HGN）的DRL框架。HGN能够构建机器、操作和缓冲区之间的消息传递，从而对全局状态进行有效建模，特别关注避免可能导致频繁换板的决策，以提高缓冲区利用率和决策质量。
AI.result: 在合成和实际生产线数据集上，所提出的方法在最小化总生产时间（makespan）和减少换板次数方面，均优于传统的启发式方法和先进的DRL方法。此外，该方法在解的质量和计算成本之间取得了良好的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于HGN的DRL方法能够有效解决具有有限缓冲区和物料套件的FJSP问题，显著提升了生产效率和决策质量，并且在实际应用中具有较好的权衡能力。同时，提供了一个可视化仿真系统来展示生产线进度。

title: Preference Packing: Efficient Preference Optimization for Large Language Models
summary: Resource-efficient training optimization techniques are becoming increasingly important as the size of large language models (LLMs) continues to grow. In particular, batch packing is commonly used in pre-training and supervised fine-tuning to achieve resource-efficient training. We propose preference packing, a method to enhance resource efficiency in training techniques that use data with different responses for the same input prompt, such as reward models or Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). Preference packing improves resource efficiency by reducing the attention operations for duplicate input prompts and decreasing KV cache memory usage. We conducted experiments on text-only datasets and image-included datasets and achieved at least 37% reduction in training time. Notably, this method can be applied alongside existing optimization techniques such as batch sorting, resulting in a 3.22x speedup.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为“偏好打包”（preference packing）的新方法，通过减少重复输入提示的注意力操作和降低KV缓存内存使用量，提高了在训练具有不同响应的数据（如奖励模型或DPO）时的资源效率，实验表明可显著减少训练时间和提高训练速度。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）规模的不断增长，对资源高效的训练优化技术的需求日益迫切。现有的批次打包技术在预训练和监督微调中广泛应用，但对于使用相同输入提示但具有不同响应的数据（如奖励模型或DPO）的训练，效率有待提升。
AI.method: 提出“偏好打包”（preference packing）方法，该方法通过识别和处理具有相同输入提示但不同响应的数据，减少重复的注意力计算，并降低KV缓存内存的使用。该方法可以与其他优化技术（如批次排序）结合使用。
AI.result: 在文本和图像数据集上的实验表明，偏好打包可以将训练时间减少至少37%。与现有优化技术结合使用时，可以实现3.22倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: 偏好打包是一种有效的资源优化技术，尤其适用于训练具有多样化响应的数据集，能够显著提高训练效率并与其他优化方法协同工作。

title: Human or Machine? A Preliminary Turing Test for Speech-to-Speech Interaction
summary: The pursuit of human-like conversational agents has long been guided by the Turing test. For modern speech-to-speech (S2S) systems, a critical yet unanswered question is whether they can converse like humans. To tackle this, we conduct the first Turing test for S2S systems, collecting 2,968 human judgments on dialogues between 9 state-of-the-art S2S systems and 28 human participants. Our results deliver a clear finding: no existing evaluated S2S system passes the test, revealing a significant gap in human-likeness. To diagnose this failure, we develop a fine-grained taxonomy of 18 human-likeness dimensions and crowd-annotate our collected dialogues accordingly. Our analysis shows that the bottleneck is not semantic understanding but stems from paralinguistic features, emotional expressivity, and conversational persona. Furthermore, we find that off-the-shelf AI models perform unreliably as Turing test judges. In response, we propose an interpretable model that leverages the fine-grained human-likeness ratings and delivers accurate and transparent human-vs-machine discrimination, offering a powerful tool for automatic human-likeness evaluation. Our work establishes the first human-likeness evaluation for S2S systems and moves beyond binary outcomes to enable detailed diagnostic insights, paving the way for human-like improvements in conversational AI systems.

AI.tldr: 现有语音到语音（S2S）系统均未通过图灵测试，其短板在于副语言特征、情感表达和对话个性，而非语义理解。研究还发现AI模型作为图灵测试的裁判不可靠，并提出了一种新的可解释模型来准确评估S2S系统的类人能力。
AI.motivation: 评估现代语音到语音（S2S）系统是否能像人类一样进行对话，以弥补当前S2S系统在类人能力方面的不足。
AI.method: 进行了首次S2S系统的图灵测试，收集了2,968个人类对9个S2S系统和28个真人对话的判断。开发了一个包含18个维度的类人特征分类法，并对收集到的对话进行了众包标注。此外，还开发了一个利用细粒度类人能力评分的可解释模型。
AI.result: 所有被评估的S2S系统均未能通过图灵测试。类人能力的瓶颈在于副语言特征、情感表达和对话个性，而非语义理解。现成的AI模型作为图灵测试裁判的表现不可靠。提出的可解释模型能够准确且透明地进行人类与机器的区分。
AI.conclusion: 建立了首个S2S系统的类人能力评估框架，揭示了当前S2S系统在类人对话方面的显著差距，并提供了一种可用于自动评估和诊断的工具，为未来提高对话式AI的类人能力指明了方向。

title: Curriculum Reinforcement Learning for Quadrotor Racing with Random Obstacles
summary: Autonomous drone racing has attracted increasing interest as a research topic for exploring the limits of agile flight. However, existing studies primarily focus on obstacle-free racetracks, while the perception and dynamic challenges introduced by obstacles remain underexplored, often resulting in low success rates and limited robustness in real-world flight. To this end, we propose a novel vision-based curriculum reinforcement learning framework for training a robust controller capable of addressing unseen obstacles in drone racing. We combine multi-stage cu rriculum learning, domain randomization, and a multi-scene updating strategy to address the conflicting challenges of obstacle avoidance and gate traversal. Our end-to-end control policy is implemented as a single network, allowing high-speed flight of quadrotors in environments with variable obstacles. Both hardware-in-the-loop and real-world experiments demonstrate that our method achieves faster lap times and higher success rates than existing approaches, effectively advancing drone racing in obstacle-rich environments. The video and code are available at: https://github.com/SJTU-ViSYS-team/CRL-Drone-Racing.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的基于视觉的课程强化学习框架，用于训练无人机赛车手在有障碍物的环境中高速飞行，实现了更快的圈速和更高的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机竞速研究主要集中在无障碍赛道，对于障碍物的感知和动态挑战研究不足，导致实际飞行成功率低且鲁棒性差。
AI.method: 结合了多阶段课程学习、领域随机化和多场景更新策略，解决了避障和门穿越的冲突挑战。使用一个端到端的控制策略网络。
AI.result: 在硬件在环和真实世界实验中，所提出的方法相比现有方法实现了更快的圈速和更高的成功率。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架能够训练出在具有可变障碍物的环境中实现高速飞行的健壮控制器，有效地推动了无人机在障碍物密集环境中的竞速能力。

title: UTPTrack: Towards Simple and Unified Token Pruning for Visual Tracking
summary: One-stream Transformer-based trackers achieve advanced performance in visual object tracking but suffer from significant computational overhead that hinders real-time deployment. While token pruning offers a path to efficiency, existing methods are fragmented. They typically prune the search region, dynamic template, and static template in isolation, overlooking critical inter-component dependencies, which yields suboptimal pruning and degraded accuracy. To address this, we introduce UTPTrack, a simple and Unified Token Pruning framework that, for the first time, jointly compresses all three components. UTPTrack employs an attention-guided, token type-aware strategy to holistically model redundancy, a design that seamlessly supports unified tracking across multimodal and language-guided tasks within a single model. Extensive evaluations on 10 benchmarks demonstrate that UTPTrack achieves a new state-of-the-art in the accuracy-efficiency trade-off for pruning-based trackers, pruning 65.4% of vision tokens in RGB-based tracking and 67.5% in unified tracking while preserving 99.7% and 100.5% of baseline performance, respectively. This strong performance across both RGB and multimodal scenarios underlines its potential as a robust foundation for future research in efficient visual tracking. Code will be released at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/UTPTrack.

AI.tldr: UTPTrack 提出了一种统一的 token 剪枝框架，能够联合压缩 Transformer 追踪器中的搜索区域、动态模板和静态模板，从而在不牺牲过多精度的前提下显著提高效率，并在 RGB 和多模态追踪任务中均取得了 SOTA 性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于 Transformer 的追踪器虽然性能优越，但计算开销大，难以实时部署。现有的 token 剪枝方法各自独立处理不同组件，忽略了组件间的依赖关系，导致剪枝效果不佳和精度下降。
AI.method: UTPTrack 采用一种注意力引导、token 类型感知的策略，联合建模搜索区域、动态模板和静态模板的冗余，实现统一的剪枝。
AI.result: 在 RGB 追踪任务中，UTPTrack 剪枝了 65.4% 的视觉 token，性能保留了基线的 99.7%。在统一追踪任务中，剪枝了 67.5% 的视觉 token，性能保留了基线的 100.5%。在 10 个基准测试中，UTPTrack 在精度-效率权衡方面达到了新的 SOTA 水平。
AI.conclusion: UTPTrack 是一种简单而统一的 token 剪枝框架，能够有效地提高 Transformer 追踪器的效率，同时保持高精度，适用于 RGB 和多模态追踪任务，为高效视觉追踪研究奠定了坚实基础。

title: ARGUS: Seeing the Influence of Narrative Features on Persuasion in Argumentative Texts
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures, submitted to ACM Transactions on Intelligent Systems and Technology
summary: Can narratives make arguments more persuasive? And to this end, which narrative features matter most? Although stories are often seen as powerful tools for persuasion, their specific role in online, unstructured argumentation remains underexplored. To address this gap, we present ARGUS, a framework for studying the impact of narration on persuasion in argumentative discourse. ARGUS introduces a new ChangeMyView corpus annotated for story presence and six key narrative features, integrating insights from two established theoretical frameworks that capture both textual narrative features and their effects on recipients. Leveraging both encoder-based classifiers and zero-shot large language models (LLMs), ARGUS identifies stories and narrative features and applies them at scale to examine how different narrative dimensions influence persuasion success in online argumentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ARGUS框架，用于研究叙事在在线论证中的说服力影响，并构建了一个标注了叙事特征的新语料库，利用LLMs分析了叙事维度对说服成功率的影响。
AI.motivation: 在线非结构化论证中叙事在说服力方面的重要作用尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出ARGUS框架，构建了包含叙事存在和六个关键叙事特征的ChangeMyView语料库。利用基于编码器的分类器和零样本LLMs识别叙事特征，并分析其对在线论证说服成功率的影响。
AI.result: ARGUS能够识别故事和叙事特征，并在大规模上分析不同叙事维度对在线论证说服成功率的影响。
AI.conclusion: 叙事在在线论证中可以作为说服工具，ARGUS框架为进一步研究叙事特征与说服力之间的关系提供了有效途径。

title: U-Mind: A Unified Framework for Real-Time Multimodal Interaction with Audiovisual Generation
summary: Full-stack multimodal interaction in real-time is a central goal in building intelligent embodied agents capable of natural, dynamic communication. However, existing systems are either limited to unimodal generation or suffer from degraded reasoning and poor cross-modal alignment, preventing coherent and perceptually grounded interactions. In this work, we introduce U-Mind, the first unified system for high-intelligence multimodal dialogue that supports real-time generation and jointly models language, speech, motion, and video synthesis within a single interactive loop. At its core, U-Mind implements a Unified Alignment and Reasoning Framework that addresses two key challenges: enhancing cross-modal synchronization via a segment-wise alignment strategy, and preserving reasoning abilities through Rehearsal-Driven Learning. During inference, U-Mind adopts a text-first decoding pipeline that performs internal chain-of-thought planning followed by temporally synchronized generation across modalities. To close the loop, we implement a real-time video rendering framework conditioned on pose and speech, enabling expressive and synchronized visual feedback. Extensive experiments demonstrate that U-Mind achieves state-of-the-art performance on a range of multimodal interaction tasks, including question answering, instruction following, and motion generation, paving the way toward intelligent, immersive conversational agents.

AI.tldr: U-Mind是一个统一的、实时的多模态交互系统，能够同步生成语言、语音、动作和视频，并在问题回答、指令遵循和动作生成等任务上达到最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的智能体在进行自然、动态的交互时，存在单模态生成受限、推理能力下降以及跨模态对齐差的问题，阻碍了连贯和基于感知的交互。
AI.method: U-Mind采用统一对齐与推理框架，通过分段对齐策略增强跨模态同步，并通过预演驱动学习保留推理能力。在推理时，采用文本优先的解码管线，进行内部思维链规划，然后跨模态同步生成。为了闭环，实现了基于姿态和语音的实时视频渲染框架。
AI.result: U-Mind在问题回答、指令遵循和动作生成等一系列多模态交互任务上实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: U-Mind是第一个支持实时生成和联合建模语言、语音、动作和视频合成的统一系统，为构建智能、沉浸式的对话式智能体铺平了道路。

title: Uncertainty Quantification for Multimodal Large Language Models with Incoherence-adjusted Semantic Volume
comment: Earlier versions presented at ICLR 2025 QUESTION workshop and ICML 2025 R2-FM workshop
summary: Despite their capabilities, Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) may produce plausible but erroneous outputs, hindering reliable deployment. Accurate uncertainty metrics could enable escalation of unreliable queries to human experts or larger models for improved performance. However, existing uncertainty metrics have practical constraints, such as being designed only for specific modalities, reliant on external tools, or computationally expensive. We introduce UMPIRE, a training-free uncertainty quantification framework for MLLMs that works efficiently across various input and output modalities without external tools, relying only on the models' own internal modality features. UMPIRE computes the incoherence-adjusted semantic volume of sampled MLLM responses for a given task instance, effectively capturing both the global semantic diversity of samples and the local incoherence of responses based on internal model confidence. We propose uncertainty desiderata for MLLMs and provide theoretical analysis motivating UMPIRE's design. Extensive experiments show that UMPIRE consistently outperforms baseline metrics in error detection and uncertainty calibration across image, audio, and video-text benchmarks, including adversarial and out-of-distribution settings. We also demonstrate UMPIRE's generalization to non-text output tasks, including image and audio generation.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了UMPIRE，一个无需训练的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）不确定性量化框架，能够跨多种模态有效识别模型输出的不可靠性，并且优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）虽然能力强大，但可能产生似是而非但错误的输出，这阻碍了其可靠部署。准确的不确定性度量能够帮助识别不可靠的查询，以便交给人类专家或更大模型处理，从而提高性能。然而，现有不确定性度量存在实际限制，例如仅适用于特定模态、依赖外部工具或计算成本高昂。
AI.method: UMPIRE是一个无需训练的不确定性量化框架。它通过计算给定任务实例下，MLLM采样响应的“不一致性调整语义体积”来量化不确定性。该方法仅依赖模型自身的内部模态特征，不依赖外部工具，能够捕捉采样响应的全局语义多样性和局部响应的不一致性（基于内部模型置信度）。研究者还提出了适用于MLLM的不确定性需求，并提供了理论分析来解释UMPIRE的设计理念。
AI.result: 在图像、音频和视频-文本基准测试中，包括对抗性和分布外设置，UMPIRE在错误检测和不确定性校准方面均一致优于基线度量。此外，UMPIRE还能泛化到非文本输出任务，如图像和音频生成。
AI.conclusion: UMPIRE是一个有效且通用的MLLM不确定性量化框架，它克服了现有方法的局限性，能够跨不同模态和任务识别模型输出的不可靠性，为MLLM的可靠部署提供了有力支持。

title: A Minimal Agent for Automated Theorem Proving
summary: We propose a minimal agentic baseline that enables systematic comparison across different AI-based theorem prover architectures. This design implements the core features shared among state-of-the-art systems: iterative proof refinement, library search and context management. We evaluate our baseline using qualitatively different benchmarks and compare various popular models and design choices, and demonstrate competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art approaches, while using a significantly simpler architecture. Our results demonstrate consistent advantages of an iterative approach over multiple single-shot generations, especially in terms of sample efficiency and cost effectiveness. The implementation is released open-source as a candidate reference for future research and as an accessible prover for the community.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基础的、可配置的AI定理证明器基线，用于系统比较不同架构，并证明其在效率和成本效益方面具有竞争力，同时架构更简单。
AI.motivation: 需要一个标准化的基线来系统地比较和评估不同AI定理证明器架构的设计选择和性能。
AI.method: 实现了一个包含迭代证明细化、库搜索和上下文管理核心功能的最小化代理基线。使用不同基准测试了该基线，并与现有方法进行了比较。
AI.result: 与最先进的方法相比，该基线在多个基准测试中表现出具有竞争力的性能，并且具有显著更简单的架构。迭代方法在样本效率和成本效益方面优于单次生成。
AI.conclusion: 一个简单的、可配置的代理基线能够实现与更复杂架构相媲美的性能，并且迭代方法在AI定理证明中具有显著优势。该实现已开源，可作为未来研究的参考。

title: Geometry-based pneumatic actuators for soft robotics
summary: Soft pneumatic actuators enable safe human-machine interaction with lightweight and powerful applied parts. On the other side, they suffer design limitations as regards complex actuation patterns, including minimum bending radii, multi-states capabilities and structural stability. We present geometry-based pneumatic actuators (GPAs), a design and implementation approach that introduces constraint layers with configurable CNC heat-sealed chambers. The approach achieves predictable deformation, near-zero bending radii, multi-states actuation, and enables customizable and repeatable complex actuated geometries. Mathematical modeling reveals predictable linear angle transformations and validates nonlinear torque-angle relationships across diverse configurations. We demonstrate versatility of the GPAs approach through three applications: a 49 g wrist exoskeleton reducing muscle activity by up to 51%, a 30.8 g haptic interface delivering 8 N force feedback with fast response, and a 208 g bipedal robot achieving multi-gait locomotion. GPAs establish a configurable platform for next-generation wearable robotics, haptic systems, and soft locomotion devices.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于几何形状的气动驱动器（GPAs）设计方法，通过引入带有可配置CNC热封腔的约束层，克服了传统软驱动器的设计局限，实现了可预测的变形、近零弯曲半径、多状态驱动和可定制的复杂驱动几何形状。GPAs已成功应用于腕部外骨骼、触觉接口和双足机器人，展示了其在可穿戴机器人、触觉系统和软体运动设备等领域的潜力。
AI.motivation: 传统的软气动驱动器虽然在人机交互中安全且轻便，但在实现复杂驱动模式（如最小弯曲半径、多状态能力和结构稳定性）方面存在设计限制。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于几何形状的气动驱动器（GPAs）设计和实现方法。该方法引入了带有可配置CNC热封腔的约束层，以实现可预测的变形、近零弯曲半径、多状态驱动以及定制化和可重复的复杂驱动几何形状。通过数学建模分析了其线性角度变换和非线性扭矩-角度关系。
AI.result: GPAs方法实现了可预测的变形、近乎零的弯曲半径、多状态驱动以及可定制和可重复的复杂驱动几何形状。数学模型显示出可预测的线性角度变换和跨不同配置的非线性扭矩-角度关系。文章展示了GPAs在三个应用中的多功能性：一个49克的腕部外骨骼，可将肌肉活动降低高达51%；一个30.8克的触觉接口，可提供8N力的反馈且响应迅速；以及一个208克的双足机器人，可实现多步态运动。
AI.conclusion: GPAs方法为下一代可穿戴机器人、触觉系统和软体运动设备提供了一个可配置的平台，解决了传统软气动驱动器的设计限制，并展示了其在多个实际应用中的优越性能。

title: Terminology Rarity Predicts Catastrophic Failure in LLM Translation of Low-Resource Ancient Languages: Evidence from Ancient Greek
summary: This study presents the first systematic, reference-free human evaluation of large language model (LLM) machine translation (MT) for Ancient Greek (AG) technical prose. We evaluate translations by three commercial LLMs (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT) of twenty paragraph-length passages from two works by the Greek physician Galen of Pergamum (ca. 129-216 CE): On Mixtures, which has two published English translations, and On the Composition of Drugs according to Kinds, which has never been fully translated into English. We assess translation quality using both standard automated evaluation metrics (BLEU, chrF++, METEOR, ROUGE-L, BERTScore, COMET, BLEURT) and expert human evaluation via a modified Multidimensional Quality Metrics (MQM) framework applied to all 60 translations by a team of domain specialists. On the previously translated expository text, LLMs achieved high translation quality (mean MQM score 95.2/100), with performance approaching expert level. On the untranslated pharmacological text, aggregate quality was lower (79.9/100) but with high variance driven by two passages presenting extreme terminological density; excluding these, scores converged to within 4 points of the translated text. Terminology rarity, operationalized via corpus frequency in the literary Diorisis Ancient Greek Corpus, emerged as a strong predictor of translation failure (r = -.97 for passage-level quality on the untranslated text). Automated metrics showed moderate correlation with human judgment overall on the text with a wide quality spread (Composition), but no metric discriminated among high-quality translations. We discuss implications for the use of LLMs in Classical scholarship and for the design of automated evaluation pipelines for low-resource ancient languages.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次对大型语言模型（LLM）在古希腊（AG）技术散文翻译中的表现进行了系统性、无参考的评估。研究发现，LLM在已翻译的文本上表现出色，接近专家水平，但在包含稀有术语的未翻译文本上表现不佳，术语稀有度是翻译失败的重要预测因子。自动化评估指标与人类判断的整体相关性适中，但在区分高质量翻译方面效果不佳。
AI.motivation: 古希腊技术散文（如加伦的著作）的翻译面临挑战，LLM在这一领域的翻译质量和评估方法尚不明确，特别是对于资源匮乏的古老语言。
AI.method: 使用Claude、Gemini和ChatGPT三个LLM翻译了加伦的两部著作（《论混合》和《论药物的组成》）的20个段落。采用标准的自动化评估指标（BLEU、chrF++、METEOR、ROUGE-L、BERTScore、COMET、BLEURT）和专家人工评估（修改后的MQM框架）。将术语稀有度通过Diorisis古希腊语料库的词频进行量化。
AI.result: LLM在已翻译文本上的平均MQM得分为95.2/100，接近专家水平。在未翻译的文本上，平均得分为79.9/100，但存在较大差异，原因在于两个术语密度极高的段落。排除这两个段落后，得分接近已翻译文本。术语稀有度是翻译失败的强预测因子（r = -0.97）。自动化指标与人类判断在质量差异较大的文本上具有中等相关性，但在区分高质量翻译时无效。
AI.conclusion: LLM在古希腊技术散文翻译中具有潜力，但在处理罕见术语时需要改进。术语稀有度是影响翻译质量的关键因素。对于资源匮乏的古老语言，设计有效的自动化评估流水线至关重要，且需要结合人类专家评估。

title: Learning Accurate Segmentation Purely from Self-Supervision
summary: Accurately segmenting objects without any manual annotations remains one of the core challenges in computer vision. In this work, we introduce Selfment, a fully self-supervised framework that segments foreground objects directly from raw images without human labels, pretrained segmentation models, or any post-processing. Selfment first constructs patch-level affinity graphs from self-supervised features and applies NCut to obtain an initial coarse foreground--background separation. We then introduce Iterative Patch Optimization (IPO), a feature-space refinement procedure that progressively enforces spatial coherence and semantic consistency through iterative patch clustering. The refined masks are subsequently used as supervisory signals to train a lightweight segmentation head with contrastive and region-consistency objectives, allowing the model to learn stable and transferable object representations. Despite its simplicity and complete absence of manual supervision, Selfment sets new state-of-the-art (SoTA) results across multiple benchmarks. It achieves substantial improvements on $F_{\max}$ over previous unsupervised saliency detection methods on ECSSD ($+4.0\%$), HKUIS ($+4.6\%$), and PASCAL-S ($+5.7\%$). Moreover, without any additional fine-tuning, Selfment demonstrates remarkable zero-shot generalization to camouflaged object detection tasks (e.g., $0.910$ $S_m$ on CHAMELEON and $0.792$ $F_β^ω$ on CAMO), outperforming all existing unsupervised approaches and even rivaling the SoTA fully supervised methods.

AI.tldr: 解析错误
AI.motivation: 解析错误
AI.method: 解析错误
AI.result: 解析错误
AI.conclusion: 解析错误

title: CoME: Empowering Channel-of-Mobile-Experts with Informative Hybrid-Capabilities Reasoning
summary: Mobile Agents can autonomously execute user instructions, which requires hybrid-capabilities reasoning, including screen summary, subtask planning, action decision and action function. However, existing agents struggle to achieve both decoupled enhancement and balanced integration of these capabilities. To address these challenges, we propose Channel-of-Mobile-Experts (CoME), a novel agent architecture consisting of four distinct experts, each aligned with a specific reasoning stage, CoME activates the corresponding expert to generate output tokens in each reasoning stage via output-oriented activation. To empower CoME with hybrid-capabilities reasoning, we introduce a progressive training strategy: Expert-FT enables decoupling and enhancement of different experts' capability; Router-FT aligns expert activation with the different reasoning stage; CoT-FT facilitates seamless collaboration and balanced optimization across multiple capabilities. To mitigate error propagation in hybrid-capabilities reasoning, we propose InfoGain-Driven DPO (Info-DPO), which uses information gain to evaluate the contribution of each intermediate step, thereby guiding CoME toward more informative reasoning. Comprehensive experiments show that CoME outperforms dense mobile agents and MoE methods on both AITZ and AMEX datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 CoME 的新型移动代理架构，通过四个独立的专家模块实现混合能力推理，并结合渐进式训练策略（Expert-FT, Router-FT, CoT-FT）和 InfoGain-Driven DPO 来优化代理性能，实验结果表明 CoME 在 AITZ 和 AMEX 数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有移动代理在实现混合能力推理（屏幕摘要、子任务规划、动作决策和动作执行）方面存在解耦增强和平衡集成的挑战。
AI.method: 提出 CoME 架构，包含四个独立的专家模块，分别对应推理的不同阶段，并采用输出导向激活。引入渐进式训练策略：Expert-FT 解耦和增强专家能力，Router-FT 对齐专家激活，CoT-FT 促进跨能力协作。提出 InfoGain-Driven DPO（Info-DPO）通过信息增益评估中间步骤的贡献，指导代理进行信息量更足的推理。
AI.result: CoME 在 AITZ 和 AMEX 数据集上，相较于密集型移动代理和 MoE 方法，取得了更优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: CoME 架构通过其模块化设计、渐进式训练策略和信息增益驱动的优化方法，有效解决了移动代理在混合能力推理方面遇到的挑战，并在实际任务中展现出强大的能力。

title: Planning from Observation and Interaction
summary: Observational learning requires an agent to learn to perform a task by referencing only observations of the performed task. This work investigates the equivalent setting in real-world robot learning where access to hand-designed rewards and demonstrator actions are not assumed. To address this data-constrained setting, this work presents a planning-based Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) algorithm for world modeling from observation and interaction alone. Experiments conducted entirely in the real-world demonstrate that this paradigm is effective for learning image-based manipulation tasks from scratch in under an hour, without assuming prior knowledge, pre-training, or data of any kind beyond task observations. Moreover, this work demonstrates that the learned world model representation is capable of online transfer learning in the real-world from scratch. In comparison to existing approaches, including IRL, RL, and Behavior Cloning (BC), which have more restrictive assumptions, the proposed approach demonstrates significantly greater sample efficiency and success rates, enabling a practical path forward for online world modeling and planning from observation and interaction. Videos and more at: https://uwrobotlearning.github.io/mpail2/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于规划的逆强化学习（IRL）算法，可以在没有预设奖励和演示动作的情况下，仅通过观察和交互来学习机器人世界的模型，并在真实世界中实现了高效的图像驱动操作任务学习和在线迁移学习。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的机器人学习通常缺乏预设的奖励函数和演示动作，而现有的模仿学习和强化学习方法对此类数据受限的场景处理能力不足，因此需要一种能够仅凭观察和交互来学习世界模型的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于规划的逆强化学习（IRL）算法，该算法能够仅从观察和交互中学习世界模型，并使用该模型进行规划。该方法不需要预设的奖励函数或演示动作，并能在真实世界环境中进行端到端的学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能够在不到一小时的时间内，从零开始学习图像驱动的机器人操作任务，并且无需任何先验知识、预训练或额外数据。此外，学习到的世界模型能够进行在线迁移学习。与现有方法（IRL、RL、BC）相比，该方法在样本效率和成功率方面表现出显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的仅凭观察和交互学习世界模型的方法，为机器人在线学习和规划提供了一条切实可行的路径，尤其是在数据受限的真实世界环境中，具有显著的优势。

title: Diffusion Probe: Generated Image Result Prediction Using CNN Probes
summary:
Text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models lack an efficient mechanism for early quality assessment, leading to costly trial-and-error in multi-generation scenarios such as prompt iteration, agent-based generation, and flow-grpo. We reveal a strong correlation between early diffusion cross-attention distributions and final image quality. Based on this finding, we introduce Diffusion Probe, a framework that leverages internal cross-attention maps as predictive signals.
  We design a lightweight predictor that maps statistical properties of early-stage cross-attention extracted from initial denoising steps to the final image's overall quality. This enables accurate forecasting of image quality across diverse evaluation metrics long before full synthesis is complete.
  We validate Diffusion Probe across a wide range of settings. On multiple T2I models, across early denoising windows, resolutions, and quality metrics, it achieves strong correlation (PCC > 0.7) and high classification performance (AUC-ROC > 0.9).
  Its reliability translates into practical gains. By enabling early quality-aware decisions in workflows such as prompt optimization, seed selection, and accelerated RL training, the probe supports more targeted sampling and avoids computation on low-potential generations. This reduces computational overhead while improving final output quality.
  Diffusion Probe is model-agnostic, efficient, and broadly applicable, offering a practical solution for improving T2I generation efficiency through early quality prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Diffusion Probe的框架，通过分析早期去噪步骤中的交叉注意力图来预测文本到图像生成模型的最终图像质量，从而提高生成效率。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在早期质量评估方面缺乏有效机制，导致在多生成场景（如提示词迭代、基于代理的生成等）中存在成本高昂的试错过程。
AI.method: 该研究发现早期交叉注意力分布与最终图像质量之间存在强相关性。基于此，提出Diffusion Probe框架，利用内部交叉注意力图作为预测信号，设计了一个轻量级预测器，将早期交叉注意力图的统计特性映射到最终图像质量。
AI.result: Diffusion Probe在多种文本到图像模型、不同去噪窗口、分辨率和质量指标下进行了验证，取得了高度相关性（PCC > 0.7）和高分类性能（AUC-ROC > 0.9）。
AI.conclusion: Diffusion Probe能够准确预测图像质量，在提示词优化、种子选择和加速强化学习训练等工作流程中实现早期质量感知决策，从而减少计算开销并提高最终输出质量。该方法具有模型无关、高效且适用范围广的优点。

title: DARE-bench: Evaluating Modeling and Instruction Fidelity of LLMs in Data Science
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026. 10 pages plus appendix
summary: The fast-growing demands in using Large Language Models (LLMs) to tackle complex multi-step data science tasks create an emergent need for accurate benchmarking. There are two major gaps in existing benchmarks: (i) the lack of standardized, process-aware evaluation that captures instruction adherence and process fidelity, and (ii) the scarcity of accurately labeled training data. To bridge these gaps, we introduce DARE-bench, a benchmark designed for machine learning modeling and data science instruction following. Unlike many existing benchmarks that rely on human- or model-based judges, all tasks in DARE-bench have verifiable ground truth, ensuring objective and reproducible evaluation. To cover a broad range of tasks and support agentic tools, DARE-bench consists of 6,300 Kaggle-derived tasks and provides both large-scale training data and evaluation sets. Extensive evaluations show that even highly capable models such as gpt-o4-mini struggle to achieve good performance, especially in machine learning modeling tasks. Using DARE-bench training tasks for fine-tuning can substantially improve model performance. For example, supervised fine-tuning boosts Qwen3-32B's accuracy by 1.83x and reinforcement learning boosts Qwen3-4B's accuracy by more than 8x. These significant improvements verify the importance of DARE-bench both as an accurate evaluation benchmark and critical training data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DARE-bench，一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在数据科学和机器学习任务中遵循指令的能力的基准。该基准提供了可验证的真实数据，并包含大量任务和训练数据，旨在解决现有基准在评估准确性和数据可用性方面的不足。实验表明，DARE-bench可用于改进LLMs的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型（LLMs）在处理复杂的多步数据科学任务方面的需求不断增长，但现有的基准在标准化、过程感知评估以及高质量训练数据方面存在不足。因此，需要一个能够准确评估LLMs指令遵循能力并提供充足训练数据的基准。
AI.method: 本文提出了DARE-bench基准，该基准包含6,300个源自Kaggle的机器学习建模和数据科学指令遵循任务。与依赖人类或模型评估的基准不同，DARE-bench的所有任务都具有可验证的真实标签，确保了客观和可重现的评估。DARE-bench提供了大规模的训练和评估数据集。
AI.result: 通过对DARE-bench的广泛评估，研究发现即使是像gpt-o4-mini这样能力很强的模型，在执行任务时性能也难以令人满意，尤其是在机器学习建模任务上。使用DARE-bench的训练任务进行微调，可以显著提高模型的性能。例如，监督微调将Qwen3-32B的准确率提高了1.83倍，而强化学习将Qwen3-4B的准确率提高了8倍以上。
AI.conclusion: DARE-bench是一个重要的评估基准，它通过提供可验证的真实标签和大规模的训练数据，解决了现有基准在评估LLMs在数据科学和机器学习任务中指令遵循能力方面的不足。实验结果证明了DARE-bench在评估模型性能和作为训练数据方面的价值，并且通过使用DARE-bench进行微调，可以显著提升LLMs的性能。

title: Robust Skills, Brittle Grounding: Diagnosing Restricted Generalization in Vision-Language Action Policies via Multi-Object Picking
summary: Vision-language action (VLA) policies often report strong manipulation benchmark performance with relatively few demonstrations, but it remains unclear whether this reflects robust language-to-object grounding or reliance on object--location correlations that do not transfer beyond the training distribution. We present a controlled multi-object picking study that progressively increases object placement variability up to full workspace randomization and evaluates held-out object--location pairings that break familiar associations without increasing spatial difficulty. Across these stress tests and data scaling, we find that for representative VLA policies, including SmolVLA and $π_{0.5}$, execution of the manipulation primitive remains substantially more reliable than instruction-conditioned task success in harder regimes, suggesting that manipulation skill acquisition is decoupled from instruction following. We recommend augmenting manipulation benchmarks with task ladders and decomposed metrics that separately measure primitive execution and instruction-conditioned success to better diagnose instruction-grounded generalization.

AI.tldr: 文章研究了视觉-语言动作（VLA）策略在多物体抓取任务中的泛化能力，发现当前VLA策略的抓取执行能力与其指令理解能力是解耦的，即即使在物体位置变化较大的情况下，VLA策略也能较好地执行抓取动作，但对指令的遵循能力却显著下降。作者建议未来的操纵基准测试应采用任务阶梯和分解指标来分别评估原始动作执行和指令条件下的任务成功率，以更好地诊断其基于指令的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉-语言动作（VLA）策略在机器人操纵任务中表现出色，但其性能提升是源于强大的语言-物体关联能力，还是仅仅依赖于训练数据中的物体-位置相关性，这一点尚不清楚。现有的研究缺乏对VLA策略在不同物体位置分布下的泛化能力进行系统性评估。
AI.method: 研究者设计了一个受控的多物体抓取实验，逐步增加物体放置的变异性，直至完全随机化工作空间。他们评估了在模型未见过的物体-位置配对下的表现，这些配对打破了熟悉的关联但并未增加空间难度。同时，研究还考察了数据量的扩展对VLA策略性能的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现，在增加物体位置变异性直至完全随机化的测试中，以及在不同数据量下，代表性的VLA策略（包括SmolVLA和$π_{0.5}$）在操纵基元（manipulation primitive）的执行方面，其可靠性远高于指令条件下的任务成功率。这表明操纵技能的学习与其指令遵循能力是相互分离的。
AI.conclusion: 当前的VLA策略在处理物体位置变化较大的情况下，其操纵执行能力比指令遵循能力更具鲁棒性，说明指令理解和操纵技能学习是解耦的。作者建议未来的操纵基准测试应包含任务阶梯（task ladders）和分解指标（decomposed metrics），分别衡量基元执行和指令条件下的成功率，以更准确地评估VLA策略的指令-基础泛化能力。

title: ArgLLM-App: An Interactive System for Argumentative Reasoning with Large Language Models
summary: Argumentative LLMs (ArgLLMs) are an existing approach leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) and computational argumentation for decision-making, with the aim of making the resulting decisions faithfully explainable to and contestable by humans. Here we propose a web-based system implementing ArgLLM-empowered agents for binary tasks. ArgLLM-App supports visualisation of the produced explanations and interaction with human users, allowing them to identify and contest any mistakes in the system's reasoning. It is highly modular and enables drawing information from trusted external sources. ArgLLM-App is publicly available at https://argllm.app, with a video demonstration at https://youtu.be/vzwlGOr0sPM.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为 ArgLLM-App 的基于 Web 的系统，该系统利用大型语言模型 (LLMs) 和计算论证技术来支持二元决策任务，并提供可解释和可争辩的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型语言模型在决策过程中缺乏可解释性和可辩驳性，促使研究者开发能够让用户理解和质疑其推理过程的系统。
AI.method: 该研究提出了一个名为 ArgLLM-App 的 Web 系统，该系统集成了 LLM 和计算论证，能够可视化其生成的解释，并允许用户与系统交互以识别和质疑推理中的错误。该系统设计模块化，并能集成外部可信数据源。
AI.result: ArgLLM-App 系统的主要成果是提供了一个可操作的平台，用户可以通过该平台与 LLM 驱动的决策代理进行交互，理解其决策逻辑，并对其进行挑战。
AI.conclusion: ArgLLM-App 是一个实现 ArgLLM（Argumentative LLMs）概念的可用系统，它通过可视化和交互功能，增强了 LLM 在决策任务中的透明度和用户参与度，使其决策过程对人类而言更加可信和可控。

title: Humanoid Robots as First Assistants in Endoscopic Surgery
summary: Humanoid robots have become a focal point of technological ambition, with claims of surgical capability within years in mainstream discourse. These projections are aspirational yet lack empirical grounding. To date, no humanoid has assisted a surgeon through an actual procedure, let alone performed one. The work described here breaks this new ground. Here we report a proof of concept in which a teleoperated Unitree G1 provided endoscopic visualization while an attending otolaryngologist performed a cadaveric sphenoidectomy. The procedure was completed successfully, with stable visualization maintained throughout. Teleoperation allowed assessment of whether the humanoid form factor could meet the physical demands of surgical assistance in terms of sustenance and precision; the cognitive demands were satisfied -- for now -- by the operator. Post-procedure analysis identified engineering targets for clinical translation, alongside near-term opportunities such as autonomous diagnostic scoping. This work establishes form-factor feasibility for humanoid surgical assistance while identifying challenges for continued development.

AI.tldr: 本研究展示了人形机器人（Unitree G1）在尸体鼻窦手术中进行内窥镜辅助的可能性，证明了其在物理和稳定性方面的可行性，并指出了未来改进的方向。
AI.motivation: 当前关于人形机器人即将实现手术能力的说法缺乏实证支持，研究旨在探索人形机器人作为手术助手的可行性。
AI.method: 通过远程操作Unitree G1机器人提供内窥镜视野，由一名耳鼻喉科医生在一具尸体上进行蝶窦切除术，以评估机器人平台在手术辅助中的表现。
AI.result: 手术成功完成，机器人提供了稳定且持续的内窥镜视野。机器人平台在维持视野稳定性和满足物理操作需求方面表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 人形机器人平台在形式因子上具备进行手术辅助的可行性，但仍需解决工程上的挑战才能实现临床应用。研究也指出了近期的潜在应用，如自主诊断性内窥镜检查。

title: Task-Centric Acceleration of Small-Language Models
summary: Small language models (SLMs) have emerged as efficient alternatives to large language models for task-specific applications. However, they are often employed in high-volume, low-latency settings, where efficiency is crucial. We propose TASC, Task-Adaptive Sequence Compression, a framework for SLM acceleration comprising two use-cases: When performing SLM fine-tuning, we propose TASC-ft, which iteratively enriches the tokenizer vocabulary with high-frequency output n-grams and then fine-tunes the model to utilize the expanded vocabulary. Next, we propose an inference-time method, termed TASC-spec. TASC-spec is a lightweight, training-free speculative decoding method that constructs an n-gram draft model from the task's output corpus, mixing task and context n-gram information.TASC-spec avoids any additional training, while bypassing draft-target vocabulary alignment constraints. We demonstrate the effectiveness of both methods across multiple low output-variability generation tasks. Our methods show consistent improvements in inference efficiency while maintaining task performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 TASC（Task-Adaptive Sequence Compression）的框架，用于加速小型语言模型（SLM），包含用于微调的 TASC-ft 和用于推理的 TASC-spec 两种方法，均能提升效率且不牺牲性能。
AI.motivation: 在对效率要求极高的低延迟、大吞吐量应用场景下，SLM 的加速需求日益增长。
AI.method: TASC-ft：通过迭代地用高频输出 n-gram 丰富分词器词汇表，然后进行模型微调。TASC-spec：一种无需训练的推断时加速方法，通过从任务输出语料库构建 n-gram 草稿模型，混合任务和上下文的 n-gram 信息。
AI.result: 在多种低输出变异性生成任务上，TASC-ft 和 TASC-spec 均展示了持续的推断效率提升，同时保持了任务性能。
AI.conclusion: TASC 框架通过任务自适应的序列压缩，能够有效加速 SLM 在特定任务上的表现，同时兼顾了效率和性能。

title: Fourier Angle Alignment for Oriented Object Detection in Remote Sensing
summary: In remote sensing rotated object detection, mainstream methods suffer from two bottlenecks, directional incoherence at detector neck and task conflict at detecting head. Ulitising fourier rotation equivariance, we introduce Fourier Angle Alignment, which analyses angle information through frequency spectrum and aligns the main direction to a certain orientation. Then we propose two plug and play modules : FAAFusion and FAA Head. FAAFusion works at the detector neck, aligning the main direction of higher-level features to the lower-level features and then fusing them. FAA Head serves as a new detection head, which pre-aligns RoI features to a canonical angle and adds them to the original features before classification and regression. Experiments on DOTA-v1.0, DOTA-v1.5 and HRSC2016 show that our method can greatly improve previous work. Particularly, our method achieves new state-of-the-art results of 78.72% mAP on DOTA-v1.0 and 72.28% mAP on DOTA-v1.5 datasets with single scale training and testing, validating the efficacy of our approach in remote sensing object detection. The code is made publicly available at https://github.com/gcy0423/Fourier-Angle-Alignment .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为傅里叶角度对齐（FAA）的新方法，用于解决遥感旋转目标检测中的方向不一致和任务冲突问题。通过傅里叶变换分析角度信息并将其对齐到特定方向，并引入了FAA融合和FAA检测头两个模块，显著提升了检测性能，并在DOTA-v1.0和DOTA-v1.5数据集上取得了新的SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 现有的遥感旋转目标检测方法在检测器的颈部（neck）存在方向不一致性，在检测头（head）存在任务冲突，这限制了模型的性能。
AI.method: 利用傅里叶旋转等变性，提出傅里叶角度对齐（FAA）方法，通过频域分析角度信息并将其对齐到特定方向。引入两个即插即用的模块：FAA融合（FAA Fusion）用于颈部，将高层特征的主方向对齐到低层特征并融合；FAA检测头（FAA Head）用于检测头，预先将RoI特征对齐到标准角度，并将其加到原始特征上进行分类和回归。
AI.result: 在DOTA-v1.0、DOTA-v1.5和HRSC2016数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法能显著提升现有方法的性能。特别是在DOTA-v1.0和DOTA-v1.5数据集上，使用单尺度训练和测试，分别取得了78.72%和72.28%的mAP，达到了新的SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: 傅里叶角度对齐（FAA）方法及其配套模块（FAA融合和FAA检测头）能够有效地解决遥感旋转目标检测中的关键挑战，并在多个基准数据集上取得了优异的性能，验证了其在遥感目标检测领域的有效性。

title: See, Act, Adapt: Active Perception for Unsupervised Cross-Domain Visual Adaptation via Personalized VLM-Guided Agent
summary: Pre-trained perception models excel in generic image domains but degrade significantly in novel environments like indoor scenes. The conventional remedy is fine-tuning on downstream data which incurs catastrophic forgetting of prior knowledge and demands costly, scene-specific annotations. We propose a paradigm shift through Sea$^2$ (See, Act, Adapt): rather than adapting the perception modules themselves, we adapt how they are deployed through an intelligent pose-control agent. Sea$^2$ keeps all perception modules frozen, requiring no downstream labels during training, and uses only scalar perceptual feedback to navigate the agent toward informative viewpoints. Specially, we transform a vision-language model (VLM) into a low-level pose controller through a two-stage training pipeline: first fine-tuning it on rule-based exploration trajectories that systematically probe indoor scenes, and then refining the policy via unsupervised reinforcement learning that constructs rewards from the perception module's outputs and confidence. Unlike prior active perception methods that couple exploration with specific models or collect data for retraining them, Sea$^2$ directly leverages off-the-shelf perception models for various tasks without the need for retraining. We conducted experiments on three visual perception tasks, including visual grounding, segmentation and 3D box estimation, with performance improvements of 13.54%, 15.92% and 27.68% respectively on dataset ReplicaCAD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Sea^2的新范式，通过一个智能姿态控制代理来适应预训练感知模型在室内场景中的性能下降问题，而不是直接微调感知模型。Sea^2冻结感知模块，无需下游标签，仅利用标量感知反馈来引导代理寻找信息丰富的视角。
AI.motivation: 预训练的感知模型在通用图像域表现优异，但在室内等新颖环境中性能会显著下降。传统的解决方法是进行下游数据微调，但这会导致灾难性遗忘，并且需要昂贵的、特定场景的标注。
AI.method: Sea^2的核心思想是冻结所有感知模块，并训练一个能够控制代理姿态的智能代理。该代理通过两阶段训练：首先在基于规则的探索轨迹上进行微调，然后通过无监督强化学习进行策略优化，奖励函数由感知模块的输出和置信度构建。这种方法不直接修改感知模型，而是改变其部署方式。
AI.result: 在室内场景的视觉基础、分割和3D框估计三个视觉感知任务上，Sea^2方法分别带来了13.54%、15.92%和27.68%的性能提升，在ReplicaCAD数据集上进行了验证。
AI.conclusion: Sea^2提供了一种新的解决预训练模型在特定领域性能下降问题的方法，通过智能姿态控制代理来优化模型部署，避免了对感知模型的微调和标注数据的需求，并能有效提升多种视觉感知任务的性能。

title: How IMU Drift Influences Multi-Radar Inertial Odometry for Ground Robots in Subterranean Terrains
comment: Accepted in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2026
summary: Reliable radar inertial odometry (RIO) requires mitigating IMU bias drift, a challenge that intensifies in subterranean environments due to extreme temperatures and gravity-induced accelerations. Cost-effective IMUs such as the Pixhawk, when paired with FMCW TI IWR6843AOP EVM radars, suffer from drift-induced degradation compounded by sparse, noisy, and flickering radar returns, making fusion less stable than LiDAR-based odometry. Yet, LiDAR fails under smoke, dust, and aerosols, whereas FMCW radars remain compact, lightweight, cost-effective, and robust in these situations. To address these challenges, we propose a two-stage MRIO framework that combines an IMU bias estimator for resilient localization and mapping in GPS-denied subterranean environments affected by smoke. Radar-based ego-velocity estimation is formulated through a least-squares approach and incorporated into an EKF for online IMU bias correction; the corrected IMU accelerations are fused with heterogeneous measurements from multiple radars and an IMU to refine odometry. The proposed framework further supports radar-only mapping by exploiting the robot's estimated translational and rotational displacements. In subterranean field trials, MRIO delivers robust localization and mapping, outperforming EKF-RIO. It maintains accuracy across cost-efficient FMCW radar setups and different IMUs, showing resilience with Pixhawk and higher-grade units such as VectorNav. The implementation will be provided as an open-source resource to the community (code available at https://github.com/LTU-RAI/MRIO

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于雷达惯性里程计（RIO）的解决方案MRIO，用于解决地下环境中IMU偏差漂移和雷达信号稀疏/噪声问题，并通过两阶段框架实现鲁棒的定位和建图。
AI.motivation: 在地下等GPS受限且存在极端温度和重力加速度的环境中，IMU的偏差漂移会严重影响RIO的可靠性。廉价IMU（如Pixhawk）与FMCW雷达（如TI IWR6843AOP）的融合效果不如基于LiDAR的里程计，但在烟雾、尘埃等恶劣环境下，LiDAR失效而FMCW雷达仍能保持稳定工作。
AI.method: 提出一个两阶段的MRIO框架。第一阶段，通过最小二乘法估计雷达速度，并结合扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）对IMU偏差进行在线校正。第二阶段，将校正后的IMU加速度与来自多个雷达和IMU的异构测量进行融合，以优化里程计。该框架还支持雷达自主建图。
AI.result: 在地下实际场地试验中，MRIO在定位和建图方面表现出色，优于EKF-RIO。该方法在廉价FMCW雷达和不同IMU（包括Pixhawk和VectorNav）上均表现出鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: MRIO框架能够有效应对地下环境中IMU偏差漂移和雷达信号不佳带来的挑战，为GPS受限环境提供了一种成本效益高且鲁棒的定位和建图解决方案，并计划开源代码。

title: Action-Geometry Prediction with 3D Geometric Prior for Bimanual Manipulation
summary: Bimanual manipulation requires policies that can reason about 3D geometry, anticipate how it evolves under action, and generate smooth, coordinated motions. However, existing methods typically rely on 2D features with limited spatial awareness, or require explicit point clouds that are difficult to obtain reliably in real-world settings. At the same time, recent 3D geometric foundation models show that accurate and diverse 3D structure can be reconstructed directly from RGB images in a fast and robust manner. We leverage this opportunity and propose a framework that builds bimanual manipulation directly on a pre-trained 3D geometric foundation model. Our policy fuses geometry-aware latents, 2D semantic features, and proprioception into a unified state representation, and uses diffusion model to jointly predict a future action chunk and a future 3D latent that decodes into a dense pointmap. By explicitly predicting how the 3D scene will evolve together with the action sequence, the policy gains strong spatial understanding and predictive capability using only RGB observations. We evaluate our method both in simulation on the RoboTwin benchmark and in real-world robot executions. Our approach consistently outperforms 2D-based and point-cloud-based baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance in manipulation success, inter-arm coordination, and 3D spatial prediction accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Chongyang-99/GAP.git.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用预训练的3D几何基础模型进行双臂操作的框架，该框架仅凭RGB图像就能重建3D场景，并预测未来动作和3D场景演变，从而实现先进的双臂操作。
AI.motivation: 现有双臂操作方法在3D几何感知和可靠的3D数据获取方面存在局限性。利用3D几何基础模型从RGB图像直接重建3D结构，为解决这些问题提供了机会。
AI.method: 框架整合了3D几何感知潜在表示、2D语义特征和本体感觉，形成统一状态表示。利用扩散模型联合预测未来动作序列和可解码为密集点图的3D潜在表示，从而实现对3D场景演变的显式预测。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin基准模拟和真实机器人执行中，该方法在操作成功率、双臂协调性和3D空间预测准确性方面均优于基于2D特征和点云的方法，达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过将3D几何基础模型直接应用于双臂操作，并在仅使用RGB观测的情况下显式预测3D场景的演变，可以显著提高双臂操作的能力，实现更强的空间理解和预测能力。

title: MT-PingEval: Evaluating Multi-Turn Collaboration with Private Information Games
summary: We present a scalable methodology for evaluating language models in multi-turn interactions, using a suite of collaborative games that require effective communication about private information. This enables an interactive scaling analysis, in which a fixed token budget is divided over a variable number of turns. We find that in many cases, language models are unable to use interactive collaboration to improve over the non-interactive baseline scenario in which one agent attempts to summarize its information and the other agent immediately acts -- despite substantial headroom. This suggests that state-of-the-art models still suffer from significant weaknesses in planning and executing multi-turn collaborative conversations. We analyze the linguistic features of these dialogues, assessing the roles of sycophancy, information density, and discourse coherence. While there is no single linguistic explanation for the collaborative weaknesses of contemporary language models, we note that humans achieve comparable task success at superior token efficiency by producing dialogues that are more coherent than those produced by most language models. The proactive management of private information is a defining feature of real-world communication, and we hope that MT-PingEval will drive further work towards improving this capability.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种使用协作游戏来评估语言模型在多轮交互中的能力的方法。结果表明，现有模型在多轮协作对话中的表现不如预期，在信息密度、连贯性和主观迎合等方面存在不足，且效率低于人类。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型在多轮交互和协作式沟通方面的能力评估不足，尤其是处理私有信息和规划复杂对话的能力。研究旨在开发一种可扩展的评估方法，以揭示这些模型的局限性并推动改进。
AI.method: 使用一套需要有效沟通私有信息的协作游戏作为评估工具，设计了一种交互式可扩展性分析方法，通过固定 token 预算和可变轮数来衡量模型表现。同时分析了对话的语言学特征，如迎合性、信息密度和语篇连贯性。
AI.result: 在大多数情况下，语言模型未能通过交互式协作在多轮对话中超越非交互基线场景（一个代理总结信息，另一个代理立即行动）。人类在 token 效率上优于大多数语言模型，能够实现更高的任务成功率，其对话更加连贯。
AI.conclusion: 当前最先进的语言模型在规划和执行多轮协作对话方面仍存在显著的弱点，尤其是在主动管理私有信息方面。虽然没有单一的语言学原因可以解释这些弱点，但人类在对话连贯性方面表现出更高的效率和能力，这表明改进语言模型的协作沟通能力还有很大的提升空间。

title: Evaluating Accuracy of Vine Robot Shape Sensing with Distributed Inertial Measurement Units
summary: Soft, tip-extending vine robots are well suited for navigating tight, debris-filled environments, making them ideal for urban search and rescue. Sensing the full shape of a vine robot's body is helpful both for localizing information from other sensors placed along the robot body and for determining the robot's configuration within the space being explored. Prior approaches have localized vine robot tips using a single inertial measurement unit (IMU) combined with force sensing or length estimation, while one method demonstrated full-body shape sensing using distributed IMUs on a passively steered robot in controlled maze environments. However, the accuracy of distributed IMU-based shape sensing under active steering, varying robot lengths, and different sensor spacings has not been systematically quantified. In this work, we experimentally evaluate the accuracy of vine robot shape sensing using distributed IMUs along the robot body. We quantify IMU drift, measuring an average orientation drift rate of 1.33 degrees/min across 15 sensors. For passive steering, mean tip position error was 11% of robot length. For active steering, mean tip position error increased to 16%. During growth experiments across lengths from 30-175 cm, mean tip error was 8%, with a positive trend with increasing length. We also analyze the influence of sensor spacing and observe that intermediate spacings can minimize error for single-curvature shapes. These results demonstrate the feasibility of distributed IMU-based shape sensing for vine robots while highlighting key limitations and opportunities for improved modeling and algorithmic integration for field deployment.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过实验评估了基于分布式IMU的藤蔓机器人全身形状感知精度，发现在主动转向、长度变化和传感器间距变化时存在误差，但总体可行，并指出了改进方向。
AI.motivation: 为了提高城市搜救任务中藤蔓机器人在复杂环境中导航和定位能力，需要精确感知其全身形状，以整合其他传感器信息并确定机器人在空间中的构型。
AI.method: 通过实验方式，在藤蔓机器人身体上布置分布式IMU传感器，评估其在不同条件下（主动转向、被动转向、长度变化、传感器间距变化）的全身形状感知精度。
AI.result: 测量到IMU平均方向漂移率为1.33度/分钟。被动转向时，平均尖端位置误差为机器人长度的11%。主动转向时，平均尖端位置误差增至16%。在30-175厘米的长度增长实验中，平均尖端误差为8%，且随着长度增加呈上升趋势。分析表明，中间的传感器间距可以最小化单曲率形状的误差。
AI.conclusion: 分布式IMU技术可行用于藤蔓机器人的形状感知，但存在IMU漂移、转向和长度变化带来的误差。研究结果指出了未来在模型优化和算法集成方面改进以适应实际应用的机会。

title: Ref-Adv: Exploring MLLM Visual Reasoning in Referring Expression Tasks
summary: Referring Expression Comprehension (REC) links language to region level visual perception. Standard benchmarks (RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, RefCOCOg) have progressed rapidly with multimodal LLMs but remain weak tests of visual reasoning and grounding: (i) many expressions are very short, leaving little reasoning demand; (ii) images often contain few distractors, making the target easy to find; and (iii) redundant descriptors enable shortcut solutions that bypass genuine text understanding and visual reasoning. We introduce Ref-Adv, a modern REC benchmark that suppresses shortcuts by pairing linguistically nontrivial expressions with only the information necessary to uniquely identify the target. The dataset contains referring expressions on real images, curated with hard distractors and annotated with reasoning facets including negation. We conduct comprehensive ablations (word order perturbations and descriptor deletion sufficiency) to show that solving Ref-Adv requires reasoning beyond simple cues, and we evaluate a broad suite of contemporary multimodal LLMs on Ref-Adv. Despite strong results on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and RefCOCOg, models drop markedly on Ref-Adv, revealing reliance on shortcuts and gaps in visual reasoning and grounding. We provide an in depth failure analysis and aim for Ref-Adv to guide future work on visual reasoning and grounding in MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为Ref-Adv的新型Referring Expression Comprehension (REC)基准数据集，旨在解决现有数据集存在的一些问题，如表达式过于简单、背景干扰少以及存在冗余描述符等。Ref-Adv通过使用具有挑战性的短语和精简的图像信息来抑制模型利用捷径，并评估了当前多模态大型语言模型(MLLMs)在这一新基准上的表现。结果表明，现有模型在Ref-Adv上的性能显著下降，暴露了它们在视觉推理和接地方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有REC数据集（RefCOCO等）在多模态LLMs的推动下虽然取得了快速进展，但在测试模型的视觉推理和接地能力方面存在不足。具体表现为：1）表达式过短，缺乏推理需求；2）图像中的干扰项少，易于定位目标；3）冗余描述符允许模型通过捷径解决问题，绕过真正的文本理解和视觉推理。
AI.method: 作者提出了Ref-Adv数据集，它包含在真实图像上的referring expressions。该数据集通过以下方式抑制捷径：1）使用语言上非平凡的表达式；2）只提供唯一识别目标所必需的信息；3）通过引入难干扰项和包含否定等推理方面来标注数据。作者还进行了广泛的消融实验（词序扰动和描述符删除充分性）来证明解决Ref-Adv需要超越简单线索的推理能力，并评估了多种当代的MLLMs在Ref-Adv上的表现。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+和RefCOCOg上表现强劲的模型，在Ref-Adv上的性能显著下降。这揭示了它们依赖于捷径以及在视觉推理和接地方面的差距。本文还提供了详细的失败分析。
AI.conclusion: Ref-Adv数据集能够有效检测出模型在视觉推理和接地方面的不足，并为未来MLLMs在这方面的研究指明了方向。现有模型在处理更具挑战性的REC任务时仍面临困难，需要进一步提升其视觉推理和接地能力。

title: Controllable Reasoning Models Are Private Thinkers
summary: AI agents powered by reasoning models require access to sensitive user data. However, their reasoning traces are difficult to control, which can result in the unintended leakage of private information to external parties. We propose training models to follow instructions not only in the final answer, but also in reasoning traces, potentially under different constraints. We hypothesize that improving their instruction following abilities in the reasoning traces can improve their privacy-preservation skills. To demonstrate this, we fine-tune models on a new instruction-following dataset with explicit restrictions on reasoning traces. We further introduce a generation strategy that decouples reasoning and answer generation using separate LoRA adapters. We evaluate our approach on six models from two model families, ranging from 1.7B to 14B parameters, across two instruction-following benchmarks and two privacy benchmarks. Our method yields substantial improvements, achieving gains of up to 20.9 points in instruction-following performance and up to 51.9 percentage points on privacy benchmarks. These improvements, however, can come at the cost of task utility, due to the trade-off between reasoning performance and instruction-following abilities. Overall, our results show that improving instruction-following behavior in reasoning models can significantly enhance privacy, suggesting a promising direction for the development of future privacy-aware agents. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/UKPLab/arxiv2026-controllable-reasoning-models

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种通过增强AI推理模型在推理过程中遵循指令的能力来提高其隐私保护能力的方法，并引入了使用LoRA适配器解耦推理和答案生成。实验表明，该方法在指令遵循和隐私保护方面取得了显著提升，但也可能牺牲部分任务效用。
AI.motivation: AI推理模型需要访问敏感用户数据，但其推理过程难以控制，可能导致用户隐私泄露。研究旨在找到一种方法来提高AI模型的隐私保护能力。
AI.method: 研究人员训练模型不仅在最终答案，而且在推理过程中也遵循指令，引入了包含对推理过程显式限制的新型指令遵循数据集。此外，他们还提出了一种使用不同LoRA适配器解耦推理和答案生成的方法。
AI.result: 该方法在两个模型家族的六个模型上进行了评估，在指令遵循性能上取得了高达20.9个点的提升，在隐私保护基准测试上取得了高达51.9个百分点的提升。然而，这种提升可能以任务效用为代价，存在推理性能和指令遵循能力之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 提高推理模型的指令遵循能力可以显著增强其隐私保护能力，为开发未来的隐私感知AI代理提供了有前景的方向。

title: Experience-Guided Self-Adaptive Cascaded Agents for Breast Cancer Screening and Diagnosis with Reduced Biopsy Referrals
summary: We propose an experience-guided cascaded multi-agent framework for Breast Ultrasound Screening and Diagnosis, called BUSD-Agent, that aims to reduce diagnostic escalation and unnecessary biopsy referrals. Our framework models screening and diagnosis as a two-stage, selective decision-making process. A lightweight `screening clinic' agent, restricted to classification models as tools, selectively filters out benign and normal cases from further diagnostic escalation when malignancy risk and uncertainty are estimated as low. Cases that have higher risks are escalated to the `diagnostic clinic' agent, which integrates richer perception and radiological description tools to make a secondary decision on biopsy referral. To improve agent performance, past records of pathology-confirmed outcomes along with image embeddings, model predictions, and historical agent actions are stored in a memory bank as structured decision trajectories. For each new case, BUSD-Agent retrieves similar past cases based on image, model response and confidence similarity to condition the agent's current decision policy. This enables retrieval-conditioned in-context adaptation that dynamically adjusts model trust and escalation thresholds from prior experiences without parameter updates. Evaluation across 10 breast ultrasound datasets shows that the proposed experience-guided workflow reduces diagnostic escalation in BUSD-Agent from 84.95% to 58.72% and overall biopsy referrals from 59.50% to 37.08%, compared to the same architecture without trajectory conditioning, while improving average screening specificity by 68.48% and diagnostic specificity by 6.33%.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为BUSD-Agent的经验引导级联多智能体框架，用于乳腺超声筛查和诊断，通过两阶段决策流程减少不必要的活检。该框架通过检索相似的过往病例来动态调整决策阈值，从而提高了筛查和诊断的特异性，并显著降低了诊断升级和活检推荐率。
AI.motivation: 减少乳腺超声筛查和诊断中的诊断升级和不必要的活检转诊。
AI.method: 提出一个经验引导的级联多智能体框架（BUSD-Agent），包含一个“筛查诊所”智能体和一个“诊断诊所”智能体。利用一个内存库存储过往病例的决策轨迹（病理结果、图像嵌入、模型预测、历史动作），通过检索相似病例来条件化当前智能体的决策策略，实现经验引导的上下文适应，无需参数更新。
AI.result: 在10个乳腺超声数据集上的评估显示，与未进行轨迹条件化的同架构相比，BUSD-Agent将诊断升级率从84.95%降低到58.72%，将总体活检推荐率从59.50%降低到37.08%。同时，平均筛查特异性提高了68.48%，诊断特异性提高了6.33%。
AI.conclusion: 经验引导的级联多智能体框架（BUSD-Agent）能够通过利用过往决策经验，有效地降低乳腺超声筛查和诊断中的诊断升级和活检推荐率，同时提高诊断的特异性。

title: Footprint-Guided Exemplar-Free Continual Histopathology Report Generation
summary: Rapid progress in vision-language modeling has enabled pathology report generation from gigapixel whole-slide images, but most approaches assume static training with simultaneous access to all data. In clinical deployment, however, new organs, institutions, and reporting conventions emerge over time, and sequential fine-tuning can cause catastrophic forgetting. We introduce an exemplar-free continual learning framework for WSI-to-report generation that avoids storing raw slides or patch exemplars. The core idea is a compact domain footprint built in a frozen patch-embedding space: a small codebook of representative morphology tokens together with slide-level co-occurrence summaries and lightweight patch-count priors. These footprints support generative replay by synthesizing pseudo-WSI representations that reflect domain-specific morphological mixtures, while a teacher snapshot provides pseudo-reports to supervise the updated model without retaining past data. To address shifting reporting conventions, we distill domain-specific linguistic characteristics into a compact style descriptor and use it to steer generation. At inference, the model identifies the most compatible descriptor directly from the slide signal, enabling domain-agnostic setup without requiring explicit domain identifiers. Evaluated across multiple public continual learning benchmarks, our approach outperforms exemplar-free and limited-buffer rehearsal baselines, highlighting footprint-based generative replay as a practical solution for deployment in evolving clinical settings.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需存储原始数据或样本的持续学习框架，用于从全切片图像（WSI）生成病理报告，以解决灾难性遗忘问题，并在推理时通过提取的风格描述符实现领域无关性。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言模型在生成病理报告时通常需要静态训练和所有数据的同时访问。在临床部署中，新的器官、机构和报告约定会随时间出现，而顺序微调会导致灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 开发了一个无需样本的持续学习框架，通过构建紧凑的领域足迹（包括形态学标记、共现总结和计数先验）来支持生成式重放，并使用教师快照提供伪报告进行监督。为了应对报告风格的变化，引入了提取的风格描述符来引导生成，并在推理时直接从幻灯片信号中识别最兼容的描述符。
AI.result: 该方法在多个公开的持续学习基准测试中，优于无需样本和有限缓冲区重演的方法，表明了基于足迹的生成式重放是应对不断变化的临床环境的实用解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 基于足迹的生成式重放是一种有效的解决方案，可以解决全切片图像到报告生成中的持续学习问题，同时避免存储原始数据，并能适应变化的报告风格，从而实现领域无关的部署。

title: SafeGen-LLM: Enhancing Safety Generalization in Task Planning for Robotic Systems
summary: Safety-critical task planning in robotic systems remains challenging: classical planners suffer from poor scalability, Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based methods generalize poorly, and base Large Language Models (LLMs) cannot guarantee safety. To address this gap, we propose safety-generalizable large language models, named SafeGen-LLM. SafeGen-LLM can not only enhance the safety satisfaction of task plans but also generalize well to novel safety properties in various domains. We first construct a multi-domain Planning Domain Definition Language 3 (PDDL3) benchmark with explicit safety constraints. Then, we introduce a two-stage post-training framework: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) on a constraint-compliant planning dataset to learn planning syntax and semantics, and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) guided by fine-grained reward machines derived from formal verification to enforce safety alignment and by curriculum learning to better handle complex tasks. Extensive experiments show that SafeGen-LLM achieves strong safety generalization and outperforms frontier proprietary baselines across multi-domain planning tasks and multiple input formats (e.g., PDDLs and natural language).

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SafeGen-LLM的能够实现安全泛化的大型语言模型，用于机器人安全关键任务规划，通过两阶段后训练（SFT和GRPO）来提高安全性和泛化能力，并在多领域规划任务和多种输入格式上取得了优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的机器人任务规划方法在可扩展性、泛化性和安全性方面存在不足。基于强化学习的方法泛化能力差，而基础的大型语言模型无法保证安全性。现有方法无法有效解决安全关键任务规划的挑战。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为SafeGen-LLM的两阶段后训练框架。第一阶段使用约束合规的规划数据集进行监督微调（SFT），学习规划的语法和语义。第二阶段采用基于组相对策略优化（GRPO）的方法，该方法由来自形式化验证的细粒度奖励机器指导，以强制执行安全性对齐，并结合课程学习来处理复杂任务。同时，构建了一个包含显式安全约束的多领域PDDL3基准。
AI.result: SafeGen-LLM在多领域规划任务和多种输入格式（PDDLs和自然语言）上，在安全性和泛化性方面均表现出色，并且优于现有的专有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SafeGen-LLM能够显著提升任务计划的安全性，并能很好地泛化到不同领域的新颖安全属性，为机器人安全关键任务规划提供了一个有效解决方案。

title: The Geometry of Transfer: Unlocking Medical Vision Manifolds for Training-Free Model Ranking
summary: The advent of large-scale self-supervised learning (SSL) has produced a vast zoo of medical foundation models. However, selecting optimal medical foundation models for specific segmentation tasks remains a computational bottleneck. Existing Transferability Estimation (TE) metrics, primarily designed for classification, rely on global statistical assumptions and fail to capture the topological complexity essential for dense prediction. We propose a novel Topology-Driven Transferability Estimation framework that evaluates manifold tractability rather than statistical overlap. Our approach introduces three components: (1) Global Representation Topology Divergence (GRTD), utilizing Minimum Spanning Trees to quantify feature-label structural isomorphism; (2) Local Boundary-Aware Topological Consistency (LBTC), which assesses manifold separability specifically at critical anatomical boundaries; and (3) Task-Adaptive Fusion, which dynamically integrates global and local metrics based on the semantic cardinality of the target task. Validated on the large-scale OpenMind benchmark across diverse anatomical targets and SSL foundation models, our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by around \textbf{31\%} relative improvement in the weighted Kendall, providing a robust, training-free proxy for efficient model selection without the cost of fine-tuning. The code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的拓扑驱动的迁移能力估计框架（TDTE），通过评估流形可处理性来选择医学基础模型进行分割任务，在OpenMind基准测试中表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 目前，为特定分割任务选择最佳医学基础模型是一个计算瓶颈，而现有的迁移能力估计（TE）指标（主要用于分类）无法捕捉到密集预测所需的拓扑复杂性。
AI.method: 提出的TDTE框架包含三个组件：(1) 全局表示拓扑散度（GRTD），使用最小生成树量化特征-标签结构同构性；(2) 局部边界感知拓扑一致性（LBTC），评估关键解剖边界处的流形可分性；(3) 任务自适应融合，根据目标任务的语义基数动态集成全局和局部指标。
AI.result: 在OpenMind基准测试中，TDTE在加权Kendall系数方面比最先进的基线提高了约31%的相对改进，证明了其作为高效模型选择的稳健、无需训练的代理。
AI.conclusion: TDTE框架通过评估流形可处理性而非统计重叠，为医学基础模型在分割任务中的高效、无需训练的模型选择提供了一种新颖且有效的方法。

title: Do LLMs Benefit From Their Own Words?
summary: Multi-turn interactions with large language models typically retain the assistant's own past responses in the conversation history. In this work, we revisit this design choice by asking whether large language models benefit from conditioning on their own prior responses. Using in-the-wild, multi-turn conversations, we compare standard (full-context) prompting with a user-turn-only prompting approach that omits all previous assistant responses, across three open reasoning models and one state-of-the-art model. To our surprise, we find that removing prior assistant responses does not affect response quality on a large fraction of turns. Omitting assistant-side history can reduce cumulative context lengths by up to 10x. To explain this result, we find that multi-turn conversations consist of a substantial proportion (36.4%) of self-contained prompts, and that many follow-up prompts provide sufficient instruction to be answered using only the current user turn and prior user turns. When analyzing cases where user-turn-only prompting substantially outperforms full context, we identify instances of context pollution, in which models over-condition on their previous responses, introducing errors, hallucinations, or stylistic artifacts that propagate across turns. Motivated by these findings, we design a context-filtering approach that selectively omits assistant-side context. Our findings suggest that selectively omitting assistant history can improve response quality while reducing memory consumption.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，在多轮对话中移除大型语言模型自身之前的回复，并不会显著降低回复质量，反而可能通过避免“上下文污染”来提升质量，同时大幅减少计算量。
AI.motivation: 传统的多轮对话会保留助手自身的所有历史回复，作者希望探究模型是否真的需要这些信息，以及移除它们是否会带来好处。
AI.method: 作者对比了两种提示方式：一种是标准的包含所有历史回复（full-context）的提示，另一种是只包含用户回复（user-turn-only）的提示。他们使用了野外收集的多轮对话数据，并在多种模型上进行了实验。
AI.result: 移除助手之前的回复在很大比例的对话轮次中并未影响回复质量，甚至可以减少10倍的上下文长度。作者发现，许多对话轮次是自包含的，或者仅依赖于用户之前的回复就足够了。在某些情况下，移除助手历史反而能提升回复质量，因为模型有时会过度依赖自身历史信息，导致错误、幻觉或风格偏差的累积（上下文污染）。
AI.conclusion: 选择性地移除助手在多轮对话中的历史回复，不仅可以显著降低计算资源消耗，还能在某些情况下提升模型的回复质量，通过避免上下文污染来解决模型过度依赖自身历史响应的问题。

title: Denoising-Enhanced YOLO for Robust SAR Ship Detection
summary: With the rapid advancement of deep learning, synthetic aperture radar (SAR) imagery has become a key modality for ship detection. However, robust performance remains challenging in complex scenes, where clutter and speckle noise can induce false alarms and small targets are easily missed. To address these issues, we propose CPN-YOLO, a high-precision ship detection framework built upon YOLOv8 with three targeted improvements. First, we introduce a learnable large-kernel denoising module for input pre-processing, producing cleaner representations and more discriminative features across diverse ship types. Second, we design a feature extraction enhancement strategy based on the PPA attention mechanism to strengthen multi-scale modeling and improve sensitivity to small ships. Third, we incorporate a Gaussian similarity loss derived from the normalized Wasserstein distance (NWD) to better measure similarity under complex bounding-box distributions and improve generalization. Extensive experiments on HRSID and SSDD demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. On SSDD, CPN-YOLO surpasses the YOLOv8 baseline, achieving 97.0% precision, 95.1% recall, and 98.9% mAP, and consistently outperforms other representative deep-learning detectors in overall performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CPN-YOLO，一个基于YOLOv8的SAR图像高精度船舶检测框架，通过引入可学习的大核去噪模块、PPA注意力机制特征增强以及基于NWD的Gaussian相似度损失，在SSDD数据集上取得了97.0%的精确率、95.1%的召回率和98.9%的mAP，优于基线和其他检测器。
AI.motivation: 在复杂的SAR图像场景中，杂波和斑点噪声导致误报，而小目标容易被漏检，使得鲁棒的船舶检测面临挑战。
AI.method: 1. 引入可学习的大核去噪模块进行输入预处理，生成更清晰、更具辨别力的特征。2. 基于PPA注意力机制设计特征提取增强策略，加强多尺度建模，提高对小目标的敏感度。3. 引入基于归一化Wasserstein距离（NWD）的Gaussian相似度损失，以更好地衡量复杂边界框分布下的相似性并提高泛化能力。
AI.result: 在SSDD数据集上，CPN-YOLO在精确率、召回率和mAP方面分别达到了97.0%、95.1%和98.9%，优于YOLOv8基线。在HRSID和SSDD数据集上的实验证明了该方法的有效性，并在整体性能上优于其他代表性深度学习检测器。
AI.conclusion: CPN-YOLO通过集成上述三个关键改进，有效解决了SAR图像船舶检测中的挑战，显著提升了检测精度和鲁棒性，尤其在复杂场景下表现优异。

title: NAU-QMUL: Utilizing BERT and CLIP for Multi-modal AI-Generated Image Detection
summary: With the aim of detecting AI-generated images and identifying the specific models responsible for their generation, we propose a multi-modal multi-task model. The model leverages pre-trained BERT and CLIP Vision encoders for text and image feature extraction, respectively, and employs cross-modal feature fusion with a tailored multi-task loss function. Additionally, a pseudo-labeling-based data augmentation strategy was utilized to expand the training dataset with high-confidence samples. The model achieved fifth place in both Tasks A and B of the `CT2: AI-Generated Image Detection' competition, with F1 scores of 83.16\% and 48.88\%, respectively. These findings highlight the effectiveness of the proposed architecture and its potential for advancing AI-generated content detection in real-world scenarios. The source code for our method is published on https://github.com/xxxxxxxxy/AIGeneratedImageDetection.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多模态、多任务模型，用于检测 AI 生成的图像并识别生成模型。该模型在 CT2 竞赛中取得了不错的成绩。
AI.motivation: 检测 AI 生成的图像并识别生成它们的模型，以应对 AI 生成内容带来的挑战。
AI.method: 使用预训练的 BERT 和 CLIP 编码器提取文本和图像特征，进行跨模态特征融合，并设计了定制的多任务损失函数。同时，采用伪标签数据增强策略扩充数据集。
AI.result: 在 CT2 竞赛的任务 A 和任务 B 中均获得第五名，F1 分数分别为 83.16% 和 48.88%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的模型架构在 AI 生成图像检测方面是有效的，并且在现实场景中有潜在应用价值。

title: Altitude-Aware Visual Place Recognition in Top-Down View
summary: To address the challenge of aerial visual place recognition (VPR) problem under significant altitude variations, this study proposes an altitude-adaptive VPR approach that integrates ground feature density analysis with image classification techniques. The proposed method estimates airborne platforms' relative altitude by analyzing the density of ground features in images, then applies relative altitude-based cropping to generate canonical query images, which are subsequently used in a classification-based VPR strategy for localization. Extensive experiments across diverse terrains and altitude conditions demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves high accuracy and robustness in both altitude estimation and VPR under significant altitude changes. Compared to conventional methods relying on barometric altimeters or Time-of-Flight (ToF) sensors, this solution requires no additional hardware and offers a plug-and-play solution for downstream applications, {making it suitable for small- and medium-sized airborne platforms operating in diverse environments, including rural and urban areas.} Under significant altitude variations, incorporating our relative altitude estimation module into the VPR retrieval pipeline boosts average R@1 and R@5 by 29.85\% and 60.20\%, respectively, compared with applying VPR retrieval alone. Furthermore, compared to traditional {Monocular Metric Depth Estimation (MMDE) methods}, the proposed method reduces the mean error by 202.1 m, yielding average additional improvements of 31.4\% in R@1 and 44\% in R@5. These results demonstrate that our method establishes a robust, vision-only framework for three-dimensional visual place recognition, offering a practical and scalable solution for accurate airborne platforms localization under large altitude variations and limited sensor availability.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于地面特征密度和图像分类的自适应视觉定位方法，无需额外硬件，能在大幅度海拔变化下实现高精度定位。
AI.motivation: 现有航空视觉定位方法在高海拔变化下表现不佳，且通常依赖额外传感器，难以应用于小型航空平台。
AI.method: 通过分析图像中地面特征密度估计相对海拔，然后进行图像裁剪生成规范化查询图像，并结合基于分类的视觉定位策略进行定位。
AI.result: 在不同地形和海拔条件下，该方法在海拔估计和视觉定位方面均取得了高精度和鲁棒性。与传统方法相比，无需额外硬件，并且在海拔变化剧烈时，R@1和R@5分别提高了29.85%和60.20%。与MMDE方法相比，平均误差降低了202.1米，R@1和R@5分别提高了31.4%和44%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法建立了一个鲁棒的纯视觉三维视觉定位框架，为大幅度海拔变化和传感器受限情况下的航空平台精确本地化提供了一个实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: APPO: Attention-guided Perception Policy Optimization for Video Reasoning
summary: Complex video reasoning, actually, relies excessively on fine-grained perception rather than on expert (e.g., Ph.D, Science)-level reasoning. Through extensive empirical observation, we have recognized the critical impact of perception. In particular, when perception ability is almost fixed, enhancing reasoning from Qwen3-8B to OpenAI-o3 yields only 0.7% performance improvement. Conversely, even minimal change in perception model scale (from 7B to 32B) boosts performance by 1.4%, indicating enhancing perception, rather than reasoning, is more critical to improve performance. Therefore, exploring how to enhance perception ability through reasoning without the need for expensive fine-grained annotation information is worthwhile.
