To achieve this goal, we specially propose APPO, the Attention-guided Perception Policy Optimization algorithm that leverages token-level dense rewards to improve model's fine-grained perception. The core idea behind APPO is to optimize those tokens from different responses that primarily focus on the same crucial video frame (called intra-group perception tokens). Experimental results on diverse video benchmarks and models with different scales (3/7B) demonstrate APPO consistently outperforms GRPO and DAPO (0.5%~4%). We hope our work provides a promising approach to effectively enhance model's perception abilities through reasoning in a low-cost manner, serving diverse scenarios and demands.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种名为APPO（Attention-guided Perception Policy Optimization）的算法，旨在通过利用令牌级别的密集奖励来提升模型在视频理解任务中的精细感知能力，而无需昂贵的精细标注信息。
AI.motivation: 研究者发现，视频推理任务在很大程度上依赖于精细的感知能力，而非高级的推理能力。当感知能力固定时，提升推理模型（如从Qwen3-8B到OpenAI-o3）仅带来微小的性能提升，而即使是微小的感知模型规模变化（从7B到32B）也能显著提高性能。因此，在无需昂贵精细标注信息的情况下，探索如何通过推理来增强感知能力具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出APPO算法，其核心思想是优化来自不同响应中主要关注同一关键视频帧的令牌（称为组内感知令牌）。APPO利用令牌级别的密集奖励来改进模型的精细感知。
AI.result: 在多个视频基准和不同规模的模型（3/7B）上进行的实验表明，APPO算法在性能上始终优于GRPO和DAPO算法，提升幅度在0.5%至4%之间。
AI.conclusion: APPO算法为一种低成本、通过推理增强模型感知能力的有前景的方法，能够满足多样化的场景和需求。

title: PointCoT: A Multi-modal Benchmark for Explicit 3D Geometric Reasoning
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate proficiency in 2D scenes, extending their perceptual intelligence to 3D point cloud understanding remains a significant challenge. Current approaches focus primarily on aligning 3D features with pre-trained models. However, they typically treat geometric reasoning as an implicit mapping process. These methods bypass intermediate logical steps and consequently suffer from geometric hallucinations. They confidently generate plausible responses that fail to ground in precise structural details. To bridge this gap, we present PointCoT, a novel framework that empowers MLLMs with explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning for 3D data. We advocate for a \textit{Look, Think, then Answer} paradigm. In this approach, the model is supervised to generate geometry-grounded rationales before predicting final answers. To facilitate this, we construct Point-Reason-Instruct, a large-scale benchmark comprising $\sim$86k instruction-tuning samples with hierarchical CoT annotations. By leveraging a dual-stream multi-modal architecture, our method synergizes semantic appearance with geometric truth. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PointCoT achieves state-of-the-art performance on complex reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: PointCoT是一个新框架，通过引入显式的三维链式思考（CoT）推理，来增强多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）对三维点云的理解能力，解决了现有方法存在的几何幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在处理2D场景方面表现良好，但在3D点云理解方面存在挑战，特别是几何推理能力不足，容易产生几何幻觉。现有方法主要依赖隐式映射，忽略了中间逻辑步骤。
AI.method: 提出PointCoT框架，采用“Look, Think, then Answer”的范式，模型被训练生成几何基础的推理过程，然后再给出最终答案。构建了名为Point-Reason-Instruct的大规模基准数据集（包含约8.6万个指令调优样本和分层CoT标注）。采用双流多模态架构，融合语义外观和几何信息。
AI.result: PointCoT在复杂的推理任务上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: PointCoT通过引入显式的几何推理和大规模的基准数据集，有效解决了MLLMs在3D点云理解中的几何幻觉问题，并显著提升了其在三维推理任务上的性能。

title: AoE: Always-on Egocentric Human Video Collection for Embodied AI
summary: Embodied foundation models require large-scale, high-quality real-world interaction data for pre-training and scaling. However, existing data collection methods suffer from high infrastructure costs, complex hardware dependencies, and limited interaction scope, making scalable expansion challenging. In fact, humans themselves are ideal physically embodied agents. Therefore, obtaining egocentric real-world interaction data from globally distributed "human agents" offers advantages of low cost and sustainability. To this end, we propose the Always-on Egocentric (AoE) data collection system, which aims to simplify hardware dependencies by leveraging humans themselves and their smartphones, enabling low-cost, highly efficient, and scene-agnostic real-world interaction data collection to address the challenge of data scarcity. Specifically, we first employ an ergonomic neck-mounted smartphone holder to enable low-barrier, large-scale egocentric data collection through a cloud-edge collaborative architecture. Second, we develop a cross-platform mobile APP that leverages on-device compute for real-time processing, while the cloud hosts automated labeling and filtering pipelines that transform raw videos into high-quality training data. Finally, the AoE system supports distributed Ego video data collection by anyone, anytime, and anywhere. We evaluate AoE on data preprocessing quality and downstream tasks, demonstrating that high-quality egocentric data significantly boosts real-world generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Always-on Egocentric (AoE) 的数据采集系统，利用智能手机和人体自身，通过云边协同架构，低成本、高效率地采集场景无关的个体视角真实世界交互数据，以解决具身基础模型训练中的数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的具身基础模型预训练需要大规模、高质量的真实世界交互数据，但现有数据采集方法成本高、硬件依赖复杂且交互范围有限，难以扩展。人类是理想的物理具身主体，利用人类及其智能手机采集个体视角数据具有低成本和可持续的优势。
AI.method: 开发了AoE数据采集系统，包括：1. 人体工程学颈戴式智能手机支架，实现低门槛、大规模的个体视角数据采集。2. 云边协同架构，利用边缘计算进行实时处理，云端进行自动化标注和过滤。3. 跨平台移动APP，支持任何人、随时、随地进行分布式Ego视频数据采集。
AI.result: AoE系统能够采集高质量的个体视角数据。在数据预处理质量和下游任务评估中，证明了高质量的个体视角数据显著提升了真实世界泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: AoE系统是一种低成本、高效率、场景无关的真实世界交互数据采集解决方案，通过利用人类及其智能手机，解决了具身基础模型训练中的数据稀缺问题，并能显著提升模型的真实世界泛化能力。

title: Micro-expression Recognition Based on Dual-branch Feature Extraction and Fusion
summary: Micro-expressions, characterized by transience and subtlety, pose challenges to existing optical flow-based recognition methods. To address this, this paper proposes a dual-branch micro-expression feature extraction network integrated with parallel attention. Key contributions include: 1) a residual network designed to alleviate gradient anishing and network degradation; 2) an Inception network constructed to enhance model representation and suppress interference from irrelevant regions; 3) an adaptive feature fusion module developed to integrate dual-branch features. Experiments on the CASME II dataset demonstrate that the proposed method achieves 74.67% accuracy, outperforming LBP-TOP (by 11.26%), MSMMT (by 3.36%), and other comparative methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双分支微表情特征提取网络，并集成了并行注意力机制，以解决现有光流法在识别微表情方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于光流的微表情识别方法在处理微表情的短暂性和细微性时存在挑战。
AI.method: 提出了一种双分支网络，其中一个分支使用残差网络来缓解梯度消失和网络退化，另一个分支使用Inception网络来增强模型表示并抑制无关区域的干扰。此外，还设计了一个自适应特征融合模块来整合双分支的特征。
AI.result: 在CASME II数据集上，该方法取得了74.67%的准确率，优于LBP-TOP（提高了11.26%）、MSMMT（提高了3.36%）以及其他对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的双分支微表情特征提取网络结合并行注意力机制，能够有效提升微表情识别的准确率。

title: Toward Guarantees for Clinical Reasoning in Vision Language Models via Formal Verification
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) show promise in drafting radiology reports, yet they frequently suffer from logical inconsistencies, generating diagnostic impressions unsupported by their own perceptual findings or missing logically entailed conclusions. Standard lexical metrics heavily penalize clinical paraphrasing and fail to capture these deductive failures in reference-free settings. Toward guarantees for clinical reasoning, we introduce a neurosymbolic verification framework that deterministically audits the internal consistency of VLM-generated reports. Our pipeline autoformalizes free-text radiographic findings into structured propositional evidence, utilizing an SMT solver (Z3) and a clinical knowledge base to verify whether each diagnostic claim is mathematically entailed, hallucinated, or omitted. Evaluating seven VLMs across five chest X-ray benchmarks, our verifier exposes distinct reasoning failure modes, such as conservative observation and stochastic hallucination, that remain invisible to traditional metrics. On labeled datasets, enforcing solver-backed entailment acts as a rigorous post-hoc guarantee, systematically eliminating unsupported hallucinations to significantly increase diagnostic soundness and precision in generative clinical assistants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经符号验证框架，用于自动审计视觉语言模型（VLMs）生成的放射报告中的逻辑一致性，以解决其在诊断印象方面的不足，并提高了报告的诊断健全性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型（VLMs）在撰写放射报告时存在逻辑不一致的问题，例如诊断印象与感知结果不符，或遗漏逻辑上应包含的结论。传统的词汇评估方法无法有效捕捉这些演绎性失败，也无法在无参考的情况下进行评估。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种神经符号验证框架，该框架将自由文本的影像学发现自动形式化为结构化的命题证据。利用SMT求解器（Z3）和临床知识库，对生成的诊断声明进行数学上的蕴含、幻觉或遗漏验证。
AI.result: 在对七个VLMs和五个胸部X光片基准的评估中，该验证器暴露了传统指标无法检测到的特定推理失败模式，例如保守观察和随机幻觉。通过强制求解器支持的蕴含关系，可以系统地消除不支持的幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号验证框架可以作为一种严格的后处理保证，显著提高生成式临床助手在诊断健全性和精确性方面的表现，并有效解决了VLMs在生成放射报告时存在的逻辑一致性问题。

title: Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation in Remote Sensing via Hierarchical Attention Masking and Model Composition
comment: Published in the proceedings of the British Machine Vision Conference Workshops 2025
summary: In this paper, we propose ReSeg-CLIP, a new training-free Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation method for remote sensing data. To compensate for the problems of vision language models, such as CLIP in semantic segmentation caused by inappropriate interactions within the self-attention layers, we introduce a hierarchical scheme utilizing masks generated by SAM to constrain the interactions at multiple scales. We also present a model composition approach that averages the parameters of multiple RS-specific CLIP variants, taking advantage of a new weighting scheme that evaluates representational quality using varying text prompts. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results across three RS benchmarks without additional training.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 ReSeg-CLIP 的无需训练的开放词汇量遥感语义分割方法，通过 SAM 生成的掩码来约束多尺度注意力交互，并采用模型组合策略提高性能。
AI.motivation: 解决 Vision-Language 模型（如 CLIP）在语义分割任务中，由于自注意力层内不恰当的交互而导致的性能问题。
AI.method: 采用分层方案，利用 SAM 生成的掩码来约束多尺度下的注意力交互；提出了一种模型组合方法，通过评估不同文本提示下的表示质量来对多个遥感特定 CLIP 变体的参数进行加权平均。
AI.result: 在三个遥感数据集上达到了最先进的结果，且无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: ReSeg-CLIP 是一种有效的无需训练的开放词汇量遥感语义分割方法，通过引入掩码约束和模型组合策略，克服了现有 Vision-Language 模型在遥感数据上的局限性。

title: Interpretable Debiasing of Vision-Language Models for Social Fairness
comment: 25 pages, 30 figures, 13 Tables Accepted to CVPR 2026
summary: The rapid advancement of Vision-Language models (VLMs) has raised growing concerns that their black-box reasoning processes could lead to unintended forms of social bias. Current debiasing approaches focus on mitigating surface-level bias signals through post-hoc learning or test-time algorithms, while leaving the internal dynamics of the model largely unexplored. In this work, we introduce an interpretable, model-agnostic bias mitigation framework, DeBiasLens, that localizes social attribute neurons in VLMs through sparse autoencoders (SAEs) applied to multimodal encoders. Building upon the disentanglement ability of SAEs, we train them on facial image or caption datasets without corresponding social attribute labels to uncover neurons highly responsive to specific demographics, including those that are underrepresented. By selectively deactivating the social neurons most strongly tied to bias for each group, we effectively mitigate socially biased behaviors of VLMs without degrading their semantic knowledge. Our research lays the groundwork for future auditing tools, prioritizing social fairness in emerging real-world AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种名为DeBiasLens的可解释、模型无关的偏见缓解框架，通过稀疏自编码器（SAEs）定位视觉语言模型（VLMs）中的社会属性神经元，并选择性地对其进行去激活以减轻社会偏见，同时保留模型的语义知识。
AI.motivation: 现有针对视觉语言模型（VLMs）的去偏见方法主要集中在后验学习或测试时算法，缺乏对模型内部工作机制的探索，并且可能导致模型出现意想不到的社会偏见。
AI.method: 使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）应用于多模态编码器，以解耦的方式学习，旨在发掘对特定人群（包括代表性不足的群体）高度响应的神经元。通过选择性地去激活与偏见联系最紧密的社会属性神经元来减轻偏见。
AI.result: 该方法成功地减轻了VLMs的社会偏见行为，且在去偏见的同时没有损害模型的语义知识。
AI.conclusion: DeBiasLens提供了一种新的、可解释的、模型无关的偏见缓解方法，通过定位和调整内部神经元来解决VLMs中的社会偏见问题，并为未来AI系统的公平性审计奠定了基础。

title: AgenticOCR: Parsing Only What You Need for Efficient Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: The expansion of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) into multimodal domains has intensified the challenge for processing complex visual documents, such as financial reports. While page-level chunking and retrieval is a natural starting point, it creates a critical bottleneck: delivering entire pages to the generator introduces excessive extraneous context. This not only overloads the generator's attention mechanism but also dilutes the most salient evidence. Moreover, compressing these information-rich pages into a limited visual token budget further increases the risk of hallucinations. To address this, we introduce AgenticOCR, a dynamic parsing paradigm that transforms optical character recognition (OCR) from a static, full-text process into a query-driven, on-demand extraction system. By autonomously analyzing document layout in a "thinking with images" manner, AgenticOCR identifies and selectively recognizes regions of interest. This approach performs on-demand decompression of visual tokens precisely where needed, effectively decoupling retrieval granularity from rigid page-level chunking. AgenticOCR has the potential to serve as the "third building block" of the visual document RAG stack, operating alongside and enhancing standard Embedding and Reranking modules. Experimental results demonstrate that AgenticOCR improves both the efficiency and accuracy of visual RAG systems, achieving expert-level performance in long document understanding. Code and models are available at https://github.com/OpenDataLab/AgenticOCR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AgenticOCR的动态解析范式，用于解决多模态检索增强生成（RAG）中处理复杂视觉文档（如财务报告）的挑战。AgenticOCR将OCR从静态过程转变为查询驱动的按需提取系统，通过自主分析文档布局，识别并选择性识别感兴趣的区域，从而减轻了生成器的上下文过载和信息稀释问题，并提高了效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态RAG系统在处理视觉文档时，面临着页面级块检索带来的严重瓶颈：将整个页面传递给生成器会引入过多的无关上下文，导致生成器注意力机制过载，关键证据被稀释，并且在压缩信息丰富的页面到有限的视觉令牌预算时，幻觉的风险增加。
AI.method: 本文提出AgenticOCR，一种动态解析范式。它将OCR从一个静态的、全文本处理过程转变为一个查询驱动的、按需提取系统。AgenticOCR通过“图像思考”的方式自主分析文档布局，识别并选择性地识别感兴趣的区域。这种方法在需要时按需解压视觉令牌，有效解耦了检索粒度与僵化的页面级分块。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，AgenticOCR能够提高视觉RAG系统的效率和准确性，在长文档理解方面达到了专家级性能。通过将AgenticOCR作为视觉文档RAG堆栈的“第三个构建块”，它与标准的嵌入和重排序模块协同工作并增强它们。
AI.conclusion: AgenticOCR是一种有效的解决方案，可以克服多模态RAG在处理复杂视觉文档时遇到的挑战，通过实现查询驱动的按需区域识别和提取，显著提升了系统的性能。

title: Bandwidth-adaptive Cloud-Assisted 360-Degree 3D Perception for Autonomous Vehicles
summary: A key challenge for autonomous driving lies in maintaining real-time situational awareness regarding surrounding obstacles under strict latency constraints. The high processing requirements coupled with limited onboard computational resources can cause delay issues, particularly in complex urban settings. To address this, we propose leveraging Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication to partially offload processing to the cloud, where compute resources are abundant, thus reducing overall latency. Our approach utilizes transformer-based models to fuse multi-camera sensor data into a comprehensive Bird's-Eye View (BEV) representation, enabling accurate 360-degree 3D object detection. The computation is dynamically split between the vehicle and the cloud based on the number of layers processed locally and the quantization level of the features. To further reduce network load, we apply feature vector clipping and compression prior to transmission. In a real-world experimental evaluation, our hybrid strategy achieved a 72 \% reduction in end-to-end latency compared to a traditional onboard solution. To adapt to fluctuating network conditions, we introduce a dynamic optimization algorithm that selects the split point and quantization level to maximize detection accuracy while satisfying real-time latency constraints. Trace-based evaluation under realistic bandwidth variability shows that this adaptive approach improves accuracy by up to 20 \% over static parameterization with the same latency performance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于V2X通信的混合式自动驾驶感知方案，通过将部分计算任务卸载到云端，并结合Transformer模型生成BEV表示，有效降低了感知延迟并提高了3D目标检测精度，同时引入动态优化算法以适应网络波动。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶实时情境感知面临延迟和计算资源限制的挑战，尤其是在复杂的城市环境中。现有车载计算资源有限，难以满足高要求的实时处理。
AI.method: 利用V2X通信将计算任务部分卸载到云端；采用Transformer模型融合多摄像头数据生成BEV表示，实现360度3D目标检测；通过动态划分计算层数和量化级别实现车云协同计算；应用特征向量裁剪和压缩减少网络负载；引入动态优化算法以适应网络条件，最大化检测精度并满足延迟约束。
AI.result: 在真实世界实验中，提出的混合策略将端到端延迟降低了72%；基于轨迹的评估显示，动态优化算法相比静态参数化，在相同延迟下准确率提高了20%。
AI.conclusion: 通过将部分感知计算卸载到云端并采用Transformer进行BEV表示，可以显著降低自动驾驶的感知延迟。动态优化算法能够有效应对网络波动，在满足实时性的前提下进一步提升检测精度。

title: SelfOccFlow: Towards end-to-end self-supervised 3D Occupancy Flow prediction
comment: Accepted version. Final version is published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, DOI: 10.1109/LRA.2026.3665447
summary: Estimating 3D occupancy and motion at the vehicle's surroundings is essential for autonomous driving, enabling situational awareness in dynamic environments. Existing approaches jointly learn geometry and motion but rely on expensive 3D occupancy and flow annotations, velocity labels from bounding boxes, or pretrained optical flow models. We propose a self-supervised method for 3D occupancy flow estimation that eliminates the need for human-produced annotations or external flow supervision. Our method disentangles the scene into separate static and dynamic signed distance fields and learns motion implicitly through temporal aggregation. Additionally, we introduce a strong self-supervised flow cue derived from features' cosine similarities. We demonstrate the efficacy of our 3D occupancy flow method on SemanticKITTI, KITTI-MOT, and nuScenes.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需人工标注或外部光流监督的3D占据流估计自监督方法，通过解耦静态和动态场景的SDF以及利用特征余弦相似度驱动的光流线索来隐式学习运动。
AI.motivation: 现有3D占据和运动估计方法需要昂贵的人工标注（3D占据、光流、速度标签）或预训练的光流模型。
AI.method: 通过解耦静态和动态的有符号距离场（SDF），并利用时间聚合隐式学习运动。引入基于特征余弦相似度的自监督光流线索。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI、KITTI-MOT和nuScenes数据集上证明了所提出方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该自监督方法能够有效估计3D占据流，并且无需昂贵的人工标注或外部光流监督。

title: DACESR: Degradation-Aware Conditional Embedding for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
summary: Multimodal large models have shown excellent ability in addressing image super-resolution in real-world scenarios by leveraging language class as condition information, yet their abilities in degraded images remain limited. In this paper, we first revisit the capabilities of the Recognize Anything Model (RAM) for degraded images by calculating text similarity. We find that directly using contrastive learning to fine-tune RAM in the degraded space is difficult to achieve acceptable results. To address this issue, we employ a degradation selection strategy to propose a Real Embedding Extractor (REE), which achieves significant recognition performance gain on degraded image content through contrastive learning. Furthermore, we use a Conditional Feature Modulator (CFM) to incorporate the high-level information of REE for a powerful Mamba-based network, which can leverage effective pixel information to restore image textures and produce visually pleasing results. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the REE can effectively help image super-resolution networks balance fidelity and perceptual quality, highlighting the great potential of Mamba in real-world applications. The source code of this work will be made publicly available at: https://github.com/nathan66666/DACESR.git

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于Mamba的图像超分辨率方法，通过引入Real Embedding Extractor (REE)和Conditional Feature Modulator (CFM)来处理退化图像，显著提升了图像重建的保真度和感知质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态大模型在处理退化图像的超分辨率方面能力有限，直接在退化图像空间上微调模型难以获得满意结果。
AI.method: 研究者首先评估了Recognize Anything Model (RAM)在退化图像上的表现。然后，提出了一种名为Real Embedding Extractor (REE)的退化图像特征提取器，并结合对比学习进行优化。最后，利用Conditional Feature Modulator (CFM)将REE的高层语义信息融入Mamba网络，以增强像素信息的恢复和纹理细节的生成。
AI.result: REE在退化图像识别任务上取得了显著的性能提升。所提出的基于Mamba的超分辨率网络通过REE和CFM的结合，能够有效地平衡图像的保真度和感知质量，生成视觉上令人满意的结果。
AI.conclusion: REE能够有效帮助图像超分辨率网络处理退化图像，提升重建质量，并展示了Mamba在实际应用中的巨大潜力。

title: Quant Experts: Token-aware Adaptive Error Reconstruction with Mixture of Experts for Large Vision-Language Models Quantization
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures, including appendix, Accepted at CVPR 2026
summary: Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) has emerged as an effective technique for alleviating the substantial computational and memory overheads of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) by compressing both weights and activations without retraining the full model. Existing PTQ methods primarily rely on static identification and global compensation of sensitive or outlier channels, yet they often overlook the distributional differences of these important channels across inputs, leading to unsatisfactory quantization. In this work, we observe that the distributions and occurrence frequencies of important channels vary significantly both across modalities and among tokens, even within the same modality. Accordingly, we propose \textbf{Quant Experts (QE)}, a token-aware adaptive error compensation with mixture-of-experts for VLMs quantization. QE divides the important channels into token-independent and token-dependent groups. For the former, a shared expert is designed for most tokens to compensate for global quantization error using a low-rank adapter. For the latter, routed experts including multiple routed low-rank adapters are elaborated to compensate for local quantization error related to specific tokens. Extensive experiments demonstrate that QE consistently enhances task accuracy across various quantization settings and model scales, ranging from 2B to 70B parameters, while maintaining performance comparable to full-precision models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Quant Experts (QE) 的新方法，用于视觉语言模型（VLMs）的训练后量化（PTQ）。QE通过 token 感知的自适应误差补偿和专家混合机制，有效解决了现有 PTQ 方法忽略重要通道在不同输入下的分布差异问题，显著提升了量化后的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 PTQ 方法在处理 VLMs 时，通常采用静态识别和全局补偿敏感或异常通道的方式，但忽略了这些重要通道在不同输入下的分布差异，导致量化效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出 Quant Experts (QE) 方法，将重要通道分为 token-独立和 token-依赖两组。对于 token-独立通道，使用低秩适配器（low-rank adapter）设计的共享专家来补偿全局量化误差。对于 token-依赖通道，设计了包含多个路由低秩适配器的路由专家来补偿与特定 token 相关的局部量化误差。
AI.result: QE 在各种量化设置和不同模型规模（2B 到 70B 参数）下，一致地提升了任务准确性，且性能接近全精度模型。
AI.conclusion: QE 是一种有效的 VLMs 量化方法，通过 token 感知的自适应误差补偿和专家混合机制，能够显著提升量化模型的性能，并保持与全精度模型的竞争力。

title: DiffusionHarmonizer: Bridging Neural Reconstruction and Photorealistic Simulation with Online Diffusion Enhancer
comment: For more details and updates, please visit our project website: https://research.nvidia.com/labs/sil/projects/diffusion-harmonizer
summary: Simulation is essential to the development and evaluation of autonomous robots such as self-driving vehicles. Neural reconstruction is emerging as a promising solution as it enables simulating a wide variety of scenarios from real-world data alone in an automated and scalable way. However, while methods such as NeRF and 3D Gaussian Splatting can produce visually compelling results, they often exhibit artifacts particularly when rendering novel views, and fail to realistically integrate inserted dynamic objects, especially when they were captured from different scenes. To overcome these limitations, we introduce DiffusionHarmonizer, an online generative enhancement framework that transforms renderings from such imperfect scenes into temporally consistent outputs while improving their realism. At its core is a single-step temporally-conditioned enhancer that is converted from a pretrained multi-step image diffusion model, capable of running in online simulators on a single GPU. The key to training it effectively is a custom data curation pipeline that constructs synthetic-real pairs emphasizing appearance harmonization, artifact correction, and lighting realism. The result is a scalable system that significantly elevates simulation fidelity in both research and production environments.

AI.tldr: DiffusionHarmonizer是一个在线生成式增强框架，用于将神经重建生成的图像（如NeRF和3D高斯溅射）中的渲染伪影和不真实的动态对象集成进行修复，以生成时间上一致且更逼真的输出。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经重建方法（如NeRF和3D高斯溅射）在渲染新视角时常出现伪影，并且难以真实地集成插入的动态对象，尤其是在对象来自不同场景时。这限制了自动驾驶等领域仿真的准确性。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为DiffusionHarmonizer的在线生成式增强框架。该框架的核心是一个单步时间条件增强器，该增强器由预训练的多步图像扩散模型转化而来，可以在单GPU上在线运行。其训练的关键在于一个自定义的数据策管线，该策管线生成强调外观协调、伪影校正和光照真实感的合成-真实图像对。
AI.result: DiffusionHarmonizer能够将来自不完美场景的渲染转化为时间上一致且逼真的输出，显著提高了模拟保真度。
AI.conclusion: DiffusionHarmonizer是一个可扩展的系统，能够有效解决神经重建的渲染伪影和动态对象集成问题，从而提升研究和生产环境中模拟的真实感和可靠性。

title: Multimodal Optimal Transport for Unsupervised Temporal Segmentation in Surgical Robotics
summary: Recognizing surgical phases and steps from video is a fundamental problem in computer-assisted interventions. Recent approaches increasingly rely on large-scale pre-training on thousands of labeled surgical videos, followed by zero-shot transfer to specific procedures. While effective, this strategy incurs substantial computational and data collection costs. In this work, we question whether such heavy pre-training is truly necessary. We propose Text-Augmented Action Segmentation Optimal Transport (TASOT), an unsupervised method for surgical phase and step recognition that extends Action Segmentation Optimal Transport (ASOT) by incorporating textual information generated directly from the videos. TASOT formulates temporal action segmentation as a multimodal optimal transport problem, where the matching cost is defined as a weighted combination of visual and text-based costs. The visual term captures frame-level appearance similarity, while the text term provides complementary semantic cues, and both are jointly regularized through a temporally consistent unbalanced Gromov-Wasserstein formulation. This design enables effective alignment between video frames and surgical actions without surgical-specific pretraining or external web-scale supervision. We evaluate TASOT on multiple benchmark surgical datasets and observe consistent and substantial improvements over existing zero-shot methods, including StrasBypass70 (+23.7), BernBypass70 (+4.5), Cholec80 (+16.5), and AutoLaparo (+19.6). These results demonstrate that fine-grained surgical understanding can be achieved by exploiting information already present in standard visual and textual representations, without resorting to increasingly complex pre-training pipelines. The code will be available at https://github.com/omar8ahmed9/TASOT.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 TASOT 的无监督方法，通过结合视频的文本信息来改进手术阶段和步骤识别，而无需大规模预训练。
AI.motivation: 现有手术阶段和步骤识别方法依赖大规模预训练，成本高昂。研究者质疑这种重度预训练的必要性，并寻求一种更经济高效的方法。
AI.method: TASOT 是一种无监督方法，将时序动作分割构建为一个多模态最优传输问题。它扩展了 ASOT，并引入了从视频中直接生成的文本信息。匹配成本结合了视觉和文本信息，并通过不平衡的 Gromov-Wasserstein 公式进行时间一致性正则化。
AI.result: TASOT 在多个手术数据集上表现优于现有的零样本方法，在 StrasBypass70、BernBypass70、Cholec80 和 AutoLaparo 数据集上分别提高了 23.7%、4.5%、16.5% 和 19.6%。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用标准视觉和文本表示中的信息，可以在不依赖复杂预训练的情况下实现细粒度手术理解，TASOT 证明了这一点。

title: A Mixed Diet Makes DINO An Omnivorous Vision Encoder
summary: Pre-trained vision encoders like DINOv2 have demonstrated exceptional performance on unimodal tasks. However, we observe that their feature representations are poorly aligned across different modalities. For instance, the feature embedding for an RGB image and its corresponding depth map of the same scene exhibit a cosine similarity that is nearly identical to that of two random, unrelated images. To address this, we propose the Omnivorous Vision Encoder, a novel framework that learns a modality-agnostic feature space. We train the encoder with a dual objective: first, to maximize the feature alignment between different modalities of the same scene; and second, a distillation objective that anchors the learned representations to the output of a fully frozen teacher such as DINOv2. The resulting student encoder becomes "omnivorous" by producing a consistent, powerful embedding for a given scene, regardless of the input modality (RGB, Depth, Segmentation, etc.). This approach enables robust cross-modal understanding while retaining the discriminative semantics of the original foundation model.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为“杂食性视觉编码器”（Omnivorous Vision Encoder）的新框架，旨在学习一种与模态无关的特征空间，以解决现有预训练视觉编码器在多模态特征对齐方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有的预训练视觉编码器（如DINOv2）在单一模态任务上表现优异，但其不同模态（如RGB图像和深度图）的特征表示对齐性差，相似度接近于随机。这阻碍了跨模态的理解。
AI.method: 设计了一个训练框架，包含两个主要目标：1) 最大化同一场景下不同模态特征表示的对齐；2) 采用知识蒸馏，将学习到的表示锚定到固定的教师模型（如DINOv2）的输出上。通过这种方式，编码器能够生成模态无关的、一致的场景嵌入。
AI.result: 该“杂食性”编码器能够为同一场景生成跨模态（RGB、深度、分割等）一致且强大的特征嵌入，有效提升了跨模态理解能力，同时保留了原始基础模型的语义判别力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功开发了一种能够学习模态无关特征空间的视觉编码器，通过联合对齐和知识蒸馏的训练策略，克服了现有模型的局限性，实现了在多模态场景下的鲁棒理解。

title: SegMate: Asymmetric Attention-Based Lightweight Architecture for Efficient Multi-Organ Segmentation
summary: State-of-the-art models for medical image segmentation achieve excellent accuracy but require substantial computational resources, limiting deployment in resource-constrained clinical settings. We present SegMate, an efficient 2.5D framework that achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, while considerably reducing computational requirements. Our efficient design is the result of meticulously integrating asymmetric architectures, attention mechanisms, multi-scale feature fusion, slice-based positional conditioning, and multi-task optimization. We demonstrate the efficiency-accuracy trade-off of our framework across three modern backbones (EfficientNetV2-M, MambaOut-Tiny, FastViT-T12). We perform experiments on three datasets: TotalSegmentator, SegTHOR and AMOS22. Compared with the vanilla models, SegMate reduces computation (GFLOPs) by up to 2.5x and memory footprint (VRAM) by up to 2.1x, while generally registering performance gains of around 1%. On TotalSegmentator, we achieve a Dice score of 93.51% with only 295MB peak GPU memory. Zero-shot cross-dataset evaluations on SegTHOR and AMOS22 demonstrate strong generalization, with Dice scores of up to 86.85% and 89.35%, respectively. We release our open-source code at https://github.com/andreibunea99/SegMate.

AI.tldr: SegMate是一个高效的2.5D医学图像分割框架，通过结合多种优化技术，在保证甚至提升精度的同时，显著降低了计算资源需求，并在多个数据集上取得了优异的性能和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有先进的医学图像分割模型虽然精度高，但计算资源需求大，难以在资源受限的临床环境中使用。研究的动机是开发一个在精度和计算效率之间取得良好平衡的分割框架。
AI.method: SegMate采用2.5D框架，集成了不对称架构、注意力机制、多尺度特征融合、基于切片的 positional conditioning 和多任务优化。研究人员还在EfficientNetV2-M、MambaOut-Tiny和FastViT-T12这三个不同的骨干网络上验证了该框架的有效性。
AI.result: SegMate相比于原始模型，计算量（GFLOPs）最多可减少2.5倍，显存占用（VRAM）最多可减少2.1倍，同时通常能带来约1%的性能提升。在TotalSegmentator数据集上，SegMate实现了93.51%的Dice分数，峰值GPU内存仅为295MB。在SegTHOR和AMOS22数据集上的零样本跨数据集评估也显示出强大的泛化能力，Dice分数分别高达86.85%和89.35%。
AI.conclusion: SegMate是一个高效且精度高的2.5D医学图像分割框架，能够显著减少计算和内存需求，并具有良好的泛化能力，适用于资源受限的临床环境。研究结果表明，通过精心的架构设计和优化技术，可以在效率和精度之间实现有效的权衡。

title: Half-Truths Break Similarity-Based Retrieval
summary: When a text description is extended with an additional detail, image-text similarity should drop if that detail is wrong. We show that CLIP-style dual encoders often violate this intuition: appending a plausible but incorrect object or relation to an otherwise correct description can increase the similarity score. We call such cases half-truths. On COCO, CLIP prefers the correct shorter description only 40.6% of the time, and performance drops to 32.9% when the added detail is a relation. We trace this vulnerability to weak supervision on caption parts: contrastive training aligns full sentences but does not explicitly enforce that individual entities and relations are grounded. We propose CS-CLIP (Component-Supervised CLIP), which decomposes captions into entity and relation units, constructs a minimally edited foil for each unit, and fine-tunes the model to score the correct unit above its foil while preserving standard dual-encoder inference. CS-CLIP raises half-truth accuracy to 69.3% and improves average performance on established compositional benchmarks by 5.7 points, suggesting that reducing half-truth errors aligns with broader gains in compositional understanding. Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/kargibora/CS-CLIP

AI.tldr: 本文指出，CLIP等图像-文本匹配模型容易受到“半真半假”描述的欺骗，即添加一个看似合理但错误的细节会提高相似度分数。研究提出了CS-CLIP模型，通过对文本组件（实体和关系）进行监督，有效解决了这一问题，并提高了模型在组合理解任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有CLIP风格的双编码器模型在处理包含附加细节的文本时，即使细节是错误的，也可能提高相似度分数，这违背了直觉。这种“半真半假”的现象表明模型在理解文本的组成部分（如实体和关系）方面存在弱点。
AI.method: 提出CS-CLIP（Component-Supervised CLIP）模型。该方法将文本描述分解为实体和关系单元，为每个单元构造一个最小化错误的“对抗样本”（foil），并通过对比学习训练模型，使其将正确单元的得分高于其对抗样本，同时保留标准的双编码器推理方式。
AI.result: CS-CLIP将“半真半假”描述的准确率从CLIP的40.6%（仅描述）和32.9%（带关系）提高到69.3%。在已有的组合理解基准测试上，CS-CLIP的平均性能提升了5.7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 通过组件监督（Component Supervision）可以有效减少图像-文本匹配模型中的“半真半假”现象，并且这种改进与提高模型在组合理解任务上的整体能力是相符的。

title: Leveraging Geometric Prior Uncertainty and Complementary Constraints for High-Fidelity Neural Indoor Surface Reconstruction
summary: Neural implicit surface reconstruction with signed distance function has made significant progress, but recovering fine details such as thin structures and complex geometries remains challenging due to unreliable or noisy geometric priors. Existing approaches rely on implicit uncertainty that arises during optimization to filter these priors, which is indirect and inefficient, and masking supervision in high-uncertainty regions further leads to under-constrained optimization. To address these issues, we propose GPU-SDF, a neural implicit framework for indoor surface reconstruction that leverages geometric prior uncertainty and complementary constraints. We introduce a self-supervised module that explicitly estimates prior uncertainty without auxiliary networks. Based on this estimation, we design an uncertainty-guided loss that modulates prior influence rather than discarding it, thereby retaining weak but informative cues. To address regions with high prior uncertainty, GPU-SDF further incorporates two complementary constraints: an edge distance field that strengthens boundary supervision and a multi-view consistency regularization that enforces geometric coherence. Extensive experiments confirm that GPU-SDF improves the reconstruction of fine details and serves as a plug-and-play enhancement for existing frameworks. Source code will be available at https://github.com/IRMVLab/GPU-SDF

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GPU-SDF的神经隐式表面重建框架，通过显式估计几何先验的不确定性，并结合不确定性引导损失、边缘距离场和多视图一致性正则化，以提高对室内场景精细几何细节（如薄结构和复杂几何体）的恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于符号距离函数（SDF）的神经隐式表面重建方法在恢复薄结构和复杂几何体等精细细节方面仍面临挑战，因为依赖的几何先验可能不可靠或存在噪声。现有方法通过优化过程中的隐式不确定性来过滤先验，这种方法间接且效率低下，并且在不确定性区域使用掩码监督会导致欠约束优化。
AI.method: GPU-SDF引入了一个自监督模块来显式估计几何先验的不确定性，无需辅助网络。基于此不确定性估计，设计了一个不确定性引导损失，该损失通过调节先验的影响力而非直接丢弃，从而保留了弱但有用的信息。为了处理高先验不确定性的区域，GPU-SDF还集成了两个互补约束：一个边缘距离场用于加强边界监督，以及一个多视图一致性正则化以保证几何一致性。
AI.result: 通过大量实验证明，GPU-SDF能够显著提升精细几何细节的重建质量。此外，GPU-SDF作为一个即插即用的模块，可以增强现有重建框架的性能。
AI.conclusion: GPU-SDF通过显式地量化几何先验的不确定性，并结合不确定性引导损失和互补约束，能够更有效地处理室内场景中的精细几何细节，是现有神经隐式表面重建方法的有效增强。

title: AHAP: Reconstructing Arbitrary Humans from Arbitrary Perspectives with Geometric Priors
summary: Reconstructing 3D humans from images captured at multiple perspectives typically requires pre-calibration, like using checkerboards or MVS algorithms, which limits scalability and applicability in diverse real-world scenarios. In this work, we present \textbf{AHAP} (Reconstructing \textbf{A}rbitrary \textbf{H}umans from \textbf{A}rbitrary \textbf{P}erspectives), a feed-forward framework for reconstructing arbitrary humans from arbitrary camera perspectives without requiring camera calibration. Our core lies in the effective fusion of multi-view geometry to assist human association, reconstruction and localization. Specifically, we use a Cross-View Identity Association module through learnable person queries and soft assignment, supervised by contrastive learning to resolve cross-view human identity association. A Human Head fuses cross-view features and scene context for SMPL prediction, guided by cross-view reprojection losses to enforce body pose consistency. Additionally, multi-view geometry eliminates the depth ambiguity inherent in monocular methods, providing more precise 3D human localization through multi-view triangulation. Experiments on EgoHumans and EgoExo4D demonstrate that AHAP achieves competitive performance on both world-space human reconstruction and camera pose estimation, while being 180$\times$ faster than optimization-based approaches.

AI.tldr: AHAP是一个无需相机标定即可从任意视角重建任意人物的框架，通过多视角几何来辅助人体关联、重建和定位，并在速度和性能上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的从多视角图像重建3D人体的方法通常需要预先标定相机，这限制了其在真实世界场景中的可扩展性和适用性。
AI.method: AHAP提出了一个前馈框架，核心在于融合多视角几何来辅助人体关联、重建和定位。具体包括：1. 使用跨视图身份关联模块（通过可学习的person queries和软分配，并用对比学习进行监督）来解决跨视图人体身份关联问题。2. 使用人体头部融合跨视图特征和场景上下文进行SMPL预测，并受跨视图重投影损失的指导以保证姿态一致性。3. 利用多视角几何消除单目方法固有的深度歧义，通过多视角三角测量实现更精确的3D人体定位。
AI.result: 在EgoHumans和EgoExo4D数据集上的实验表明，AHAP在世界空间人体重建和相机位姿估计方面均取得了具有竞争力的性能，并且比基于优化的方法快180倍。
AI.conclusion: AHAP是一个无需相机标定即可从任意视角重建任意人物的高效且准确的框架，通过有效融合多视角几何信息解决了现有方法的局限性。

title: SwitchCraft: Training-Free Multi-Event Video Generation with Attention Controls
summary: Recent advances in text-to-video diffusion models have enabled high-fidelity and temporally coherent videos synthesis. However, current models are predominantly optimized for single-event generation. When handling multi-event prompts, without explicit temporal grounding, such models often produce blended or collapsed scenes that break the intended narrative. To address this limitation, we present SwitchCraft, a training-free framework for multi-event video generation. Our key insight is that uniform prompt injection across time ignores the correspondence between events and frames. To this end, we introduce Event-Aligned Query Steering (EAQS), which steers frame-level attention to align with relevant event prompts. Furthermore, we propose Auto-Balance Strength Solver (ABSS), which adaptively balances steering strength to preserve temporal consistency and visual fidelity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SwitchCraft substantially improves prompt alignment, event clarity, and scene consistency compared with existing baselines, offering a simple yet effective solution for multi-event video generation.

AI.tldr: SwitchCraft 是一个无需训练的框架，用于生成包含多个事件的视频，通过事件对齐查询引导（EAQS）和自适应平衡强度求解器（ABSS）来解决现有模型在处理多事件提示时场景融合或崩溃的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本到视频扩散模型主要针对单事件生成，在处理包含多个事件的提示时，缺乏显式的时间对齐会导致场景融合或崩溃，破坏叙事。为了解决这一局限性，需要一种能够处理多事件提示的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为 SwitchCraft 的训练免费框架。核心是事件对齐查询引导（EAQS），用于将帧级注意力引导至相关的事件提示。同时引入了自适应平衡强度求解器（ABSS），用于自适应地平衡引导强度，以保持时间一致性和视觉保真度。
AI.result: SwitchCraft 在提示对齐、事件清晰度和场景一致性方面显著优于现有基线。实验表明，该方法能够有效地生成包含多个事件的、叙事连贯的视频。
AI.conclusion: SwitchCraft 提供了一种简单而有效的方法来解决多事件文本到视频生成中的挑战，通过新颖的 EAQS 和 ABSS 组件，能够生成更高质量、更具叙事性的多事件视频。

title: GDA-YOLO11: Amodal Instance Segmentation for Occlusion-Robust Robotic Fruit Harvesting
summary: Occlusion remains a critical challenge in robotic fruit harvesting, as undetected or inaccurately localised fruits often results in substantial crop losses. To mitigate this issue, we propose a harvesting framework using a new amodal segmentation model, GDA-YOLO11, which incorporates architectural improvements and an updated asymmetric mask loss. The proposed model is trained on a modified version of a public citrus dataset and evaluated on both the base dataset and occlusion-sensitive subsets with varying occlusion levels. Within the framework, full fruit masks, including invisible regions, are inferred by GDA-YOLO11, and picking points are subsequently estimated using the Euclidean distance transform. These points are then projected into 3D coordinates for robotic harvesting execution. Experiments were conducted using real citrus fruits in a controlled environment simulating occlusion scenarios. Notably, to the best of our knowledge, this study provides the first practical demonstration of amodal instance segmentation in robotic fruit harvesting. GDA-YOLO11 achieves a precision of 0.844, recall of 0.846, mAP@50 of 0.914, and mAP@50:95 of 0.636, outperforming YOLO11n by 5.1%, 1.3%, and 1.0% in precision, mAP@50, and mAP@50:95, respectively. The framework attains harvesting success rates of 92.59%, 85.18%, 48.14%, and 22.22% at zero to high occlusion levels, improving success by 3.5% under medium and high occlusion. These findings demonstrate that GDA-YOLO11 enhances occlusion robust segmentation and streamlines perception-to-action integration, paving the way for more reliable autonomous systems in agriculture.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GDA-YOLO11的无遮挡分割模型，用于解决机器人水果采摘中的遮挡问题，并通过实际实验证明了其在提高采摘成功率方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 在机器人水果采摘中，水果的遮挡是一个关键挑战，未被检测到或定位不准确的水果会导致大量的作物损失。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的无遮挡分割模型GDA-YOLO11，该模型改进了其架构并更新了非对称掩码损失。模型在修改后的公共柑橘数据集上进行训练，并使用欧几里得距离变换估计采摘点，然后将其投影为3D坐标以供机器人执行。通过在模拟遮挡场景的受控环境中，使用真实的柑橘水果进行实验。
AI.result: GDA-YOLO11在精度、召回率、mAP@50和mAP@50:95方面取得了显著的性能，优于YOLO11n。在不同遮挡水平下，该框架实现了92.59%到22.22%不等的采摘成功率，在中高遮挡情况下成功率提高了3.5%。
AI.conclusion: GDA-YOLO11能够增强对遮挡物体的鲁棒分割，并简化了从感知到行动的集成，为农业领域更可靠的自主系统铺平了道路。本研究首次在机器人水果采摘中实际演示了无遮挡实例分割的应用。

title: CC-VQA: Conflict- and Correlation-Aware Method for Mitigating Knowledge Conflict in Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering
summary: Knowledge-based visual question answering (KB-VQA) demonstrates significant potential for handling knowledge-intensive tasks. However, conflicts arise between static parametric knowledge in vision language models (VLMs) and dynamically retrieved information due to the static model knowledge from pre-training. The outputs either ignore retrieved contexts or exhibit inconsistent integration with parametric knowledge, posing substantial challenges for KB-VQA. Current knowledge conflict mitigation methods primarily adapted from language-based approaches, focusing on context-level conflicts through engineered prompting strategies or context-aware decoding mechanisms. However, these methods neglect the critical role of visual information in conflicts and suffer from redundant retrieved contexts, which impair accurate conflict identification and effective mitigation. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{CC-VQA}: a novel training-free, conflict- and correlation-aware method for KB-VQA. Our method comprises two core components: (1) Vision-Centric Contextual Conflict Reasoning, which performs visual-semantic conflict analysis across internal and external knowledge contexts; and (2) Correlation-Guided Encoding and Decoding, featuring positional encoding compression for low-correlation statements and adaptive decoding using correlation-weighted conflict scoring. Extensive evaluations on E-VQA, InfoSeek, and OK-VQA benchmarks demonstrate that CC-VQA achieves state-of-the-art performance, yielding absolute accuracy improvements of 3.3\% to 6.4\% compared to existing methods. Code is available at https://github.com/cqu-student/CC-VQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CC-VQA的新方法，用于解决知识库视觉问答（KB-VQA）中因模型内部知识与外部检索知识冲突而导致的模型性能下降问题。CC-VQA通过视觉中心化的冲突推理和相关性引导的编码解码机制，有效提升了KB-VQA的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的KB-VQA方法在处理模型静态参数知识与动态检索知识之间的冲突时存在困难，导致模型要么忽略检索信息，要么无法有效融合，从而影响性能。现有方法多借鉴自然语言处理领域的冲突缓解策略，但忽视了视觉信息在冲突中的关键作用，且可能因检索信息冗余而难以准确识别和缓解冲突。
AI.method: CC-VQA是一个无需训练的冲突与相关性感知方法，包含两个核心组件：1. 视觉中心化的上下文冲突推理：对内部和外部知识上下文进行视觉-语义冲突分析。2. 相关性引导的编码与解码：通过位置编码压缩低相关性陈述，并利用相关性加权的冲突评分进行自适应解码。
AI.result: 在E-VQA、InfoSeek和OK-VQA三个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，CC-VQA取得了最先进的性能，准确率相较于现有方法绝对提升了3.3%至6.4%。
AI.conclusion: CC-VQA通过引入视觉信息和相关性度量，有效解决了KB-VQA中的知识冲突问题，显著提高了模型在知识密集型任务上的准确性，并验证了该方法在多个数据集上的优越性。

title: Thinking with Images as Continuous Actions: Numerical Visual Chain-of-Thought
summary: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) increasingly rely on visual chain-of-thought to perform region-grounded reasoning over images. However, existing approaches ground regions via either textified coordinates-causing modality mismatch and semantic fragmentation or fixed-granularity patches that both limit precise region selection and often require non-trivial architectural changes. In this paper, we propose Numerical Visual Chain-of-Thought (NV-CoT), a framework that enables MLLMs to reason over images using continuous numerical coordinates. NV-CoT expands the MLLM action space from discrete vocabulary tokens to a continuous Euclidean space, allowing models to directly generate bounding-box coordinates as actions with only minimal architectural modification. The framework supports both supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning. In particular, we replace categorical token policies with a Gaussian (or Laplace) policy over coordinates and introduce stochasticity via reparameterized sampling, making NV-CoT fully compatible with GRPO-style policy optimization. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks against eight representative visual reasoning baselines demonstrate that NV-CoT significantly improves localization precision and final answer accuracy, while also accelerating training convergence, validating the effectiveness of continuous-action visual reasoning in MLLMs. The code is available in https://github.com/kesenzhao/NV-CoT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为数值视觉链式思考（NV-CoT）的框架，使多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）能够使用连续的数值坐标进行图像区域推理，解决了现有方法在区域定位方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于文本化坐标或固定粒度图像块的方法在区域定位方面存在模态不匹配、语义碎片化、精度限制以及需要复杂的架构修改等问题，促使研究者探索更有效的区域推理方式。
AI.method: NV-CoT框架将MLLMs的离散文本动作空间扩展到连续的欧几里得空间，允许模型直接生成边界框坐标。该框架支持监督微调和强化学习，通过将分类Token策略替换为基于坐标的概率分布（如高斯或拉普拉斯分布）并引入重参数化采样来实现与GRPO策略优化算法的兼容。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中的实验表明，NV-CoT显著提高了目标定位精度和最终答案的准确性，同时加速了训练收敛速度，验证了连续动作视觉推理在MLLMs中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: NV-CoT框架通过引入连续数值坐标进行视觉推理，有效克服了现有方法的局限性，为多模态大语言模型在图像理解和推理任务上提供了更精确、更高效的解决方案。

title: Venus: Benchmarking and Empowering Multimodal Large Language Models for Aesthetic Guidance and Cropping
summary: The widespread use of smartphones has made photography ubiquitous, yet a clear gap remains between ordinary users and professional photographers, who can identify aesthetic issues and provide actionable shooting guidance during capture. We define this capability as aesthetic guidance (AG) -- an essential but largely underexplored domain in computational aesthetics. Existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) primarily offer overly positive feedback, failing to identify issues or provide actionable guidance. Without AG capability, they cannot effectively identify distracting regions or optimize compositional balance, thus also struggling in aesthetic cropping, which aims to refine photo composition through reframing after capture. To address this, we introduce AesGuide, the first large-scale AG dataset and benchmark with 10,748 photos annotated with aesthetic scores, analyses, and guidance. Building upon it, we propose Venus, a two-stage framework that first empowers MLLMs with AG capability through progressively complex aesthetic questions and then activates their aesthetic cropping power via CoT-based rationales. Extensive experiments show that Venus substantially improves AG capability and achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in aesthetic cropping, enabling interpretable and interactive aesthetic refinement across both stages of photo creation. Code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/Venus_CVPR2026.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AesGuide数据集和Venus框架，以解决当前多模态大语言模型在摄影美学指导（AG）和美学裁剪方面的不足，并通过两阶段方法提升了AG能力和美学裁剪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型在摄影美学方面提供的反馈过于积极，无法识别问题或提供可操作的指导，尤其是在美学裁剪方面表现不佳。研究旨在弥补这一空白，赋予模型美学指导能力。
AI.method: 首先构建了一个包含10,748张照片的大规模美学指导数据集AesGuide。然后提出了一个名为Venus的两阶段框架：第一阶段通过逐步复杂的美学问题来增强多模态大语言模型的AG能力；第二阶段利用基于思维链（CoT）的推理来激活其美学裁剪能力。
AI.result: Venus框架显著提升了AG能力，并在美学裁剪方面达到了最先进（SOTA）的性能，实现了在照片创作的两个阶段（拍摄和后期处理）中可解释和交互式的美学优化。
AI.conclusion: Venus框架成功地为多模态大语言模型注入了美学指导能力，并实现了优于现有方法的美学裁剪效果，为普通用户提供了更智能、更具指导性的摄影体验。

title: SpikeTrack: A Spike-driven Framework for Efficient Visual Tracking
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) promise energy-efficient vision, but applying them to RGB visual tracking remains difficult: Existing SNN tracking frameworks either do not fully align with spike-driven computation or do not fully leverage neurons' spatiotemporal dynamics, leading to a trade-off between efficiency and accuracy. To address this, we introduce SpikeTrack, a spike-driven framework for energy-efficient RGB object tracking. SpikeTrack employs a novel asymmetric design that uses asymmetric timestep expansion and unidirectional information flow, harnessing spatiotemporal dynamics while cutting computation. To ensure effective unidirectional information transfer between branches, we design a memory-retrieval module inspired by neural inference mechanisms. This module recurrently queries a compact memory initialized by the template to retrieve target cues and sharpen target perception over time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SpikeTrack achieves the state-of-the-art among SNN-based trackers and remains competitive with advanced ANN trackers. Notably, it surpasses TransT on LaSOT dataset while consuming only 1/26 of its energy. To our knowledge, SpikeTrack is the first spike-driven framework to make RGB tracking both accurate and energy efficient. The code and models are available at https://github.com/faicaiwawa/SpikeTrack.

AI.tldr: SpikeTrack是一个创新的SNN视觉跟踪框架，通过非对称设计和记忆检索模块，在保持高效率的同时提升了RGB目标跟踪的准确性，达到了SNN跟踪器中的SOTA水平，并能与先进的ANN跟踪器竞争。
AI.motivation: 现有SNN跟踪框架在能效和准确性之间存在权衡，要么未能充分利用脉冲驱动计算，要么未能充分利用神经元的时空动力学。研究动机是开发一个能够同时实现高能效和高准确性的RGB目标跟踪SNN框架。
AI.method: SpikeTrack采用一种新颖的非对称设计，包括非对称时间步扩展和单向信息流，以利用时空动力学并减少计算量。设计了一个受神经推理机制启发的记忆检索模块，用于在不同分支间进行有效的单向信息传输，该模块通过循环查询由模板初始化的紧凑型记忆来检索目标线索并随时间增强目标感知。
AI.result: SpikeTrack在SNN跟踪器中达到了最先进水平，并且能够与先进的ANN跟踪器竞争。在LaSOT数据集上，其性能超越了TransT，同时能耗仅为其1/26。
AI.conclusion: SpikeTrack是首个能够同时实现RGB目标跟踪的准确性和能效的脉冲驱动框架，证明了SNN在视觉跟踪领域的潜力。

title: Accelerating Masked Image Generation by Learning Latent Controlled Dynamics
summary: Masked Image Generation Models (MIGMs) have achieved great success, yet their efficiency is hampered by the multiple steps of bi-directional attention. In fact, there exists notable redundancy in their computation: when sampling discrete tokens, the rich semantics contained in the continuous features are lost. Some existing works attempt to cache the features to approximate future features. However, they exhibit considerable approximation error under aggressive acceleration rates. We attribute this to their limited expressivity and the failure to account for sampling information. To fill this gap, we propose to learn a lightweight model that incorporates both previous features and sampled tokens, and regresses the average velocity field of feature evolution. The model has moderate complexity that suffices to capture the subtle dynamics while keeping lightweight compared to the original base model. We apply our method, MIGM-Shortcut, to two representative MIGM architectures and tasks. In particular, on the state-of-the-art Lumina-DiMOO, it achieves over 4x acceleration of text-to-image generation while maintaining quality, significantly pushing the Pareto frontier of masked image generation. The code and model weights are available at https://github.com/Kaiwen-Zhu/MIGM-Shortcut.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 MIGM-Shortcut 的轻量级模型，通过结合先前特征和采样令牌来回归特征演变的平均速度场，以加速掩码图像生成模型（MIGM）的采样过程，在不牺牲质量的情况下实现超过 4 倍的加速。
AI.motivation: 现有的掩码图像生成模型（MIGM）存在计算效率低下的问题，主要是由于多步双向注意力机制。现有加速方法存在显著的计算冗余，并且在试图通过缓存特征近似未来特征时，在高加速率下会产生相当大的近似误差。
AI.method: 提出学习一个轻量级模型，该模型结合了先前的连续特征和已采样的离散令牌，并回归特征演变的平均速度场。该模型具有中等的复杂性，能够捕捉细微的动态变化，同时保持轻量级。
AI.result: 将 MIGM-Shortcut 应用于两种代表性的 MIGM 架构和任务。在 Lumina-DiMOO 模型上，实现了超过 4 倍的文本到图像生成加速，同时保持了生成质量，显著推动了掩码图像生成领域的帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: MIGM-Shortcut 是一种有效的加速 MIGM 的方法，通过回归特征演变的平均速度场，实现了计算效率和生成质量的良好平衡，为进一步的研究和应用提供了新的可能性。

title: Ordinal Diffusion Models for Color Fundus Images
summary: It has been suggested that generative image models such as diffusion models can improve performance on clinically relevant tasks by offering deep learning models supplementary training data. However, most conditional diffusion models treat disease stages as independent classes, ignoring the continuous nature of disease progression. This mismatch is problematic in medical imaging because continuous pathological processes are typically only observed through coarse, discrete but ordered labels as in ophthalmology for diabetic retinopathy (DR). We propose an ordinal latent diffusion model for generating color fundus images that explicitly incorporates the ordered structure of DR severity into the generation process. Instead of categorical conditioning, we used a scalar disease representation, enabling a smooth transition between adjacent stages. We evaluated our approach using visual realism metrics and classification-based clinical consistency analysis on the EyePACS dataset. Compared to a standard conditional diffusion model, our model reduced the Fréchet inception distance for four of the five DR stages and increased the quadratic weighted $κ$ from 0.79 to 0.87. Furthermore, interpolation experiments showed that the model captured a continuous spectrum of disease progression learned from ordered, coarse class labels.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一种序数潜在扩散模型，用于生成包含糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）分级信息的眼底彩色图像，通过显式建模疾病进展的连续性，提高了生成图像的真实性和临床一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有的条件扩散模型在处理医学图像时，常将疾病分期视为独立的类别，忽略了疾病进展的连续性。然而，在眼科如糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）的诊断中，疾病进展通常是连续的，但仅通过离散且有序的标签来观察，这种不匹配限制了模型的性能。
AI.method: 提出了一种序数潜在扩散模型（ordinal latent diffusion model），通过使用标量疾病表示而不是类别条件，将DR严重程度的有序结构显式地纳入生成过程，实现了相邻分期之间的平滑过渡。
AI.result: 与标准的条件扩散模型相比，新模型在五个DR分期中的四个实现了更低的Fréchet Inception Distance（FID），并将分类的二次加权kappa值从0.79提高到0.87。插值实验表明，该模型能够捕捉到从有序的、粗糙的类别标签中学到的疾病进展的连续光谱。
AI.conclusion: 序数潜在扩散模型能够有效地将疾病进展的有序结构融入生成过程，生成更具视觉真实性和临床一致性的医学图像，为处理具有连续性但被标记为离散类别的医学影像数据提供了一种有效的方法。

title: Steering and Rectifying Latent Representation Manifolds in Frozen Multi-modal LLMs for Video Anomaly Detection
summary: Video anomaly detection (VAD) aims to identify abnormal events in videos. Traditional VAD methods generally suffer from the high costs of labeled data and full training, thus some recent works have explored leveraging frozen multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) in a tuning-free manner to perform VAD. However, their performance is limited as they directly inherit pre-training biases and cannot adapt internal representations to specific video contexts, leading to difficulties in handling subtle or ambiguous anomalies. To address these limitations, we propose a novel intervention framework, termed SteerVAD, which advances MLLM-based VAD by shifting from passively reading to actively steering and rectifying internal representations. Our approach first leverages the gradient-free representational separability analysis (RSA) to identify top attention heads as latent anomaly experts (LAEs) which are most discriminative for VAD. Then a hierarchical meta-controller (HMC) generates dynamic rectification signals by jointly conditioning on global context and these LAE outputs. The signals execute targeted, anisotropic scaling directly upon the LAE representation manifolds, amplifying anomaly-relevant dimensions while suppressing inherent biases. Extensive experiments on mainstream benchmarks demonstrate our method achieves state-of-the-art performance among tuning-free approaches requiring only 1% of training data, establishing it as a powerful new direction for video anomaly detection. The code will be released upon the publication.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SteerVAD的框架，通过主动引导和纠正多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的内部表征来改进视频异常检测（VAD）。该方法使用无梯度表征可分性分析（RSA）识别注意力头作为潜在异常专家（LAE），并利用分层元控制器（HMC）生成动态校正信号，以增强异常相关维度并抑制预训练偏差。实验表明，SteerVAD在主流基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，仅需1%的训练数据。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于冻结MLLM的VAD方法存在局限性，因为它们直接继承了预训练偏差，无法适应特定的视频上下文，难以处理细微或模糊的异常。
AI.method:
1. 使用无梯度表征可分性分析（RSA）识别作为潜在异常专家（LAE）的最具判别力的注意力头。
2. 引入分层元控制器（HMC），根据全局上下文和LAE输出来生成动态校正信号。
3. 对LAE表征进行目标化、各向异性的缩放，以增强异常相关维度并抑制偏差。
AI.result: 在主流基准测试中，SteerVAD取得了最先进的性能，是调优免费方法中的佼佼者，并且仅需1%的训练数据。
AI.conclusion: SteerVAD通过主动引导和纠正MLLM内部表征，为视频异常检测提供了一个强大的新方向，有效地解决了现有方法的局限性，并在数据效率方面表现出色。

title: SR3R: Rethinking Super-Resolution 3D Reconstruction With Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D super-resolution (3DSR) aims to reconstruct high-resolution (HR) 3D scenes from low-resolution (LR) multi-view images. Existing methods rely on dense LR inputs and per-scene optimization, which restricts the high-frequency priors for constructing HR 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to those inherited from pretrained 2D super-resolution (2DSR) models. This severely limits reconstruction fidelity, cross-scene generalization, and real-time usability. We propose to reformulate 3DSR as a direct feed-forward mapping from sparse LR views to HR 3DGS representations, enabling the model to autonomously learn 3D-specific high-frequency geometry and appearance from large-scale, multi-scene data. This fundamentally changes how 3DSR acquires high-frequency knowledge and enables robust generalization to unseen scenes. Specifically, we introduce SR3R, a feed-forward framework that directly predicts HR 3DGS representations from sparse LR views via the learned mapping network. To further enhance reconstruction fidelity, we introduce Gaussian offset learning and feature refinement, which stabilize reconstruction and sharpen high-frequency details. SR3R is plug-and-play and can be paired with any feed-forward 3DGS reconstruction backbone: the backbone provides an LR 3DGS scaffold, and SR3R upscales it to an HR 3DGS. Extensive experiments across three 3D benchmarks demonstrate that SR3R surpasses state-of-the-art (SOTA) 3DSR methods and achieves strong zero-shot generalization, even outperforming SOTA per-scene optimization methods on unseen scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SR3R的新型前馈3D超分辨率（3DSR）框架，可以直接从稀疏的低分辨率（LR）视图生成高分辨率（HR）3D高斯溅射（3DGS）表示，克服了现有方法对密集LR输入和每场景优化的依赖，实现了更好的跨场景泛化和实时性。
AI.motivation: 现有3DSR方法依赖于密集LR输入和每场景优化，这限制了继承自2DSR模型的HR 3DGS高频先验，从而影响了重建保真度、跨场景泛化能力和实时性。
AI.method: 将3DSR重新定义为从稀疏LR视图到HR 3DGS表示的直接前馈映射。引入SR3R框架，通过学习到的映射网络直接预测HR 3DGS表示。为了提高重建保真度，引入了高斯偏移学习和特征精炼。SR3R具有即插即用性，可与任何前馈3DGS重建骨干网络配对。
AI.result: SR3R在三个3D基准测试中超越了现有的3DSR方法，在未见过的场景中实现了强大的零样本泛化能力，甚至优于最先进的每场景优化方法。
AI.conclusion: SR3R通过直接前馈映射从稀疏LR视图自主学习3D特定的高频几何和外观，实现了高效、鲁棒且泛化能力强的3D超分辨率，为3D内容生成带来了新的可能性。

title: Spatio-Temporal Garment Reconstruction Using Diffusion Mapping via Pattern Coordinates
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2504.08353
summary: Reconstructing 3D clothed humans from monocular images and videos is a fundamental problem with applications in virtual try-on, avatar creation, and mixed reality. Despite significant progress in human body recovery, accurately reconstructing garment geometry, particularly for loose-fitting clothing, remains an open challenge. We propose a unified framework for high-fidelity 3D garment reconstruction from both single images and video sequences. Our approach combines Implicit Sewing Patterns (ISP) with a generative diffusion model to learn expressive garment shape priors in 2D UV space. Leveraging these priors, we introduce a mapping model that establishes correspondences between image pixels, UV pattern coordinates, and 3D geometry, enabling accurate and detailed garment reconstruction from single images. We further extend this formulation to dynamic reconstruction by introducing a spatio-temporal diffusion scheme with test-time guidance to enforce long-range temporal consistency. We also develop analytic projection-based constraints that preserve image-aligned geometry in visible regions while enforcing coherent completion in occluded areas over time. Although trained exclusively on synthetically simulated cloth data, our method generalizes well to real-world imagery and consistently outperforms existing approaches on both tight- and loose-fitting garments. The reconstructed garments preserve fine geometric detail while exhibiting realistic dynamic motion, supporting downstream applications such as texture editing, garment retargeting, and animation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种统一的框架，结合隐式缝纫图案（ISP）和生成式扩散模型，用于从单张图像和视频序列中高保真地重建3D服装。该方法能够精确地重建服装几何，即使是宽松的服装，并能在真实世界图像中取得良好效果。
AI.motivation: 从单目图像和视频中重建3D服装具有广泛的应用前景，但准确重建服装几何，尤其是宽松服装，仍然是一个开放的挑战。
AI.method: 结合隐式缝纫图案（ISP）和生成式扩散模型来学习2D UV空间的服装形状先验。引入一个映射模型，将图像像素、UV图案坐标和3D几何联系起来。对于视频序列，采用时空扩散方案和测试时引导来增强时间一致性。开发了基于投影的约束来保留可见区域的几何形状并处理遮挡区域。
AI.result: 该方法在合成数据上训练，但能很好地泛化到真实世界图像。在紧身和宽松服装的重建上都优于现有方法，重建的服装保留了精细的几何细节并展示了逼真的动态运动。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的统一框架能够从单张图像和视频中实现高保真的3D服装重建，即使是宽松的服装，并支持下游的纹理编辑、服装重定向和动画等应用。

title: EvalMVX: A Unified Benchmarking for Neural 3D Reconstruction under Diverse Multiview Setups
summary: Recent advancements in neural surface reconstruction have significantly enhanced 3D reconstruction. However, current real world datasets mainly focus on benchmarking multiview stereo (MVS) based on RGB inputs. Multiview photometric stereo (MVPS) and multiview shape from polarization (MVSfP), though indispensable on high-fidelity surface reconstruction and sparse inputs, have not been quantitatively assessed together with MVS. To determine the working range of different MVX (MVS, MVSfP, and MVPS) techniques, we propose EvalMVX, a real-world dataset containing $25$ objects, each captured with a polarized camera under $20$ varying views and $17$ light conditions including OLAT and natural illumination, leading to $8,500$ images. Each object includes aligned ground-truth 3D mesh, facilitating quantitative benchmarking of MVX methods simultaneously. Based on our EvalMVX, we evaluate $13$ MVX methods published in recent years, record the best-performing methods, and identify open problems under diverse geometric details and reflectance types. We hope EvalMVX and the benchmarking results can inspire future research on multiview 3D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EvalMVX数据集，用于量化评估和比较多视图立体（MVS）、多视图光度立体（MVPS）和多视图偏振形状重建（MVSfP）技术，并对13种现有方法进行了基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有真实世界数据集主要侧重于基于RGB输入的MVS方法，而忽视了MVPS和MVSfP技术（在高质量重建和稀疏输入方面至关重要）的量化评估。作者旨在确定不同MVX技术的适用范围。
AI.method: 构建了一个名为EvalMVX的真实世界数据集，包含25个物体，每个物体在20个不同视角和17种光照条件（包括OLAT和自然光）下拍摄，共计8500张图像。数据集包含与图像对齐的地面真实3D网格。使用此数据集，评估了13种近期的MVX方法。
AI.result: 通过EvalMVX基准测试，记录了性能最佳的方法，并识别了在不同几何细节和反射类型下存在的开放性问题。实验结果为MVX方法的性能提供了量化分析。
AI.conclusion: EvalMVX数据集及其基准测试结果为多视图3D重建领域的研究提供了重要的资源和指导，有望激发该领域未来的研究方向。

title: Look Carefully: Adaptive Visual Reinforcements in Multimodal Large Language Models for Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in vision-language reasoning, yet they remain vulnerable to hallucination, where generated content deviates from visual evidence. Existing mitigation strategies either require costly supervision during training or introduce additional latency at inference time. Recent vision enhancement methods attempt to address this issue by reinforcing visual tokens during decoding, but they typically inject all tokens indiscriminately, which causes interference from background regions and distracts the model from critical cues. To overcome this challenge, we propose Adaptive Visual Reinforcement (AIR), a training-free framework for MLLMs. AIR consists of two components. Prototype-based token reduction condenses the large pool of visual tokens into a compact subset to suppress redundancy. OT-guided patch reinforcement quantifies the alignment between hidden states and patch embeddings to selectively integrate the most consistent patches into feed-forward layers. As a result, AIR enhances the model's reliance on salient visual information and effectively mitigates hallucination. Extensive experiments across representative MLLMs demonstrate that AIR substantially reduces hallucination while preserving general capabilities, establishing it as an effective solution for building reliable MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为AIR（Adaptive Visual Reinforcement）的训练无关框架，通过原型化令牌缩减和OT指导的块增强来减少多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的幻觉，同时保持其通用能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的MLLMs在视觉语言推理方面取得了进展，但容易产生幻觉，并且现有的缓解策略要么成本高昂，要么会增加推理延迟。现有的视觉增强方法会不加区分地注入所有令牌，导致背景区域的干扰，分散模型对关键线索的注意力。
AI.method: AIR框架包含两个主要组件：1. 原型化令牌缩减（Prototype-based token reduction）：将大量的视觉令牌压缩成一个精简的子集，以消除冗余。2. OT指导的块增强（OT-guided patch reinforcement）：量化隐藏状态与块嵌入的对齐程度，选择性地将最一致的块集成到前馈层。
AI.result: AIR框架能够增强模型对显著视觉信息的依赖，并有效缓解幻觉。在代表性MLLMs上的大量实验表明，AIR显著减少了幻觉，同时保持了模型的通用能力。
AI.conclusion: AIR是一个有效的、训练无关的框架，可以用来构建更可靠的MLLMs，通过提高对关键视觉信息的利用来减少幻觉。

title: GuardAlign: Test-time Safety Alignment in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in vision-language reasoning tasks, yet ensuring their safety remains a critical challenge. Recent input-side defenses detect unsafe images with CLIP and prepend safety prefixes to prompts, but they still suffer from inaccurate detection in complex scenes and unstable safety signals during decoding. To address these issues, we propose GuardAlign, a training-free defense framework that integrates two strategies. First, OT-enhanced safety detection leverages optimal transport to measure distribution distances between image patches and unsafe semantics, enabling accurate identification of malicious regions without additional computational cost. Second, cross-modal attentive calibration strengthens the influence of safety prefixes by adaptively reallocating attention across layers, ensuring that safety signals remain consistently activated throughout generation. Extensive evaluations on six representative MLLMs demonstrate that GuardAlign reduces unsafe response rates by up to 39% on SPA-VL, while preserving utility, achieving an improvement on VQAv2 from 78.51% to 79.21%.

AI.tldr: GuardAlign 是一种无需训练的防御框架，通过增强的 OT 安全检测和跨模态注意力校准来提高大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）的安全性，有效降低了不安全响应率，同时保持了模型的效用。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于输入的防御方法在复杂场景下检测不安全图像准确性不高，并且在解码过程中安全信号不稳定。为了解决这些问题，需要一种更有效的安全防御框架。
AI.method: GuardAlign 包含两个核心策略：1. OT-增强安全检测：利用最优传输（OT）测量图像块与不安全语义之间的分布距离，从而在不增加额外计算成本的情况下精确识别恶意区域。2. 跨模态注意力校准：通过自适应地重新分配跨层注意力，增强安全前缀的影响力，确保安全信号在生成过程中始终保持激活状态。
AI.result: 在六个代表性多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）上的广泛评估表明，GuardAlign 在 SPA-VL 数据集上将不安全响应率降低了高达 39%，同时在 VQAv2 数据集上的效用从 78.51% 提高到 79.21%，表明其在提升安全性的同时有效保持了模型的效用。
AI.conclusion: GuardAlign 是一种有效的、无需训练的防御框架，通过结合 OT-增强的安全检测和跨模态注意力校准，能够显著提高大型视觉语言模型的安全性，并保持其在各种任务中的效用。

title: FoV-Net: Rotation-Invariant CAD B-rep Learning via Field-of-View Ray Casting
summary: Learning directly from boundary representations (B-reps) has significantly advanced 3D CAD analysis. However, state-of-the-art B-rep learning methods rely on absolute coordinates and normals to encode global context, making them highly sensitive to rotations. Our experiments reveal that models achieving over 95% accuracy on aligned benchmarks can collapse to as low as 10% under arbitrary $\mathbf{SO}(3)$ rotations. To address this, we introduce FoV-Net, the first B-rep learning framework that captures both local surface geometry and global structural context in a rotation-invariant manner. Each face is represented by a Local Reference Frame (LRF) UV-grid that encodes its local surface geometry, and by Field-of-View (FoV) grids that capture the surrounding 3D context by casting rays and recording intersections with neighboring faces. Lightweight CNNs extract per-face features, which are propagated over the B-rep graph using a graph attention network. FoV-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance on B-rep classification and segmentation benchmarks, demonstrating robustness to arbitrary rotations while also requiring less training data to achieve strong results.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为 FoV-Net 的 B-rep 学习框架，该框架能够以旋转不变的方式捕捉局部表面几何和全局结构上下文，解决了现有方法对旋转敏感的问题，并在 B-rep 分类和分割任务上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于 B-rep 的 3D CAD 分析方法高度依赖绝对坐标和法向量来编码全局上下文，导致其对旋转非常敏感，模型在未对齐的基准测试上的准确率会急剧下降。
AI.method: FoV-Net 为每个面表示一个局部参考帧 (LRF) UV 网格来编码局部表面几何，并使用视场 (FoV) 网格捕捉周围的 3D 上下文，通过投射光线并记录与相邻面的交点来实现。轻量级 CNN 提取每个面的特征，然后通过图注意力网络在 B-rep 图上传播这些特征。
AI.result: FoV-Net 在 B-rep 分类和分割基准测试上取得了最先进的性能，同时展现了对任意旋转的鲁棒性，并且在达到良好结果时所需的训练数据更少。
AI.conclusion: FoV-Net 是第一个能够以旋转不变的方式捕捉局部表面几何和全局结构上下文的 B-rep 学习框架，有效解决了现有方法的旋转敏感性问题，并在 B-rep 学习任务中取得了显著的性能提升和鲁棒性。

title: FocusTrack: One-Stage Focus-and-Suppress Framework for 3D Point Cloud Object Tracking
summary: In 3D point cloud object tracking, the motion-centric methods have emerged as a promising avenue due to its superior performance in modeling inter-frame motion. However, existing two-stage motion-based approaches suffer from fundamental limitations: (1) error accumulation due to decoupled optimization caused by explicit foreground segmentation prior to motion estimation, and (2) computational bottlenecks from sequential processing. To address these challenges, we propose FocusTrack, a novel one-stage paradigms tracking framework that unifies motion-semantics co-modeling through two core innovations: Inter-frame Motion Modeling (IMM) and Focus-and-Suppress Attention. The IMM module employs a temp-oral-difference siamese encoder to capture global motion patterns between adjacent frames. The Focus-and-Suppress attention that enhance the foreground semantics via motion-salient feature gating and suppress the background noise based on the temporal-aware motion context from IMM without explicit segmentation. Based on above two designs, FocusTrack enables end-to-end training with compact one-stage pipeline. Extensive experiments on prominent 3D tracking benchmarks, such as KITTI, nuScenes, and Waymo, demonstrate that the FocusTrack achieves new SOTA performance while running at a high speed with 105 FPS.

AI.tldr: FocusTrack 是一种新颖的一阶段 3D 点云目标跟踪框架，通过联合建模运动和语义信息，解决了现有两阶段方法中存在的误差累积和计算瓶颈问题，并在主流数据集上取得了 SOTA 性能和高帧率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于运动的两阶段 3D 点云目标跟踪方法存在显式前景分割导致误差累积以及顺序处理带来的计算瓶颈问题。
AI.method: 提出 FocusTrack，一个一阶段框架，通过两个核心创新：1) 跨帧运动建模（IMM）模块，使用时域差分孪生编码器捕捉相邻帧间的全局运动模式；2) Focus-and-Suppress 注意力机制，通过运动显著性特征门控增强前景语义，并基于 IMM 提供的时域感知运动上下文抑制背景噪声，无需显式分割。这两个设计实现了端到端训练的一阶段紧凑型流水线。
AI.result: 在 KITTI、nuScenes 和 Waymo 等主流 3D 跟踪基准数据集上进行了大量实验，FocusTrack 取得了新的 SOTA 性能，同时保持了 105 FPS 的高运行速度。
AI.conclusion: FocusTrack 通过其新颖的一阶段范式，成功地将运动和语义信息进行了联合建模，克服了传统方法的局限性，在 3D 点云目标跟踪任务中实现了高性能和高效率。

title: Prune Wisely, Reconstruct Sharply: Compact 3D Gaussian Splatting via Adaptive Pruning and Difference-of-Gaussian Primitives
summary: Recent significant advances in 3D scene representation have been driven by 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), which has enabled real-time rendering with photorealistic quality. 3DGS often requires a large number of primitives to achieve high fidelity, leading to redundant representations and high resource consumption, thereby limiting its scalability for complex or large-scale scenes. Consequently, effective pruning strategies and more expressive primitives that can reduce redundancy while preserving visual quality are crucial for practical deployment. We propose an efficient, integrated reconstruction-aware pruning strategy that adaptively determines pruning timing and refining intervals based on reconstruction quality, thus reducing model size while enhancing rendering quality. Moreover, we introduce a 3D Difference-of-Gaussians primitive that jointly models both positive and negative densities in a single primitive, improving the expressiveness of Gaussians under compact configurations. Our method significantly improves model compactness, achieving up to 90\% reduction in Gaussian-count while delivering visual quality that is similar to, or in some cases better than, that produced by state-of-the-art methods. Code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种改进的3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）方法，通过一种自适应的剪枝策略和新的3D差分高斯（3D-DoG）原始模型，在显著减少高斯数量的同时保持甚至提升了渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的3DGS方法需要大量原始高斯以达到高保真度，导致表示冗余、资源消耗大，限制了其在大规模场景中的应用。因此，需要更有效的剪枝策略和更具表达力的原始模型来减少冗余并保持视觉质量。
AI.method: 提出了一种集成的、感知重建的剪枝策略，根据重建质量自适应地确定剪枝时间和细化间隔。同时，引入了一种3D差分高斯（3D-DoG）原始模型，能够在一个原始模型中同时建模正负密度，提高了紧凑配置下高斯的表达能力。
AI.result: 该方法显著提高了模型紧凑性，高斯数量减少高达90%，同时在视觉质量上能与最先进的方法相媲美，甚至在某些情况下更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的剪枝策略和3D-DoG原始模型能够有效地减少3DGS的冗余，提高其效率和表达能力，使其在保持或提升视觉质量的同时，显著降低计算和存储资源消耗，从而解决了3DGS在大规模场景应用中的瓶颈。

title: Manifold-Preserving Superpixel Hierarchies and Embeddings for the Exploration of High-Dimensional Images
comment: 12 pages main paper, 8 pages supplemental material
summary: High-dimensional images, or images with a high-dimensional attribute vector per pixel, are commonly explored with coordinated views of a low-dimensional embedding of the attribute space and a conventional image representation. Nowadays, such images can easily contain several million pixels. For such large datasets, hierarchical embedding techniques are better suited to represent the high-dimensional attribute space than flat dimensionality reduction methods. However, available hierarchical dimensionality reduction methods construct the hierarchy purely based on the attribute information and ignore the spatial layout of pixels in the images. This impedes the exploration of regions of interest in the image space, since there is no congruence between a region of interest in image space and the associated attribute abstractions in the hierarchy. In this paper, we present a superpixel hierarchy for high-dimensional images that takes the high-dimensional attribute manifold into account during construction. Through this, our method enables consistent exploration of high-dimensional images in both image and attribute space. We show the effectiveness of this new image-guided hierarchy in the context of embedding exploration by comparing it with classical hierarchical embedding-based image exploration in two use cases.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于高维图像的超像素层次结构，该结构在构建时考虑了高维属性流形，从而实现了图像和属性空间的一致探索。
AI.motivation: 现有层次嵌入技术忽略了图像的空间布局，导致图像空间和属性抽象之间缺乏一致性，阻碍了对感兴趣区域的探索。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的图像引导的超像素层次结构，该结构在构建时考虑了高维属性流形，并将图像空间信息融入到层次结构中。
AI.result: 通过在嵌入探索的背景下，在两个用例中与经典的基于嵌入的图像探索方法进行比较，证明了该方法在图像和属性空间实现一致探索的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该图像引导的超像素层次结构能够通过同时考虑高维属性信息和空间布局，实现高维图像的连贯探索，提高用户发现和分析图像中感兴趣区域的能力。

title: A multimodal slice discovery framework for systematic failure detection and explanation in medical image classification
summary: Despite advances in machine learning-based medical image classifiers, the safety and reliability of these systems remain major concerns in practical settings. Existing auditing approaches mainly rely on unimodal features or metadata-based subgroup analyses, which are limited in interpretability and often fail to capture hidden systematic failures. To address these limitations, we introduce the first automated auditing framework that extends slice discovery methods to multimodal representations specifically for medical applications. Comprehensive experiments were conducted under common failure scenarios using the MIMIC-CXR-JPG dataset, demonstrating the framework's strong capability in both failure discovery and explanation generation. Our results also show that multimodal information generally allows more comprehensive and effective auditing of classifiers, while unimodal variants beyond image-only inputs exhibit strong potential in scenarios where resources are constrained.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于多模态表示的自动化医学影像分类器审计框架，以解决现有方法的局限性，并在 MIMIC-CXR-JPG 数据集上进行了实验验证，证明了其在故障发现和解释生成方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习医疗影像分类器的安全性与可靠性是实际应用中的主要担忧。现有的审计方法主要依赖于单模态特征或基于元数据的子组分析，这些方法的可解释性有限，并且常常无法捕捉隐藏的系统性故障。
AI.method: 引入了第一个自动化审计框架，该框架将切片发现方法扩展到多模态表示，专门用于医学应用。在常见的故障场景下，使用 MIMIC-CXR-JPG 数据集进行了全面的实验。
AI.result: 实验证明该框架在故障发现和解释生成方面具有很强 e能力。多模态信息通常能实现更全面有效的分类器审计，而除图像外，单模态变体在资源受限的情况下也表现出强大潜力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多模态审计框架能够有效地发现和解释医学影像分类器的故障，并且在不同资源条件下都有其适用性。

title: HumanOrbit: 3D Human Reconstruction as 360° Orbit Generation
summary: We present a method for generating a full 360° orbit video around a person from a single input image. Existing methods typically adapt image-based diffusion models for multi-view synthesis, but yield inconsistent results across views and with the original identity. In contrast, recent video diffusion models have demonstrated their ability in generating photorealistic results that align well with the given prompts. Inspired by these results, we propose HumanOrbit, a video diffusion model for multi-view human image generation. Our approach enables the model to synthesize continuous camera rotations around the subject, producing geometrically consistent novel views while preserving the appearance and identity of the person. Using the generated multi-view frames, we further propose a reconstruction pipeline that recovers a textured mesh of the subject. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of HumanOrbit for multi-view image generation and that the reconstructed 3D models exhibit superior completeness and fidelity compared to those from state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为HumanOrbit的方法，该方法使用视频扩散模型从单张输入图像生成围绕人物的360度全景视频，并能重建出高保真度的3D模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成多视角合成图像时存在视角间不一致和身份信息丢失的问题，而视频扩散模型在生成逼真结果方面表现出色，因此借鉴视频扩散模型来解决多视角人物生成问题。
AI.method: 提出HumanOrbit，一个用于多视角人物图像生成的研究生化扩散模型。该模型能够合成连续的相机旋转，生成几何上一致的新视角，同时保留人物的外观和身份。此外，还提出了一个重建管线，利用生成的多视角帧来恢复带有纹理的3D网格。
AI.result: HumanOrbit在多视角图像生成方面取得了良好的效果，生成的3D模型比最先进的基线方法具有更高的完整性和保真度。
AI.conclusion: HumanOrbit是一种有效的生成围绕人物360度视频的方法，并能从中重建出高质量的3D模型，克服了现有方法的局限性。

title: Fixed Anchors Are Not Enough: Dynamic Retrieval and Persistent Homology for Dataset Distillation
summary: Decoupled dataset distillation (DD) compresses large corpora into a few synthetic images by matching a frozen teacher's statistics. However, current residual-matching pipelines rely on static real patches, creating a fit-complexity gap and a pull-to-anchor effect that reduce intra-class diversity and hurt generalization. To address these issues, we introduce RETA -- a Retrieval and Topology Alignment framework for decoupled DD. First, Dynamic Retrieval Connection (DRC) selects a real patch from a prebuilt pool by minimizing a fit-complexity score in teacher feature space; the chosen patch is injected via a residual connection to tighten feature fit while controlling injected complexity. Second, Persistent Topology Alignment (PTA) regularizes synthesis with persistent homology: we build a mutual k-NN feature graph, compute persistence images of components and loops, and penalize topology discrepancies between real and synthetic sets, mitigating pull-to-anchor effect. Across CIFAR-100, Tiny-ImageNet, ImageNet-1K, and multiple ImageNet subsets, RETA consistently outperforms various baselines under comparable time and memory, especially reaching 64.3% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with ResNet-18 at 50 images per class, +3.1% over the best prior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RETA的解耦数据集蒸馏（DD）框架，通过动态检索和拓扑对齐来解决现有DD方法中存在的拟合复杂性差距和拉锚效应问题，以生成更具代表性和泛化能力的合成数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有的解耦数据集蒸馏（DD）方法依赖于静态真实图像块，这会导致拟合复杂性差距和拉锚效应，降低类内多样性并损害泛化能力。
AI.method: RETA框架包含两个主要部分：1. 动态检索连接（DRC）通过最小化教师特征空间中的拟合复杂性得分，从预构建的池中选择一个真实图像块，并通过残差连接注入以控制复杂性并紧密拟合特征。2. 持久拓扑对齐（PTA）利用持久同调来正则化合成过程，通过构建互KNN特征图，计算组件和循环的持久性图像，并惩罚真实和合成集合之间的拓扑差异，以缓解拉锚效应。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100、Tiny-ImageNet、ImageNet-1K以及多个ImageNet子集上，RETA在可比的时间和内存消耗下，一致优于各种基线方法。特别是在ImageNet-1K上，使用ResNet-18模型，每类50张图像时，RETA达到了64.3%的top-1准确率，比之前最佳方法提高了3.1%。
AI.conclusion: RETA通过动态检索和持久拓扑对齐，有效地克服了现有解耦数据集蒸馏方法的局限性，能够生成泛化能力更强的合成数据集，并在多个基准测试中取得了显著的性能提升。

title: SenCache: Accelerating Diffusion Model Inference via Sensitivity-Aware Caching
summary: Diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art video generation quality, but their inference remains expensive due to the large number of sequential denoising steps. This has motivated a growing line of research on accelerating diffusion inference. Among training-free acceleration methods, caching reduces computation by reusing previously computed model outputs across timesteps. Existing caching methods rely on heuristic criteria to choose cache/reuse timesteps and require extensive tuning. We address this limitation with a principled sensitivity-aware caching framework. Specifically, we formalize the caching error through an analysis of the model output sensitivity to perturbations in the denoising inputs, i.e., the noisy latent and the timestep, and show that this sensitivity is a key predictor of caching error. Based on this analysis, we propose Sensitivity-Aware Caching (SenCache), a dynamic caching policy that adaptively selects caching timesteps on a per-sample basis. Our framework provides a theoretical basis for adaptive caching, explains why prior empirical heuristics can be partially effective, and extends them to a dynamic, sample-specific approach. Experiments on Wan 2.1, CogVideoX, and LTX-Video show that SenCache achieves better visual quality than existing caching methods under similar computational budgets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 SenCache 的新颖框架，用于加速扩散模型的视频生成过程。SenCache 通过分析模型输出对输入扰动的敏感度，动态地、根据样本特异性地选择缓存时间步，从而在计算预算相似的情况下，显著提高视频生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩散模型视频生成质量虽高，但推理速度慢（需要大量去噪步骤）。现有的训练无关加速方法（如缓存）效果有限且需要大量调优，缺乏理论基础。
AI.method: 作者分析了模型输出对去噪输入（噪声潜变量和时间步）的敏感度，并将其作为预测缓存误差的关键指标。在此基础上，提出了一种名为 SenCache 的动态缓存策略，该策略根据每个样本的敏感度自适应地选择缓存时间步。
AI.result: 在 Wan 2.1、CogVideoX 和 LTX-Video 数据集上的实验表明，SenCache 在相似的计算预算下，相比于现有的缓存方法，能够生成更高质量的视频。
AI.conclusion: SenCache 提供了一个理论基础来指导扩散模型推理的自适应缓存，它比现有的启发式方法更有效，并且能够显著提高视频生成的速度和质量。

title: RAViT: Resolution-Adaptive Vision Transformer
summary: Vision transformers have recently made a breakthrough in computer vision showing excellent performance in terms of precision for numerous applications. However, their computational cost is very high compared to alternative approaches such as Convolutional Neural Networks. To address this problem, we propose a novel framework for image classification called RAViT based on a multi-branch network that operates on several copies of the same image with different resolutions to reduce the computational cost while preserving the overall accuracy.
